title: Senior Accountant / Management Accountant
description:
Senior Accountant (AU Client) – Xero Certified



Reports to: Managing Director

Location: Remote (Work From Home)

Employment Type: Full Time

Work Schedule: Monday to Friday, 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM Manila Time



About the Role



Staff Connect Australia is recruiting on behalf of an established Australian business operating across multiple service divisions.



We are seeking a high-level, Xero-accredited Senior Accountant to take full ownership of the company’s financial systems, reporting, and compliance. This long-term role reports directly to the Managing Director and requires a detail-driven professional who can independently manage accounting operations while delivering accurate reporting and actionable financial insights to support business decisions.



This role is ideal for someone experienced in Australian accounting standards, multi-entity structures, and operational financial reporting.



Systems & Tools Environment

Xero

GeoOp

Live Payments Portal

Airtable

Slack



Certifications Required

- Xero Advisor Certified

- Xero Payroll Certified



Required Experience

- Australian BAS and IAS preparation

- Company tax return support (liaising with external accountants as needed)

- Experience working with Australian clients or accounting firms



Key Responsibilities

Bookkeeping & Reconciliations

-Maintain accurate financial records in Xero for all entities

- Perform bank, credit card, and loan reconciliations

- Allocate GST codes and track job-related costs

- Review and code expense entries with proper documentation

- Reconcile inter-entity transactions and maintain a clean general ledger

-

Accounts Payable (Suppliers & Contractors)

- Process and schedule invoices for payment

- Verify invoice accuracy against purchase orders or job references

- Reconcile supplier statements and maintain positive relationships

- Process weekly contractor payments and maintain payout registers

-

Accounts Receivable (Customer Billing & Collections)

- Review job logs from GeoOp and ensure accurate invoicing

- Identify and correct invoicing/data-entry errors

- Manage debtor follow-ups and resolve invoice disputes

- Maintain an accurate aged receivables ledger and report trends



Payroll & Contractor Management

- Process fortnightly payroll in compliance with Australian award rules

- Audit ove
 claims for accuracy and fairness

- Reconcile PAYG, superannuation, and leave balances

- Maintain employee and contractor payment records

- Post and reconcile all payroll journals



Balance Sheet, Assets & Financial Control

- Maintain reconciled balance sheets each month

- Manage the fixed asset register and depreciation schedules

- Record and monitor capital purchases (vehicles, IT, plant, and equipment)

- Administer dividend payments, director loans, and shareholder distributions

- Track intercompany transactions, retained earnings, and equity movements



BAS / IAS Preparation & Compliance

- Prepare monthly IAS and quarterly BAS for review

- Ensure GST and PAYG data is accurate

- Maintain full working papers and supporting documentation

- Monitor ATO correspondence and ensure timely compliance



Financial & Operational Reporting

- Produce weekly cashflow forecasts and monthly management reports

- Conduct variance analysis and identify cost-saving opportunities

- Track workforce utilization, revenue per labour hour, and service profitability

- Provide actionable insights for management, including pricing and discount analysis



Audit & Year-End Support

- Prepare reconciliations and schedules for audits and EOFY processes

- Liaise with external accountants and auditors

- Assist with year-end adjustments, including depreciation, accruals, and provisions



Key Skills & Qualifications

- Bachelor’s degree in Accounting, Finance, or equivalent

- Minimum 3+ years’ experience with Australian clients or accounting firms

- Advanced Xero proficiency, including payroll, fixed assets, and reporting

- Strong knowledge of Australian BAS, GST, PAYG, and Superannuation compliance

- Experience managing balance sheets, dividends, and inter-entity accounts

- Excellent accounts payable, receivable, and reconciliation skills

- Strong analytical and financial reporting capability

- High attention to detail and accuracy

- Able to work independently and proactively identify risks or opportunities



Performance Indicators (KPIs)

- Balance sheets reconciled monthly with full supporting schedules

- Zero unexplained variances in payroll, assets, or BAS accounts

- Timely issuance of invoices and active debtor management

- Accurate and punctual supplier and contractor payments

- Management reports delivered with insightful commentary on trends and efficiencies

- Workforce utilization, cancellations, and discount impacts reported monthly

- BAS/IAS submissions prepared ahead of deadlines

- EOFY and audit documentation complete and delivered on time

title: Online English/World History Teachers (Near-Native Accent)
description:
About Pomelo Academy

Pomelo Academy is an innovative online international school dedicated to delivering high-quality education to students worldwide. We provide a dynamic and engaging learning environment, catering to individualized instruction that transcends geographical boundaries.



Job Description

We are seeking passionate and experienced Near-Native English-speaking Online K-12 Math and/or Science Teachers with verifiable teaching certifications. The ideal candidates will have strong academic backgrounds in Mathematics and/or Science, experience teaching young learners (ages 5–18), and a commitment to creating a supportive, inquiry-based, and engaging online learning environment.



Responsibilities



Deliver interactive and engaging Math and/or Science lessons to individuals and small groups of 2–6 students aged 5–18.

Teach using internationally recognized curricula such as A Closer Look, Glencoe Science, Pearson Interactive Science, NGSS-aligned resources, Singapore Math, or IB/AP/A Level Math programs.

Create age-appropriate lesson plans focused on conceptual understanding, inquiry, problem-solving, and real-world applications.

Incorporate visuals, multimedia, and hands-on virtual activities to make abstract concepts accessible and engaging.

Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback to students and parents.

Foster curiosity, discussion, and active learning in a safe and supportive space.



Qualifications



Professional teacher with at least 2 years of teaching experience (Kindergarten–Grade 12).

Must hold a valid teaching license/certification (e.g., Teaching License, State Certification). TESOL/TEFL is a plus.

Near-native English accent with excellent spoken and written communication skills.

Strong academic background in Mathematics and/or Science (Biology, Physics, Chemistry, General Science).

Experience teaching in public/international schools or reputable online platforms.

Familiarity with inquiry-based and/or interdisciplinary approaches (e.g., STEM/STEAM).

Comfortable working between 07:00–22:00 (Weekdays) and 9:00–22:00 (Weekends), GMT+8.

Proficiency with digital platforms such as ClassIn, Microsoft Office, and other educational technologies.

Must have a stable and fast internet connection and a PC/laptop with at least Windows 10 or Mac OS Catalina.



Benefits



Flexible working hours.

Opportunity to teach using globally respected Math and Science curricula.

Be part of an international, passionate team of educators.

Access to training and professional development.

Regular enrollment model (not a booking system), ensuring schedule stability and consistency

description:

8 hours per day, Monday to Friday.



Pay:

$5 per hour to negotiation.



Before hiring we will do a short paid test.

title: Social Media Assistant
description:
We're a London-based social media agency working with food and beverage, lifestyle, and wellness brands. We're looking for a Social Media Assistant to support the day-to-day running of multiple client accounts.



This role is hands-on and collaborative, with a strong focus on organisation, consistency, and keeping multiple brands running smoothly.



Responsibilities

- Write and adapt copy for social content across TikTok, LinkedIn, and Instagram within established brand tones

- Schedule and publish content across multiple client accounts while keeping content calendars up to date

- Support copywriting for
 newsletters when needed

- Create simple visuals in Canva using existing brand templates and assets

- Do basic editing for short-form video content (trimming, captions, formatting)

- Monitor comments and DMs and flag anything that needs attention

- Stay aware of TikTok and LinkedIn trends and platform shifts, and flag relevant opportunities for clients

- Prepare monthly performance reports and highlight patterns or changes in performance

- Keep assets, calendars, and internal documentation organised across different brands



What we're looking for

- 1+ year of experience in social media management or a similar role

- Strong familiarity with TikTok and how content performs on the platform

- Comfortable writing in different brand tones

- Experience scheduling and managing content across multiple accounts

- Basic Canva and short-form video editing skills

- Strong organisation and attention to detail



Working setup

- Flexible schedule

- We require daily overlap between 10AM - 2PM GMT for collaboration with the team



How to apply



Please send:

- A short cover letter explaining why this role would be a good fit for you

- A portfolio or examples of social media work you've contributed to



A small task will be provided to selected candidates as part of the process.

title: Dispatcher / Office Administrator (Full-Time)
description:
We are seeking a dependable and detail-oriented Dispatcher / Office Administrator to join our growing team. This is a full-time, long-term, office-based position focused on customer service, scheduling, dispatch coordination, and administrative support.



This role is ideal for candidates with BPO or call center experience who are comfortable communicating with U.S.-based customers and enjoy working in a structured, fast-paced environment.



Key Responsibilities



Customer Service & Dispatch



Handle incoming customer calls professionally



Schedule service appointments and manage technician calendars



Maintain accurate customer records in the CRM



Perform warm follow-up calls for maintenance and additional services



Coordinate with technicians and track job progress in real time



Administrative Support



Prepare reports, manage invoices, and track payments



Assist with collections and record-keeping



Collect customer reviews and feedback



Conduct basic research and assist with lead list creation



Marketing Support (Basic)



Post updates to social media platforms



Create simple graphics using Canva (templates provided)



Requirements



Experience in customer service, dispatch, or office administration



BPO / call center background strongly preferred



Experience handling U.S. customers is an advantage



Excellent English communication skills



Organized, detail-oriented, and able to multitask



Familiar with CRM systems and office software



Basic Canva skills are a plus



Spanish is a plus but not required



What We Offer



Competitive salary: $700–$900/month



Paid training and onboarding



Stable, long-term employment



Supportive and professional work environment



Opportunities for growth and development

Complete the application form here:




/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSdBqjcUMBgx4If3yrh_x2eJmyfS2y7Wo-vHbwGsgJxxZqKpVg/viewform

description:

 Ads Manager to help launch, manage, and optimize our ad campaigns.

Launch and manage

Scale and descale campaigns based on performance

Experience managing
/Meta advertising campaigns

Send a short introduction and examples of
 ad accounts or campaigns you have managed.



When applying, include the word “SCALE” in your message so we know you read the full job description.

title: (Urgent Hiring) Virtual Photo & Video Editor - WFH (Contractual - Renewable)
description:
ABOUT THE COMPANY

Negentropy Limited is a Hong Kong–based social marketing agency specializing in the e-commerce space. The name Negentropy represents order, clarity, and positive energy, reflecting how we work and how we support leadership through clarity, structure, and efficient execution. We are building structured systems that support growth and direction, and we invite you to be part of our pioneering team.



We are looking for a reliable and creative Photo & Video Editor to join our growing team. This role is ideal for someone who thrives in a fast-paced environment, pays close attention to detail, and can bring engaging social media campaigns to life through strong visuals and motion content.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES: 

- Optimize video content for various social media platforms.

- Edit videos, produce graphics, and collaborate with the social media team to create high-quality, engaging content.

- Research, conceptualize, pitch, and create original social video content that aligns with brand goals.

- Produce and edit innovative video campaigns aimed at increasing engagement across platforms.

- Handle critical deadlines and quick turnarounds in a fast-paced environment.



QUALIFICATIONS:

- Bachelor’s degree (Open to fresh graduates).

- 1–2 years of experience as a Social Media Editor, or a portfolio demonstrating equivalent skills.

- Portfolio is required, showcasing previous work in graphic design, video editing, and motion content.

- Proficient in Adobe Premiere Pro, Capcut, Photoshop, and Canva. 

- Knowledgeable of the ever-changing social media landscape and internet video trends.

- Excellent graphic design skills, including Adobe Photoshop mastery (a plus).

- Strong layout and marketing campaign understanding.



SALARY: 18,000 PHP - 22,000 PHP per month



WORK SCHEDULE & SETUP

- Employment Type: Contractual

- Contract Term: 6 months (renewable based on performance and business needs)

- Work Setup: Remote 

- 5 working days per week with 2 rest days

- 8 working hours per day with a 1-hour lunch break

- Schedule may vary depending on business needs

- Must have own laptop and a reliable internet connection

Young Publisher |

mbers worldwide and 200+ verified reviews with a 4.9 average rating.

title: Front-End Developer | Shopify / React / JavaScript / .NET
description:
Join our incredible software team and help create innovative applications that support our internal Sales, eCommerce, Logistics, and Accounting operations. A successful candidate in this role will be a critical thinker, a professionally kind collaborator, and a proven problem solver who works well in teams and under pressure with often competing deadlines. This is an opportunity to apply your existing front-end development, Shopify, React, JavaScript, 
 skills in an Agile and collaborative team environment. We are excited to welcome you to our growing team!



Job responsibilities include:



* Design and develop responsive, high-performance front-end experiences for our eCommerce storefronts and internal web applications.

* Build and maintain custom Shopify themes, apps, and integrations that connect with our order, inventory, and fulfillment systems.

* Develop interactive UI components using React and JavaScript to support our global Sales, Customer Service, and Logistics teams.

* Collaborate with back-end developers to integrate front-end applications 
 APIs and services.

* Identify and resolve bugs across our web applications, ensuring consistent cross-browser and cross-device functionality.

* Analyze current front-end solutions and build enhancements to improve performance, usability, and maintainability.



Basic Requirements:



* Verifiable English language and writing skills.

* Available to work 8:00am – 5:00pm (PST/PDT).

* A minimum of 2 years professional work experience in front-end web development.

* Strong proficiency with React, JavaScript (ES6+), HTML5, and CSS3.

* Hands-on experience building or customizing Shopify themes and/or Shopify apps (Liquid, Storefront API, or Shopify Functions).

* Working knowledge 
 Core and C# for API integration and full-stack collaboration.

* Experience with relational databases such as MS SQL or MySQL.

* A deep desire to resolve complex problems with creative and organized technical solutions.

* Understanding of RESTful API design, version control (Git), and modern front-end build tools.

* Familiarity with responsive design principles and cross-browser compatibility best practices.

title: Join Our Team! Reservation Assistant and Dispatcher (Virtual Assistant)
description:
PLEASE READ! FOLLOW INSTRUCTIONS ON HOW TO APPLY!!



We are a reputable black car service company based in Chicago, built on the principles of hospitality, reliability, and professionalism. Our clients trust us to deliver seamless, high-quality service, and we are looking for someone who carries the same ethos in the way they communicate, solve problems, and represent our company.



We are not just looking for someone to fill a role. We are looking for someone who genuinely cares about the work they do and about the success of the company, someone who takes pride in providing excellent service and contributing to a team that values professionalism and growth.



If you are tech-savvy, responsible, detail-oriented, and naturally warm when interacting with people, we would love to hear from you.



REQUIREMENTS:



- Fluent in English (spoken and written)

- Experience in sales or customer service is required

- Age 25 and above

- Must be tech-savvy, responsible, and detail-oriented

- Must have a friendly and pleasant speaking voice

- Proactive in communicating and resolving issues to ensure smooth operations

- Willing to take on additional responsibilities or fill in other roles when needed to support the company’s growth

- Must reside in Metro Manila (Makati, Taguig, Pasig, or Quezon City), Tagaytay, or Davao City

- Stable internet connection with a backup option

- Available for graveyard shift

- Must be available to work weekends (5 days per week schedule)

- Must have a designated working area





IMPORTANT:



We are looking for candidates who can carefully understand instructions, process information accurately, and make thoughtful decisions. Making reservations and dispatching chauffeurs are essential parts of our operations, so attention to detail and sound judgment are extremely important.



We also value people who care about the company they are working for, who treat the role with a sense of ownership rather than simply completing tasks.



Please note that being hired does not guarantee a permanent position immediately.

- You will first undergo one week of guided training with a tea
mber.

- This will be followed by one week where you independently handle reservations and dispatch tasks.

- After this period, your performance will be evaluated to determine whether we will move forward with your employment.



Payment is provided monthly.



YOUR RESPONSIBILITIES:



- Answer calls,
s, and text messages with a friendly and professional approach

- Assist clients with making reservations and coordinating their transportation needs

- Help ensure smooth scheduling and dispatching of chauffeurs



WE PROVIDE:



- Comprehensive training to help you succeed in the role



TO APPLY, PLEASE PROVIDE THE FOLLOWING:



- Gender:

- Age:

- Location (Include City):

- Your Resume/CV:

- About You (professionally and personally):

- Screenshot of your internet service details and a speed test (use: 
)

- Voice recording (via 
) saying the following:



"Black Car Service, this is [YOUR NAME], how can I help you today? Certainly, I can help you with that. Do you have an account with us? No problem! Just provide us your pick-up location and drop-off location. For your trip, that would be $100 all-inclusive, which includes 20% gratuity for your chauffeur. You're welcome and thank you for choosing us."

Please upload your audio recording and resume to Google Drive and provide the link to the folder.

If you have great attention to detail, a positive attitude, and the ability to work both independently and as part of a team, we encourage you to apply and become part of our growing company.

title: Executive Virtual Assistant – Genius at GSD
description:
Sponge is an untypical branding agency based in Brisbane Australia and proudly B Corp certified. We believe that awesome is no longer enough, businesses must also do good to achieve the success they truly want.



We work exclusively with purpose-led and purpose-ready business owners to help them become ElectroMagnets for top talent and dream clients. Our goal is to help 1 million people live their lives to the fullest by helping create cultures where people shine, building impact models that inspire greatness, and crafting brand stories that ripple meaning through the market.



We are fanatical about culture and this role must be a culture fit. Check out what that means for us at our website: 
 



If you're obsessed with order, thrive on structure, and love making things run smoothly—this might be your dream role.



THE ROLE: WHY WE NEED YOU

We’re looking for a highly organised, systems-minded Executive Virtual Assistant to be the right hand to our founder and the heartbeat of our operations.



This is not merely a social media role (although there are aspects). This is about execution, clarity, task ownership, and follow-through. You’ll live inside ClickUp and CRM tools, ensuring projects are moving, clients are updated, and the business runs like a well-oiled machine.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES



PROJECT & TASK MANAGEMENT

-Manage our ClickUp workspace across multiple projects

-Assign, follow up, and close out tasks to keep the team on track

-Maintain clear, up-to-date timelines and dependencies



CLIENT COMMUNICATION

- Draft and send weekly client project updates

- Keep CRM data current and accurate

- Support professional, friendly communication with clients on behalf of the founder



EXECUTIVE SUPPORT

- Manage inbox and calendar, prioritise scheduling, and protect the founder’s time

- Handle meeting prep, document follow-up, and internal coordination

- Own recurring systems and weekly task cycles without being reminded



EVENT COORDINATION

- Set up and manage monthly (multiple) online events using platforms like Humanitix, Linkedin and Zoom

- Schedule and track RSVPs, send reminders, and coordinate details



LEAD MANAGEMENT

- Track and manage inbound leads in the CRM

- Respond to warm leads or DMs where appropriate (bonus: Instagram scheduling & inbox experience)



LINKEDIN OUTREACH & LEAD NURTURING

- Experience managing outbound connection and message flows on LinkedIn

- Use templates and frameworks to follow up and nurture connections through the pipeline

- Track responses, update statuses, and book in triage or strategy calls



REQUIREMENTS

- Proven experience in an executive assistant or operations VA role

- Advanced skills in ClickUp (or another robust project management tool)

- Experience using CRM systems and handling client comms

- Strong written and spoken English

- Highly organised and reliable. You don’t need chasing or reminding

- Comfortable with Google Workspace, Zoom, Humanitix, and Slack

- Experience with LinkedIn lead outreach or a strong willingness to learn

- Availability for 35 hours/week with reliable check-in at 8:30am AEST on Monday, Wednesday, and Friday

- A hunger to learn better ways to do things. You always want to optimise, simplify, and improve



BONUS SKILLS (Not Required, but Great to Have)

- Familiarity with Instagram inbox handling

- Experience with event tech, lead management systems, or automations

- Light data tracking or reporting experience

- Experience with Zapier 

- Experience with ActiveCampaign 



TO APPLY



Your application must include:

1. Write a short intro about why you're applying for this role and why it fits you.

2. Share a specific example of how you’ve used a tool like ClickUp or another PM platform to manage a team or a project.

3. Share an example of how you organised chaos into clarity, i.e. a system, checklist, routine, or tool that made something easier and more efficient.

4. Confirm your availability for 35 hours/week and your ability to work with a start time of 8:00am AEST Mon/Wed/Fri.

5. Use the word "
ntum" in your subject line and your 4th sentence.

6. Tell us what our culture means to you 

7. Use 8 app points





We’ll only consider applicants who follow all instructions.



This position is long-term, stable, and highly valued. If you love structure, take pride in being the one who keeps the wheels turning, and want to work with a business that’s doing good in the world, we look forward to hearing from you.

- Full-time position: 8 hours daily, Monday-Friday; 40 hours a week

- Flexible schedule: Choose your own hours, as long as you show up for the daily meeting (MANDATORY)

- Stable income: Long-term role with regular, on-time payments

- Supportive team: Collaborative environment without micromanagement

- Growth path: Opportunities to increase responsibilities and earnings

- 100% remote: Work-from-home setup



TASKS



Client Support (maintaining 40-50 total clients):



- Run kickoff calls with new clients using our proven script

- Review client content and give actionable feedback

- Answer client messages within 24 hours

- Host weekly group calls and 1-on-1 coaching sessions

- Help clients overcome content blocks and limiting beliefs



Progress Tracking:



- Update daily/weekly reports

- Track client progress and next steps

- Join daily team check-ins

- Ensure clients follow strategies consistently



REQUIREMENTS (MUST-HAVE)



- C1+ English (written and spoken) with no accent

- Strong communication skills

- Organized and detail-oriented

- Reliable internet and a quiet workspace

- Accountability mindset and deadline commitment



IMPORTANT



When recording a Loom video as part of your application:



- Camera must show your FACE & SCREEN

- Treat it as a LIVE interview with the Hiring Manager

- Have a professional background

- Have clear audio

- Wear business-casual attire



BONUS SKILLS (NOT REQUIRED)



- Content creation and social media experience

- Knowledge of Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts

- Regular usage of AI tools (ChatGPT, CapCut)



WHY JOIN US?



- Start rate: $935 a month + performance-based bonuses (TOTAL: $1,100 a month)

Note: More experienced CSMs earn between $1,800 and $2,500 after 6-12 months.

- Performance bonuses: Up to $900+ additional monthly based on:

- Client retention rates

- Task completion metrics

- Quality of feedback

- Team collaboration

- Payments: Twice per month via Wise directly to your bank

- Tools access: We'll cover all the needed tools

- Work-life balance: No graveyard shifts

- Professional growth: Regular feedback and skill development



HOW TO APPLY



1: Message us on OnlineJobs.ph with "CSM" as the message title



2: Include ONLY the following in your message:



#1: Your CV.

#2: Your years of experience with short-form content.

#3: Your years of experience with client management.

#4: One sentence on why you're a good fit for this role.

#5: Your portfolio.



Note: Messages that do not follow this format will NOT be reviewed.



P.S. Young Publisher is the recruitment company. Successful candidates will work under Social Influence Consulting LLC.

title: Virtual Assistant - Community & Operations Support
description:
This is a Virtual Assistant Role with focus on Community & Operations support.



Sponge is an untypical branding agency based in Brisbane Australia and proudly working to build the Business for Good community. We believe that awesome is no longer enough; businesses must also do good to achieve the success they truly want.



We work exclusively with purpose-led and purpose-ready business owners to help them become ElectroMagnets for top talent and dream clients. Our goal is to help 1 million people live their lives to the fullest by helping create cultures where people shine, building impact models that inspire greatness, and crafting brand stories that ripple meaning through the market.



We are fanatical about culture and this role must be a culture fit. Check out what that means for us at our website (which you will have to find). 



If you're obsessed with order, thrive on structure, and love making things run smoothly, this might be your dream role.



THE ROLE: WHY WE NEED YOU



We are looking for a highly meticulous Community & Operations Assistant to manage the heartbeat of our outreach and events.



Note: This role will begin strictly as part-time (up to 20 hours/week), but has the potential to evolve into a Full-Time position based on the relationship built and the value you provide.



This is not a creative marketing or project management role. This is a pure execution role. You will be running established Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs) to ensure our community members are invited, engaged, and nurtured consistently. If you are a stickler for detail, love following a proven process, and take pride in making sure no one falls through the cracks, this is for you.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES



COMMUNITY RELATIONSHIP MANAGEMENT & OUTREACH

- Execute daily LinkedIn outreach and messaging on behalf of the founder using proven SOPs and scripts

- Manage follow-ups based on established outreach cadences to ensure the right frequency of touch

- Track engagement and maintain accurate records of conversations and interactions



CLIENT COMMUNICATION

- Draft and send weekly client project updates

- Keep CRM data current and accurate

- Support professional, friendly communication with clients on behalf of the founder



EVENT COORDINATION & OPERATIONS

- Set up and update regular events across multiple online platforms

- Coordinate with our design team to ensure event graphics are published correctly

- Invite curated "A-list" guests to events following specific guidelines

- Track RSVPs, monitor attendance, and ensure the correct follow-up messages are sent



 COMMUNICATION & CAMPAIGN SUPPORT

- Assist with ongoing
 communications and campaign execution via Mailchimp

- Manage segmented lists and execute scheduled communications

- Support specific follow-ups based on community engagement or event attendance



DATA, REPORTING & ADMINISTRATION

- Keep our CRM and community contact lists meticulously clean and updated

- Send daily "End of Day" (EOD) reports detailing completed tasks, blockers, and next steps

- Run established Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs) reliably to ensure no one falls through the cracks



REQUIREMENTS



- Extreme Attention to Detail: Small mistakes compound quickly in community operations. You must be highly accurate.

- Process Discipline: You must be comfortable and happy executing repetitive, structured SOPs daily without needing to "reinvent" them.

- Tech Comfort: Experience with LinkedIn (outreach/messaging), Mailchimp, CRM management, and event platforms.

- Relationship Awareness: A professional, warm tone and an understanding of how to treat high-value community members.

- Availability: Up to 20 hours/week, spread across the week and aligning with the founder’s time.

- Hunger: A hunger to learn better ways to do things. You always want to optimise, simplify, and improve.



BONUS SKILLS (Not Required, but Great to Have)

As this role has the potential to grow into a full-time position, candidates with the following additional skills will be highly regarded:

- Experience with social media posting and platform management

- Account management experience

- Light account management and client relationship building



TO APPLY



Your application must include:

1. Write a short intro about why you're applying for this role and why it fits you.

2. Share a specific example of how you’ve managed events via event platforms.

3. Share an example of how you organised chaos into clarity, i.e. a system, checklist, routine, or tool that made something easier and more efficient.

4. Confirm your availability for 20 hours/week and your ability to work with a start time of around 9:30am AEST most week days.

5. Use the word "Connection" in your subject line and your 4th sentence.

6. Tell us what our culture means to you.

7. Use exactly 7 app points.



We’ll only consider applicants who follow all instructions.



This position is long-term, stable, and highly valued. If you love structure, take pride in being the one who keeps the community humming, and want to work with a business that’s doing good in the world, we look forward to hearing from you.

title: Amazon Listing Graphics Designer
description:
Read fully before applying.



Crep Therapy is an urban-luxury sneaker care brand built on culture, quality, and visual storytelling. Our ASMR sneaker cleaning content has generated millions of views, and we are now expanding onto Amazon with the goal of building listings that stand out immediately in search and convert at a high level.



We are looking for an Amazon Listing Graphics Designer who specialises in creating elite-level listing visuals — not basic Canva templates.



Your work should be scroll-stopping, premium, and conversion-focused, designed to outperform the average Amazon listing in both clarity and visual impact.



If your graphics look like typical marketplace templates, this role is not for you.



---



Your Mission



1. Design high-converting Amazon listing graphics for a sneaker cleaning kit.

2. Create visuals that immediately communicate product value, transformation, and benefits

3. Produce premium infographics, lifestyle visuals, and product explanation graphics.

4. Help structure the listing visuals to increase click-through rate and conversion.

5. Deliver designs that look modern, premium, and visually superior to competing listings



This role is about visual persuasion, not simply decorating product photos.



---



What We’re Looking For



1. Strong experience designing Amazon product listing graphics

2. Ability to create premium infographic layouts and visual storytelling

3. Experience producing lifestyle images and product benefit graphics.

4. Strong understanding of Amazon buyer psychology and visual hierarchy.

5. Ability to make graphics that stand out in search results and improve conversion.



Designers who rely heavily on templates or generic styles will not be a good fit



---



Deliverables



You will design a complete Amazon listing visual set, typically including but not limited:



1. Main Amazon product image

2. Product benefit infographic

3. Product feature graphic

4. “What’s included” kit breakdown

5. Before / after transformation graphic

6. Lifestyle image showing product usage

7. Instructional / how-to graphic



All visuals must be clear, premium, and designed specifically for Amazon conversion.



---



Hiring Timeline



We are hiring quickly and looking to make a decision within 24 hours, so applicants who can demonstrate strong work immediately will be prioritised.



---



To Apply



Send the following:



1. A Google Drive link to your best Amazon listing graphics work

   (include infographics, lifestyle images, and product listing visuals).



2. Examples of listings where your graphics are currently being used if available.



3. Your mobile number or WhatsApp number for direct communication.



4. A short explanation of your design process for creating high-converting Amazon listing graphics



5. Your compensation expectation for 9 graphics. 



Please only send your strongest work



---



We are looking for someone who can create premium Amazon listing visuals that immediately stand out from competitors



If your designs stop scrolling and communicate value instantly — apply.

title: Appointment Setter (NOT Cold Calling) – Perfect English Required | SaaS | Commission + Base Pay
description:
About Stagera

Stagera is an operations management platform built for Audio/Visual and production companies. We help production teams manage quotes, equipment, crew scheduling, and client communication — all in one modern, connected software platform.



?? PERFECT ENGLISH IS REQUIRED — Written and spoken. You will be communicating directly with business owners in the US. If your English is not fluent and natural-sounding, please do not apply.



?? THIS IS NOT COLD CALLING — You will be reaching out to warm and pre-qualified leads provided by Stagera via
, LinkedIn, and occasional phone follow-ups. This is relationship-based outreach, not random dialing.



Role Overview

We're looking for a motivated Appointment Setter to help us connect with production companies and schedule product demos with decision-makers. You'll be the first point of contact, helping potential clients see the value in simplifying their operations through Stagera.



Responsibilities

• Reach out via
, LinkedIn, and phone to warm leads (provided by Stagera)

• Qualify prospects based on industry, company size, and readiness to explore solutions

• Schedule demos for the sales team and ensure the lead attends the scheduled time

• Maintain accurate tracking of outreach and appointments in our CRM (Notion/HubSpot)

• Follow up promptly with no-shows or rebookings



Qualifications

• Proven experience in SaaS appointment setting, sales, or outreach

• PERFECT English — written and verbal (non-negotiable)

• Familiarity with the AV or event production industry is a plus but not required

• Comfortable working independently in a remote, performance-driven environment

• Reliable internet connection and quiet workspace



Schedule

12 PM – 8 PM EST, Monday–Friday (40 hrs/week)



Compensation

Base Pay: $3/hr (~$120/week guaranteed)

PLUS Commission:

• $5 bonus when the lead completes a demo

• $15 bonus if the demo converts to a paying customer



Expected weekly earnings with commissions: $150–$250+ on top of base pay, depending on performance.



Why Join Us

• Flexible remote work — work from anywhere

• Commission potential with a fast-growing SaaS company

• Opportunity to grow into a full sales or account management role

• Be part of a small, driven team where your work directly impacts growth



To Apply: Please include a short voice recording (1–2 minutes) introducing yourself in English so we can assess your communication skills. Applications without a voice recording will not be considered.

description:
Work Hours: Full-time, Monday to Friday, normal Philippine working hours



Young Publisher | 
/



We’re an international digital publishing company hiring from the Philippines for over 5 years.

We have 50+ tea
mbers worldwide and 200+ verified reviews with a 4.9 average rating.

We build long-term partnerships, not short-term gigs.

We don't disappear, we pay on time



We’re looking for an experienced direct response copywriter who can:

- Take full ownership of performance-driven campaigns

- Write
s that get opened, read, and clicked

- Create Ads that stop people from scrolling.

- Craft persuasive copy that drives readers to act.



This is a full-time remote role with clear growth opportunities. You’ll start with
s and ads, and as you prove yourself, move into sales pages and VSLs.



What you’ll do



- Write broadcast
s and automated sequences

- Create Meta ad copy and video scripts

- Help produce ebooks and lead magnets using AI tools

- Progress into sales pages and VSL scripts for launches



Why is this role different?



- You’ll receive direct feedback from an 8-figure copywriter. This is a serious opportunity to sharpen your skills fast.

- You’ll also get access to premium courses and AI communities. We invest in our team because we want long-term growth.

- We encourage AI tools — but only with strong critical thinking. This is not a beginner role.



Essentials



- Full-time position (Monday–Friday, 8 AM - 5 PM PH Time)

- Long-term position with growth into sales pages and VSLs

- $2,000–$4,000 USD per month, depending on experience

- Fully remote

- Reliable, on-time payments every two weeks via Wise



Requirements



- At least 2 years of direct response copywriting experience (not blog or content writing)

- Proven results: open rates, CTR, conversions, ROAS

- Experience writing for coaches, course creators, or info product businesses

- Native-level English for US, UK, or Australian audiences

- Strong understanding of hooks, emotional triggers, objection handling, and CTAs

- Experience with Meta ad copy and video scripts

- Ability to adapt to different brand voices

- Comfortable using AI tools with critical thinking

- Strong communication skills and independence

- Reliable, responsive, proactive, and coachable



Hiring process



#1: Paid test task

#2: Interview

#3: Paid test month at 50% salary



We’re looking for professionals who know their craft and want long-term growth.



How to apply



Apply via our Typeform here: 
/to/CZb9go1y



Note: Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.



Young Publisher

title: Urgent Hiring: Remote Executive Assistant — Executive Support for B2B eCommerce Consultant Founder
description:
Urgent Hiring: Remote Executive Assistant — Executive Support for B2B eCommerce Consultant Founder (FEMALE)



Job Code: AJH-VEA01

Location: Remote

Type: Part-Time (4 hours per day, Monday to Friday)

Schedule: U.S. Morning Hours (Pacific Time) — preferably starting 1–2 hours before the founder’s workday (e.g., 7:00 AM – 11:00 AM PT) | 10:00 PM – 2:00 AM (Manila time)



Monthly Rate: $560 / $7 per hour



About the Role:

We are seeking a proactive, detail-oriented Virtual Executive Assistant to support a seasoned B2B eCommerce consultant and founder.

This is a high-trust, high-impact role focused on helping the founder stay organized, maintain follow-up discipline, and bring structure to daily operations.

We are looking for someone who can think ahead, learn quickly, and operate comfortably in a fast-moving, founder-led environment.



Key Responsibilities:



1. Inbox & Communication Management

	•	Monitor and triage multiple inboxes

	•	Flag priority messages

	•	Draft professional replies

	•	Maintain follow-up discipline so nothing slips



2. Calendar & Meeting Coordination

	•	Manage calendar flow and scheduling

	•	Protect focus time

	•	Coordinate meetings across time zones

	•	Prepare basic meeting briefs when needed



3. HubSpot & Pipeline Support

	•	Maintain contact and deal hygiene

	•	Log activities consistently

	•	Help maintain consistency in lead flow



4. Follow-Up & Execution Support

	•	Track action items fro
etings

	•	Nudge stakeholders when needed

	•	Maintain simple task visibility



5. Research & Briefing Support

	•	Conduct B2B research

	•	Prepare short summaries or briefs



Minimum Qualifications:

	•	Minimum 2 years experience supporting founders or executives

	•	Bachelor’s degree in Business Administration or related field preferred

	•	Excellent English communication (C2 level required)

	•	Strong organizational and follow-through skills

	•	Experience with inbox and calendar management

	•	Comfortable learning new tools and systems quickly

	•	High level of professionalism and discretion



Preferred Experience

	•	HubSpot or CRM experience

	•	Experience supporting consultants or B2B teams

	•	Sales Navigator familiarity (a plus)

	•	Strong AI tool familiarity (ChatGPT or similar)



Required Skills

	•	Strong written business communication

	•	Excellent attention to detail

	•	Calendar and inbox management

	•	Task tracking and follow-through

	•	Research and information synthesis

	•	Tech comfortable and systems oriented



Key Traits We Value

	•	Fast learner with high curiosity

	•	Proactive communicator

	•	Systems thinker

	•	Highly reliable and responsive

title: Direct Response Video Editor (VSL / Paid Social Ads)
description:
We're a performance-driven direct-to-consumer brand that lives and dies by the quality of our video ads. We run aggressive testing across Meta — hooks, angles, formats, lengths — and we move fast. If you're used to cinematic or YouTube-style editing, this isn't the right fit. If you understand that the first 3 seconds determine everything, keep reading.



The Role



You'll take scripts and creative concepts and turn them into high-performing video ads — primarily for Meta.



For each concept you'll typically receive:



Script



Hook variations



Reference ads



Product B-roll footage



Sometimes additional B-roll sources



Your job is to turn those inputs into compelling ads through strong pacing, smart visual selection, and clear visual reinforcement of the message. Some creatives will be short-form, others longer VSL-style — depends on what's being tested.



The password for the google form, for question one, is: RETENTION



Responsibilities



Edit video ad creatives from scripts and references



Source B-roll when needed



Maintain strong pacing and viewer retention



Add subtitles and visual emphasis where appropriate



Deliver multiple hook variations when required



Turn around revisions quickly



Workflow & Expectations



This is a full-time role (~40 hours/week), deliverable-based. You'll typically work through 2–3 ad concepts per day, each often including multiple hook variations. Volume varies by concept complexity — some ads are quick, some take longer. Especially early on, we'll work closely together so you learn the style and what performs.



The standard is always quality that performs — not volume for its own sake.



Compensation



Full-time, long-term position



$800–$1,600/month depending on experience



Negotiable for strong direct response background



HOW TO APPLY ------



Complete our application form here: 


 



Applications that don't complete the form will not be reviewed.

title: Full-Stack Developer (AI-Powered SaaS Platform)
description:
About the Role



We are hiring a full-stack developer to take end-to-end ownership of a flagship client project: an AI-powered SaaS platform that uses large language models and vector-based document retrieval to automate a time-intensive business process. 



The Project



The platform has three major technical layers:



1. AI Content Generation

The system uses the OpenAI Responses API with file_search to query managed vector stores containing domain-specific knowledge. A multi-store architecture separates expert knowledge (shared across all users) from client-specific data and per-job document uploads. The AI generates detailed, contextualised responses grounded in these knowledge bases.

Key constraint: The Responses API limits file_search to two vector store IDs per call, which shapes the entire retrieval architecture.

Technologies: OpenAI Responses API, file_search tool, managed vector stores, file metadata attributes and filtering, streaming responses via SSE.



2. Document Processing and Assembly

Input documents (PDF, DOCX) are parsed using Azure Document Intelligence to extract questions, requirements, tables, and structural formatting. AI-generated content is then assembled back into the client's original document format, preserving formatting, table structures, and layout. This is the core technical challenge of the project and its key competitive differentiator.

Key challenge: Reliably placing generated content into bespoke document structures without breaking formatting ("the mapping problem"). Each input document is unique.

Technologies: Azure Document Intelligence, DOCX manipulation (programmatic Word document generation), document structure analysis.



3. SaaS Platform

A multi-tenant web application with subscription billing, user management, knowledge base management, health checks, and a members area. Standard SaaS functionality built on our established stack.

Technologies: React 18 with TypeScript, Node.js/Express.js with TypeScript, PostgreSQL with Drizzle ORM, Stripe/Chargebee for subscriptions, Azure hosting.



Layer

Frontend

React 18, TypeScript, Vite, Tailwind CSS, shadcn/ui (Radix UI), TanStack React Query v5, Wouter routing, Recharts



Backend

Node.js, Express.js, TypeScript, RESTful API design



Database

PostgreSQL, Drizzle ORM



AI / ML

OpenAI Responses API, file_search, managed vector stores, prompt engineering, streaming (SSE)



Document Processing

Azure Document Intelligence, programmatic DOCX generation (node docx library or equivalent), PDF parsing



Payments

Stripe and/or Chargebee (subscription management, webhooks, billing portal)



Infrastructure

Azure (App Service, storage, networking), Google Cloud Storage, CI/CD, Replit (development and prototyping)



What You Will Be Doing



Building the platform end-to-end. 

You will be the primary developer. You will receive detailed specifications and be expected to deliver production-ready code across the frontend, backend, database, and AI integration layers. You will not be waiting for someone else to build the API or design the database. You own it.

Implementing the AI content generation pipeline. Setting up vector stores, writing setup/sync scripts, building the retrieval and generation flow using the OpenAI Responses API, engineering prompts for consistent high-quality output, and optimising for cost and latency.



Solving the document mapping problem. 

Parsing input documents with Azure Document Intelligence, identifying where AI-generated content should be placed, and assembling completed documents that preserve the original formatting. This is the hardest part of the project and requires strong problem-solving ability.



Building the SaaS platform features. 

User authentication, subscription management (Stripe/Chargebee), multi-tenant knowledge base management, file uploads, health check engines, and the members area UI.



Working from specifications. 

The project has a functional scope document, an API technical specification, and a production proposal. You will be expected to read, understand, and build from these documents, raising questions or concerns where the specifications are ambiguous or incomplete.



Communicating clearly. 

You will participate in standups, provide progress updates, raise blockers early, and contribute to technical discussions. You will not be expected to communicate directly with the end client.



Requirements



Must Have

- 5+ years of professional full-stack web development with React and Node.js as your primary technologies.

- Strong TypeScript skills across both frontend and backend. You should be comfortable with type inference, generics, and type-safe ORM usage.

- PostgreSQL experience with a modern ORM (Drizzle preferred, Prisma acceptable). You should be able to design schemas, write migrations, and optimise queries.

- Experience integrating with third-party APIs, particularly RESTful APIs with authentication, webhooks, and error handling. Payment integrations (Stripe, Chargebee) are a strong plus.

- OpenAI API experience, particularly the Responses API, file_search, and vector store management. If you have not used these specifically, you should be comfortable learning new APIs quickly from documentation.

- Document processing experience: parsing PDFs or Word documents programmatically, extracting structured data from unstructured documents, or generating formatted documents from code.

- Azure experience: App Service, Azure AD B2C, Azure Document Intelligence, or Azure storage.

- SaaS platform experience: multi-tenancy patterns, subscription billing integration, role-based access control, feature gating by subscription tier.

- Ability to work autonomously from specifications. You can take a functional scope document and turn it into working software without needing hand-holding on every decision.

- Available to work Australian Eastern time zone hours. This is a remote role, but you need to be online during AEST/AEDT business hours for standups and collaboration.



How to Apply

Please include the following in your application:



- A brief summary of your relevant experience

- A PDF or Google Doc link to your CV. This is essential if you wish to be considered.

- Links to projects or repositories that demonstrate your full-stack and mobile work (GitHub, portfolio, live projects, or app store links)

- Confirmation that: you are OK with using screenshot capture software for time tracking; are happy with Sydney working hours; are happy working an exclusive role (that means no freelance paid or unpaid work 'on the side'); and you would be willing to undergo a live technical assessment as part of the interview process.

title: Part?Time VA (ClickUp or similar + AI) to Help Build & Deliver a Construction Concierge Service
description:
I’m building an AI?assisted construction concierge for Australian homeowners who are planning renovations and new builds. 



The service combines:

A human Virtual Project Assistant (VA) who talks with the client, chases builders and consultants, manages documents and timelines.

A set of AI tools and custom agents that provide checklists, draft documents, compare quotes and help keep each project organised.



I’m looking for a smart, tech?savvy VA who will:

Help me set up the basic platform for a ‘concierge MVP’ (ClickUp + Google Drive/Sheets + AI tools).

Be the first VA to deliver the concierge service to real clients.

Support some light marketing and outreach as we grow.

Help with research to validate and refine the strategy and tech choices (e.g. comparing ClickUp with alternatives).



This will start as a part?time role and can grow if the MVP is successful. I’m therefore looking for someone who is available 10-20 hours per week initially with the potential to expand this if the ‘concierge MVP’ is a success.



What you’ll do



1. Help build the basic platform



Working from my workflows, templates and strategy, you will:



a. Research & validation of tools and approach

Help research and compare tools to validate parts of the strategy, for example:

Comparing ClickUp to other project/work management tools for our use case.

Choosing our preferred LLM for AI support outside ClickUP

Looking at how other AI-enabled services handle similar workflows



b. Set up ClickUp (or other agreed tool) based on advice I provide on workflows and templates etc. This may include:

Create Spaces/Folders/Lists for projects

Set up custom fields

Build project templates so a new client project can be created in a few clicks.

Help configure basic automations and views (boards, calendars, dashboards) and/or identify complex set-up requirements to help to engage a specialist.



c. Organise Google Drive & Sheets

Create a standard folder structure per project.

Set up and maintain shared Google Sheets.

Make sure documents and sheets link correctly from ClickUp.



d. Support AI / LLM setup

Help connect our chosen AI/LLM tool(s) to the workflows (e.g. using prompts to generate briefs, planning summaries, quote comparisons, update
s).

Help connect the LLM and PM tools with our knowledge base.

Maintain a “prompt library” and keep templates up to date as we learn.

Use our preferred LLM to help turn our workflows, SOPs, checklists and tool setups into clear written guides.



e. Work with a developer on custom agents

Collaborate with a developer who will build custom AI agents and chatbots (e.g. intake bot on the website, quote comparison helper).

Test the agents, give feedback, and help make sure they work smoothly inside ClickUp or the website for everyday use.



2. Deliver the concierge service for clients



Once the basic platform is in place, you will act as the virtual project assistant for early clients, working directly with them and on their behalf. This includes:



a. Client communication and coordination

Speaking with clients via
, chat and occasional video/voice calls to clarify their goals, questions and next steps.

Making phone calls and sending
s to architects, builders and other providers on the client’s behalf to request information, check availability, follow up on quotes and set up appointments.

Scheduling and confirming meetings between clients and providers, and logging outcomes.



b. Project setup and planning support

Reviewing intake information and helping turn it into a clear project brief using templates and AI.

Logging into planning tools (e.g. Archistar) to download reports and saving them in the correct folders.



c. Provider research and quote comparison

Researching and shortlisting architects, designers, builders and other professionals using online platforms and public reviews.

Using AI tools to help summarise reviews, compare quotes and draft questions for clients to ask providers or for you to ask on their behalf.



d. Tracking progress and budgets

Helping track project progress, key dates, variations and basic budget tracking in ClickUp/Sheets.

Keeping issues, risks and decisions up to date so nothing falls through the cracks.

Status updates and “what’s next”

Drafting client updates and follow?up
s using templates and AI, then personalising and sending them.

Keeping everything organised so that the client always knows “what’s happening now and what’s next,” with you as their main point of contact.



You will not be expected to give legal, financial or engineering advice – we have clear rules for when to escalate to specialists.



3. Light marketing and outreach support



The role might also include some support for marketing and outreach, such as:

Use AI to help draft social media posts, comments and replies based on my strategy and voice.

Post and engage from our accounts under guidance (LinkedIn,
 groups, etc.).

Help identify and reach out to potential distribution partners (e.g. architects, planners, mortgage brokers), using templates and AI?drafted initial messages.



What I’ll provide



You won’t be starting from zero. I will provide:

Detailed workflows by stage (intake, planning, designer/builder selection, approvals, construction, handover).

Templates and checklists for briefs, planning checks, feasibility support, provider shortlists, quote comparisons, risk logs, status updates, etc.

A clear strategy for how the concierge should operate, including escalation rules (what we never do, when to refer to experts).

Access to the tools we use (ClickUp, Google Workspace, AI tools, planning tools).

Regular calls to review and refine how we work.



The long?term intention is to automate more of the workflows over time (via AI and custom agents) if the concierge MVP proves successful, so this role will evolve.



Who this role suits

You have strong experience as a VA or operations assistant, ideally with project?style work (construction, property, consulting, or similar).

You are comfortable learning new tools, enjoy building systems, and can follow and improve SOPs.

You have good written and spoken English and can write clear, professional client?facing messages.

You are curious about AI tools and already use them to work faster and smarter.

You’re happy to start part?time alongside other work and grow as the business grows.

Experience with property, building, architecture, or renovations is a plus but not essential if you are a fast learner and detail?oriented.



Growth and incentives



This role will start part?time, but I’m open to sharing upside as we prove and scale the concierge, for example:

Performance bonuses for hitting delivery milestones (e.g. successfully running X projects through the workflows to a high standard).

Pay rises and increased hours as we automate more and a single VA can support more projects.

Potential revenue?share or lead?fee bonuses where we can ethically and transparently earn referral/lead fees from certain trades and professionals.



We can shape the exact structure together once we’ve run the first few projects and understand where you add the most value.



CV and screening questions (please answer all)



To apply, please send a link to your written CV (no videos) and briefly answer the following questions in your application:

- Which tools like ClickUp, Asana, Notion, Airtable, etc. have you used, and for what kind of work?

- Briefly describe one time you helped set up or improve a system or workspace (e.g. project management, CRM, content calendar, or client portal). What changed?

- How are you currently using AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, etc.) in your work? Give 1–2 concrete examples.

title: Real Estate Cold Caller / SDR (US Hours – Fix & Flip Lending)
description:
We are a U.S.-based private lending company (
) that provides financing to real estate investors — fix-and-flip loans, bridge loans, and rental property loans.



We’re looking for a confident cold caller / SDR to contact active real estate investors and introduce Zendra as a lender they can use on future deals. These investors are already doing deals and already working with lenders. Your job is to open the door — not to sell loans.



This is a top-of-funnel relationship building and lead qualification role.

Your goal: turn investors into warm contacts in our CRM so we can follow up and build long-term lending relationships. We will also pay bonuses for booking appointments and for identifying deals that eventually close.



Schedule: Full-time, US Eastern hours



Responsibilities

 ? Call real estate investors from our lead lists (expect 100–150 calls per day)

 ? Introduce Zendra Lending and what we offer

 ? Confirm contact information (phone and
)

 ? Learn about the investor’s business and current deal activity

 ? Ask whether they’re open to working with additional lenders

 ? Mark qualified contacts in Pipedrive and log detailed notes

 ? Schedule calls with our team when appropriate

 ? Identify investors with upcoming deals that need financing

 ? Maintain follow-up cadence with investors over time



Requirements

 ? Excellent spoken English — clear, natural, and confident

 ? Comfortable working US Eastern hours

 ? Comfortable making high volumes of outbound calls daily

 ? Friendly and confident phone presence — you sound like someone investors want to talk to

 ? Organized, reliable, and self-directed



Experience with any of the following is a plus:

 ? Cold calling or appointment setting

 ? Real estate investor leads

 ? Telemarketing or outbound sales

 ? US call center / BPO experience

 ? CRM tools (Pipedrive, HubSpot, etc.)



Equipment Requirements

 ? Reliable high-speed internet

 ? Quiet workspace

 ? Quality headset

We provide CloudTalk (dialer), Pipedrive (CRM), lead lists, and scripts.



Hiring Process

Application ? Short interview ? Short paid trial ? Full-time role



To Apply

Please include:

 1. A short introduction about yourself

 2. A 1–2 minute voice recording introducing yourself

 3. A brief description of your cold calling experience

To confirm you read this entire job post, please include the word ZENDRA at the top of your application.

Applications without a voice recording will not be considered.

title: SEO and Digital Marketing Manager
description:
SEO & Digital Marketing Manager (Full-Time | Long-Term | Remote – Philippines)



We are seeking a highly skilled SEO & Digital Marketing Manager to join our growing team full-time. This role is responsible for driving organic traffic, generating qualified leads, and strengthening our digital presence in the highly competitive Texas property management market.



The ideal candidate has strong expertise in SEO, Google Ads, content marketing, reputation management, and marketing analytics, with a proven ability to deliver measurable results and first-page search rankings.



This is a long-term opportunity for a marketing professional who wants to grow with a fast-expanding company.



Key Responsibilities

1. Search Engine Optimization (SEO)



- Conduct comprehensive keyword research focused on high-intent Texas-based search terms such as:

Houston property management

Greatwood rental management

Sugar Land landlord services

- On-page SEO



- Technical SEO



- Local SEO

- Implement schema markup, site speed improvements, and mobile-first optimization.



- Build high-quality backlinks through strategic outreach, guest posting, digital PR, and local partnerships.



- Conduct competitor analysis and implement strategies to outperform competitors in organic search and local map rankings.



- Consistently work toward securing first-page Google rankings for target keywords.



2. Social Media & Reputation Management



- Develop and execute a content strategy across platforms such as:
, Instagram, LinkedIn, X 
) and Google Business Profile



- Share content including: Client success stories, Market insights, Property owner tips and Testimonials



- Monitor reviews across Google, Yelp,
, and other platforms.



- Respond to negative feedback promptly and professionally with solutions and follow-ups.



- Encourage satisfied clients to leave 5-star reviews and build strong social proof.



3. High-Converting Content Creation



- Write and optimize compelling content including: Blog posts, Neighborhood guides, Property owner resources, Landing pages and Ad copy



- Create SEO-driven content designed to generate qualified leads such as:



- Free rental analysis offers



- Property owner inquiries



- Assist with video scripts and short-form social media content.



4. Google Ads & Paid Advertising



- Plan, launch, and optimize Google Ads campaigns including: Search, Display and Performance Max



- Target property owners in Houston and surrounding metro areas.



- Manage: Campaign budgets, Bidding strategies and A/B testing



- Continuously optimize campaigns to reduce cost-per-lead (CPL) while improving lead quality and ROI.



5.
 Marketing & Automation



Build and manage
 marketing campaigns and drip sequences using platforms such as: Mailchimp, ActiveCampaign and HubSpot



- Support: Lead nurturing, Owner onboarding, Seasonal promotions and Client retention



- Segment lists and optimize campaigns to improve open rates, click-through rates, and conversions.



6. Analytics, Reporting & Optimization



- Use tools such as: Google Analytics, Google Search Console, SEO tracking tools



- Monitor: Website traffic, Keyword rankings, Lead generation, Conversion performance



- Prepare weekly and monthly performance reports with insights and recommendations.



- Continuously identify opportunities to improve and scale successful marketing campaigns.



Qualifications:

- Proven experience in SEO and digital marketing

- Strong understanding of Google ranking factors and SEO tools

- Experience managing Google Ads campaigns

- Strong content writing and copywriting skills

- Experience with
 marketing platforms

- Ability to analyze marketing data and make data-driven decisions

- Excellent communication and organizational skills

- Ability to manage multiple marketing initiatives simultaneously

- Experience working with real estate, property management, or local service businesses is a strong advantage.



How to Apply:

- If you are interested in this opportunity, please send the following:

- Link to your updated resume

- Portfolio or examples of SEO or marketing campaigns you have managed

- Examples of websites or keywords you have ranked

- Your proposed hourly rate



We are looking for someone who wants to build a long-term career with our company and play a key role in our digital growth.

title: Senior Marketing Manager for Personal Growth Organization
description:
Are you an experienced digital marketer looking to make a positive impact on the world?



Do you enjoy working with entrepreneurial tea
mbers to bring your ideas to life?



Do you enjoy working with platforms like Substack, Meta, Linkedin, Mailchimp, Riverside and Ai tools for content creation?



Do you want to work with a company where your voice is valued and you can have a significant impact on company growth?



Do you want to work for a company that has a tangible, meaningful impact on it’s customers and the world?



Do you care about personal growth and helping leaders to have a greater impact in the world?



Do you want to take real ownership for architecting the marketing team of an established company, with a proven product and great content?



If you answered yes to any of the questions above, this job may be for you.



Overview: 



Andrew Horn is an industry-leading executive coach who helps founders and CEO's to cultivate personal integrity and relational mastery. You can learn more about his coaching and speaking at 
. In addition to his executive coaching practice, Andrew is the founder of The Junto. More information below. 



The Junto is a men’s work organization focused on quarterly wilderness retreats, a year-long mastermind, and 1-on- coaching. We support entrepreneurs and executives who are serious about growth and self-leadership. Having worked with hundreds of men—including founders of companies like Casper, Hinge, and TOMS—we are now at a stage where we need to systemize our marketing and outreach.



Historically, our marketing has been driven by referrals and our founder Andrew’s personal network. To scale, we need a full-stack marketing approach that removes Andrew from manual outreach, builds a sustainable pipeline of leads, and grows our influence in the space of men’s personal development.



–



We’re looking for a resourceful, results-driven Marketing Manager who can take full ownership of our marketing initiatives. This role requires hands-on execution and leveraging AI tools to amplify our message. You will report directly to the CEO and co-founder, Andrew Horn



Here are the platforms we most want to grow...








/itsandrewhorn



and 
 instagram and linkedin accounts. 



What You’ll Be Responsible For:



Content creation - Overseeing our project manager and creating quality content across web, newsletter and social to drive engagement. We have books, ted talks and podcast appearances that we need to mind for content and then need someone to distribute this across all relevant platforms. 

Video editing: You should be adept with things like riverside,  capcut and capable of repurposing long videos into short, viral content pieces.

Podcast production - I have a podcast and will need help producing episode and creation content from each. 

LinkedIn Outreach – Developing strategic outreach to founders and CEOs. 

Social Media Growth – Expanding our audience across relevant platforms and overseeing consistent content creation.

CRM & Referral Systems – Systematizing our CRM and enhancing our referral network.



Skills we are looking for:



Hands-on experience with ai content creation, Meta Business Suite, Linkedin and youtube. 



Exceptional written and verbal communication, with the ability to create compelling content using AI tools.

A strong aesthetic sense, ensuring brand consistency across all marketing channels. You need to know what looks good. 

Autonomous & resourceful, thriving in a high-growth, mission-driven environment.

Bonus: Highly data-oriented, able to present weekly reports tracking marketing performance.



Personality traits we value



Passionate about personal growth

Resourceful and comfortable working with a high degree of autonomy

Must be a fluid english speaker

Detail oriented

Deep kindness and conscious communication



How to Apply:

Start your application with the word "gratitude"—this shows attention to detail.

Include a short video note introducing yourself and why you think you are a good fit for this role. We value clear communication and tech-savviness. Use 
 is helpful.

title: High-Ticket SaaS Sales Closer (Canadian Tech) | Remote
description:
ARE YOU A HUNTER?

We are a Canadian-based technology company. We are looking for an ambitious Sales Hunter, not an order taker. We sell a "Smart Web Lead Management & Automation System" that businesses actually need.



THE PRODUCT:

You aren't selling "air." You are selling a high-value automation tool.



* The Market: North America (Canada/USA).

* The Pitch: We help businesses automate growth. It works.

* The Opportunity: The product is solid, meaning the chance of "Zero Sales" is near nil if you put in the work.



THE MONEY (BASE + HIGH COMMISSION):

We are looking for a partner, not an employee. We are willing to invest in the right person.



* Base Salary: Negotiable. (We are happy to discuss a base retainer for a candidate with a proven track record).

* The Commission: This is where you make your real money. You earn approx. 14,000 PHP ($335 CAD) for every single sale.

* The Target: Close just 2 deals a month = 28,000 PHP.

* The Accelerator: Continue earning 14,000 PHP for every single sale after that.

* The Potential: Uncapped. Our top reps aim for 60,
,000+ PHP monthly.



THE ROLE:



* Outbound Hunting: You will call North American businesses (EST hours) to demo our software.

* Closing: You are not just setting appointments; you are closing the deal.

* Tools: We provide the dialer, the leads, and the training. You bring the hustle.

* Schedule: Flexible, but you must be willing to make calls during Canadian Business Hours (Eastern Standard Time).



WHO YOU ARE:



* Hungry: You prefer uncapped commission over a limited salary because you know you can sell.

* Experienced: You have done outbound B2B sales or appointment setting before (SaaS preferred).

* Tech-Savvy: You can learn a new software product quickly so you can demo it with confidence.

* Resilient: You have a thick skin and a neutral/professional English accent.



HOW TO APPLY (STRICT REQUIREMENT):

I am looking for a star. To prove it is you:



1. Send a message with the subject line: "I'm Hungry"

2. Include a link to your resume/profile.

3. MANDATORY: Include a link to a 60-second voice recording (Vocaroo or Google Drive) telling me why you prefer commission sales.



Note: Applications without a voice recording will not be reviewed.
