title: Social Media Manager/Strategist VA
description:
Job Title: Social Media Manager/Strategist VA 

Send your resumes/portfolios to 

Type of Position: Full-time (40 hours per week) long-term position

Working Time Zone: Flexible (United States working hours are not required)



Job Description: 

ThorTeaches is an online educational services company that specializes in video-based training in the IT and cybersecurity field. We're looking for a creative and strategic Social Media Manager to build and manage our online presence. This role is ideal for someone who understands the power of not only social media but other online platforms to connect with audiences and grow communities.



Key Responsibilities: 

Social Media Strategy & Management: You'll be the voice of ThorTeaches across social media platforms, creating and curating engaging content that resonates with our target audience. This includes developing content calendars, writing compelling captions and posts, creating or sourcing visuals (graphics, photos, video) for posts, scheduling and publishing content across multiple platforms, and maintaining a consistent company voice and aesthetic.

Community Engagement & Growth: You'll actively engage with our online community by responding to comments, messages, and mentions based on defined schedules and priorities, monitoring company mentions and relevant conversations and identifying opportunities for engagement and collaboration. You'll also track engagement metrics and provide insights into what content performs best.

Analytics & Optimization: You'll monitor social media performance using platform analytics and third-party tools, prepare regular reports on growth, engagement, and key metrics with clear recommendations for improvement of our social media strategy, and stay current with platform updates, algorithm changes, and social media best practices.



Secondary duties may include occasional administrative or support tasks such as handling limited customer queries, maintaining mailing lists, conducting basic research, and creating or formatting documents in Word, Excel, and PowerPoint.

The role is a non-sales role, with no phone requirements, focused on growing out social media reach, support our customer experience, and our educational platform's growth.



Required Skills:

o Proven Social Media Management: 2+ years of experience managing business accounts with measurable results. Note: General Administrative VA experience does not qualify

o Experience managing communities beyond social media (
,
 Groups, forums, etc.)

o Excellent writing and communication skills with ability to maintain ThorTeaches' authentic, no-nonsense brand voice (not corporate/salesy)

o Proven ability to create scroll-stopping content using hooks, visuals, and timing

o Deep understanding of platform-specific content strategies, demographics, and algorithms 
, LinkedIn, YouTube, TikTok, Instagram), especially for education/B2C conversion-focused content.

o Short-form video production experience, including editing, captioning, and repurposing long-form content into platform-native formats (Reels, Shorts, TikTok)

o Ability to analyze social media performance and translate insights into content and campaign decisions focused on conversions and growth

o Content Creation & Graphic Design: Proficiency with design tools (Canva, Adobe Creative Suite) to create high-quality static assets (carousels, infographics, thumbnails)

o Understanding of content marketing funnels and how social media drives course sales

o Campaign Strategy & Execution: Proven experience designing, executing, and optimizing social media campaigns end-to-end content across multiple platforms simultaneously (goals, content mapping, execution, performance tracking)

o Portfolio / Proof of Work: Applicants must be prepared to share examples of social media accounts, posts, or campaigns they directly managed and explain their role and results during the screening process.



Preferred Qualifications:

o Understanding of online course structures and educational content workflows

o Understanding of hashtag strategy and social SEO

o Familiarity with emerging social media trends and platforms

o Background in copywriting or content marketing

o Experience creating content in the IT/cybersecurity education space OR demonstrated ability to quickly learn technical topics



Technical Requirements:

o PC (laptop/desktop) with minimum specs:

? Windows 10/11 or macOS (recent versions)

? 16 GB RAM 

? 256 GB SSD storage minimum (video/audio files are large)

? Processor: Intel i5/AMD Ryzen 5 or better

o Webcam and microphone for video meetings

o Stable internet connection: 

? 25 Mbps download minimum (50+ Mbps preferred)

? 10 Mbps upload minimum (for video uploads)



Nice to have:

o Dual monitors for improved productivity

o Backup internet connection, Power backup/UPS recommended (for internet/power interruptions)

o Dedicated quiet workspace

o Smartphone for emergency communications and 2FA



• Personal Qualities: 

o Creative and proactive mindset

o Strong sense of brand awareness

o Excellent time management

o Authentic and engaging communication style

o Passion for social media and digital marketing



• What we offer: 

o Starting Salary: $800-1,000 dependent on experience.

o 75% salary in the training period, it can be up to 3 months, but most members finish it in 2 weeks.

o Profit sharing and 13th month 

o 15 days Paid vacation days (Accrued one day per month, 3 at EOY), unused days carry over for 1 year.

o 10 paid holidays per year

o HMO allowance ($100 /month) – 6 months after trial period.

o Internet allowance ($40 /month).

o 100% remote, flexible working hours (except the Mandatory Monday morning tea
eting, 8:00 PH time)

o Professional development with access to 50+ professional development courses (more being added as needed)

o Opportunities for certification exams

o Supportive, growth-oriented culture



Work Commitment:

o This is a full-time position with excellent compensation and benefits

o We expect this role to be your primary professional commitment

o Other freelance/part-time work MAY be acceptable IF: 

? It doesn't conflict with your responsibilities or schedule here

? It doesn't violate our NDA or non-compete agreements

? You maintain consistent quality and availability for our work 

? You're transparent about any potential conflicts

? You get written approval for it from leadership



Importance Note of our Culture: 



We operate differently from traditional hierarchical organizations. We expect you to:

o Ask questions when something isn't clear

o Propose better ways of doing things

o Respectfully disagree when you have concerns

o Communicate directly with leadership about any issues

o Support your team through challenges rather than punishing mistakes

title: Experienced Accountant
description:
Accountant (Remote)



About Us

We’re on a mission to bring high-quality, air- and oven-dried meat snacks to consumers across the U.S. through our growing portfolio of brands. As pioneers in the American biltong space, we take pride in offering protein-packed, clean-label snacks made with simple and honest ingredients.

As our operations continue to expand and the company grows, we are looking for a reliable and experienced Accountant to join our team and support the company’s finance and accounting operations.



Position Overview

We are seeking a detail-oriented and proactive Accountant with diverse accounting experience who can assist with day-to-day accounting tasks and support the preparation of financial reports. The ideal candidate is comfortable working with different accounting functions such as payroll, accounts receivable, accounts payable, and financial statement preparation.

This role is ideal for someone who is organized, analytical, and capable of managing multiple accounting responsibilities in a remote work environment.



Key Responsibilities

• Handle daily accounting operations, including recording transactions and maintaining accurate financial records

• Manage Accounts Receivable, including invoicing customers and monitoring collections

• Process and manage Accounts Payable, ensuring timely and accurate payments to vendors

• Assist with payroll processing and payroll-related entries

• Perform account reconciliations and ensure balances are accurate

• Assist in the preparation of financial statements and other financial reports

• Maintain organized and complete supporting documentation for financial transactions

• Work with the team to ensure accounting records are accurate and up to date

• Assist in improving accounting processes and maintaining proper financial controls





Qualifications

• Certified Public Accountant (CPA) required

• Experience with accounting software or ERP systems; familiarity with Sage 300 is an advantage

• Solid understanding of general accounting principles and financial reporting

• Experience handling multiple accounting functions such as payroll, A/R, and A/P

• Strong attention to detail and organizational skills

• Ability to work independently in a remote setup

• Good communication skills and ability to collaborate with team members



Work Setup

• Remote work

• 3:00 PM – 12:00 AM Philippine Time

title: Influencer Research & Outreach VA (NO EXPERIENCE NEEDED) - 8
description:
TURN YOUR SOCIAL MEDIA SCROLLING INTO A REMOTE JOB (Influencer Research + DM VA)

If you spend way too much time on Instagram/TikTok checking gym creators, this might be the easiest job you ever land.



We’re a Gen-Z–run app studio building a fast-growing fitness app, and we’re hiring VAs to help us research, reach out to, and build relationships with influencers.



- No experience required.

- No resume required.

- Just strong English + good judgment + social media instincts.

- Must work NYC timezones! (in between 9am to 5pm)



If you understand gym culture, talk like a human, and type like a native English speaker, you’re already ahead of 99% of applicants.





WHAT YOU’LL DO

This role is part lead generation, part DM outreach, part relationship management.



Your daily tasks:

- Find new fitness creators (gym/lifting niche only)

- Add them to our Google Sheet with the correct info (username, followers, country,
, etc.)

- Evaluate their profile quality (are they legit, on-brand, and worth reaching out to?)

- DM influencers using our scripts

- Handle the conversation in a friendly, natural, professional way

- Answer questions, keep the convo alive, and push creators toward collaboration

- Follow up consistently

- Track responses and organize leads properly



You’ll basically be the person discovering new influencers and bringing them into the brand.

We’ll teach you everything, you just need strong English and social media instincts.





YOU’RE A FIT IF YOU

- Have very strong written English (this is the #1 requirement)

- Can communicate clearly and confidently

- Know the gym/fitness niche (huge bonus)

- Are organized and detail-oriented

- Can follow instructions EXACTLY

- Are comfortable reaching out to people on social media

- Have good judgment (can spot fake/farm accounts instantly)

- Are under 28 (our team is young)

- Want part-time remote work you can do from anywhere



We don’t care about degrees. We care about output, consistency, and attitude.





WHAT WE OFFER

- Remote work

- Fast replies, fast onboarding

- Fun Gen-Z team

- Simple tasks anyone smart can do

- Performance-based promotions

- The chance to handle creator deals + negotiations once you prove yourself





TEST 1 (WHEN APPLIYING) — Influencer Sheet Review + Research



Use this Google Sheet template (make a copy of the sheet to modify it): 
/drive/folders/1hDVQyxHEi-ZmaKfmGk1KWSzqrxKSM-Q7?usp=sharing



You must complete:

Rows 3–13 — PASS or FAIL



Look at the creators already listed and ONLY fill the PASS / FAIL column (1st column of the table).

Base your decision on:

- Fitness/gym relevance (are they a gym influencer?)

- Their country (our target audience is North American countries and 1st world countries)

- High number of views (100 000 median views minimum)

*Little tip, less than 50% are good :)*



Rows 14–23 — Add 10 New Fitness Creators (based on the same criterias that were used for rows 3-13)

Add:

- Username

- Instagram profile link

- Number of followers

- Median views per reel (approximately)

- Full name

-
 (if public)

- Country



These must be real gym/lifting creators. No deep digging. Just fast and accurate.





TEST 2 (AFTER YOU GOT SELECTED FOR THE 2ND ROUND) — 1-3 Minutes Introduction Video



Record a simple phone video (no editing needed) and answer:

- Who you are

- Any experience with customer support jobs, social media or research

- How comfortable you are chatting with influencers through DMs

- Why you’re a good fit for this role



Just speak clearly and naturally.





HOW TO APPLY

Reply to this job post with:

A Google Drive link containing:

- Your completed Google Sheet (for TEST 1 tasks)



Answers to these short questions (in text form in the message you send when applying):

- How many hours/day or week can you work?

- Are you comfortable with NYC TIME hours full-time?

- Are you comfortable handling DM conversations?



Applications missing either test 1 OR answers to the questions will be ignored automatically.

Write “Philippines #1” at the end of your last question's answer so we know you actually read this :)

title: REAL ESTATE ACQUISITIONS SPECIALIST — Wholesale
description:
REAL ESTATE ACQUISITIONS SPECIALIST — Wholesale

Remote | Full-Time | 6 Days/Week, 10:00AM–7:00PM EST

Base: $1,500–$2,000/month | 2% Commission |1% on renegotiations | OTE $30,000+/year

Direct Hire | US Client | No Agencies



Your income is tied directly to your output. The pipeline is active, the operation is built to close, and if you're a real closer — you will earn well here.





THIS IS FOR CLOSERS ONLY.



If you haven't locked up wholesale contracts over the phone, negotiated with motivated sellers, and hit consistent monthly numbers — do not apply. 1+ year of proven virtual acquisitions experience required. No exceptions.





WHY TOP PERFORMERS CHOOSE THIS ROLE



- No time wasted sourcing — pre-qualified sellers hit your dialer every day

- Competitive base so you're never starting from zero

- Coaching, systems, and support built in — we invest in your growth

- Direct hire, US client — no agency cut, no middleman

- Long-term opportunity with real upside the more you perform





WHAT YOU'LL DO



- Dial 150+ pre-qualified seller leads daily

- Build rapport, qualify motivation, and close deals over the phone

- Negotiate pricing and terms to lock up win-win agreements

- Manage pipeline and follow-ups in CRM — no deal dies in the follow-up gap

- Hit daily, weekly, and monthly targets consistently





REQUIREMENTS (NON-NEGOTIABLE)



- 1+ year of proven virtual acquisitions experience — closing wholesale deals by phone

- Real numbers to back it up — contracts per month, conversion rate

- Fluent, confident, and persuasive English

- Elite negotiation and follow-up — handles objections, creates urgency

- Coachable, competitive, results-driven

- Quiet home office with reliable high-speed internet







HOW TO APPLY



: 

Subject Line: REAL ESTATE ACQUISITIONS SPECIALIST



Include:

- 1–2 min voice recording — intro + your acquisitions experience

- Your resume

- Answers to all 4 screening questions below



SCREENING QUESTIONS (answer all 3 — no exceptions)



1. Have you worked for a wholesale or investment real estate company? Which type and how long?



2. How long have you done acquisitions and what were your core responsibilities?



3. When did you last actively do acquisitions work — and why are you looking for a new role?



Applications missing any step will not be reviewed.

title: Part-Time YouTube Video Editor (Long Form + Shorts)
description:
We are looking for a part-time YouTube editor to help produce content for a growing personal YouTube channel called The Corner.



The channel focuses on topics such as:



• Personal growth  

• Faith and life experiences  

• Business and productivity  

• Internet culture and opportunities  

• Conversations and interviews  



The goal of the channel is to share thoughtful long-form content and build a community around meaningful ideas and experiences.



We are looking for someone who can help turn raw footage into engaging videos that people enjoy watching.



--------------------------------------------------



Editing Expectations



You will be responsible for editing:



• 1–2 long form YouTube videos per week  

• 5–10 YouTube Shorts per week



The editing style should be clean, natural, and story-focused, not overly flashy.



Focus on:



• Strong pacing  

• Removing unnecessary moments  

• Adding simple text or graphics where helpful  

• Keeping viewer attention throughout the video  



For long form videos, the first 30 seconds are very important. We want strong hooks and highlights that make people want to keep watching.



--------------------------------------------------



Responsibilities



• Edit long form YouTube videos  

• Create short form clips from longer videos  

• Improve pacing and structure of videos  

• Add background music where appropriate  

• Add text or simple graphics when helpful  

• Export videos ready for YouTube upload  



Bonus if you can also:



• Suggest improvements to content structure  

• Help identify strong short-form moments from long videos  



--------------------------------------------------



What We Are Looking For



• Experience editing long form YouTube content  

• Excellent English comprehension  

• Strong attention to detail  

• Reliable and communicates clearly  

• Comfortable receiving feedback  



We are looking for someone who wants to help improve the videos and grow the channel, not just complete tasks.



--------------------------------------------------



Working With Charles



Charles believes business should treat people well and operate like a team.



The goal is to build something meaningful without sacrificing the people involved in the process.



Team members are encouraged to share ideas, challenge assumptions, and help improve the work.



--------------------------------------------------



Compensation



This is a part-time position.



Monthly compensation will be:



$300 – $500 per month depending on performance and results.



--------------------------------------------------



Test Edit



Applicants may be asked to complete a short test edit.



The footage will involve a travel style video showing moments from trips between the United States and Puerto Rico.



The goal of the edit will be to keep the video playful and natural while focusing on storytelling and retention.



The first 30 seconds should highlight exciting moments from the video to improve viewer retention.



--------------------------------------------------



How to Apply



Please include:



1. Links to 2–3 videos you have edited

2. What editing software you use

3. Your internet speed

4. Your experience editing YouTube videos

5. Confirm that you have strong English comprehension



Applications without video examples will not be considered.



To confirm you read this entire job post, start your application with the word "Corner".

title: Executive Assistant

title: Admin Assistant with JobTread Experience
description:
Virtual Admin Assistant

Type: Part-Time (Remote) 



Position Overview 



Position Title: Virtual Office Assistant 

Location: Remote (International - Different Time Zone PST) 

Employment Type: Part-time Virtual Assistant to start

Reporting To: Managing Director/ Site Manager





 Core Responsibilities 

1. PROJECT ADMINISTRATION & DOCUMENTATION 

- Owner Estimate Packet Creation 

   - Compile and organize comprehensive estimate packets for property owners 

   - Ensure all required documentation, permits, and specifications are included 

   - Format and brand all materials according to company standards 

   - Coordinate with estimating team to ensure accuracy and completeness 



- Contract Management & Welcome Packets 

   - Create and distribute welcome packets immediately upon contract signing 

   - Include all necessary project information, timelines, and contact details 

   - Set up client onboarding process and initial communication schedule 

   - Maintain contract database and ensure all signed documents are properly filed 



- Integrated Checklist Management 

   - Develop and maintain project checklists that integrate with takeoff software 

   - Create phase-specific checklists for different trades and project stages 

   - Monitor checklist completion and flag any delays or issues 

   - Generate progress reports based on checklist status 



 2. FINANCIAL MANAGEMENT & REPORTING 

- Insurance Tracking & Monthly Reports 

   - Maintain comprehensive insurance database for all projects and vendors 

   - Generate monthly insurance compliance reports 

   - Track policy expiration dates and coordinate renewals 

   - Ensure all subcontractors and vendors have current insurance certificates 

   - Flag any insurance gaps or compliance issues immediately 



- Accounts Management 

   - Process creditor invoices and obtain payment authorizations 

   - Run creditor direct credit schedules and ensure timely payments 

   - Follow up on outstanding debtor invoices and payment collection 

   - Maintain accurate financial records and filing systems 

   - Assist with budget reporting and cost center analysis 



3. ESTIMATING & TAKEOFF SUPPORT 

- Estimating Assistance 

   - Support estimating process by organizing and preparing takeoff materials 

   - Input standardized pricing and labor costs into estimating templates 

   - Create cost breakdowns that executives can review and finalize 

   - Maintain pricing databases and vendor cost information 

   - Generate preliminary estimates for executive review and adjustment 



- Takeoff Coordination 

   - Organize project plans and specifications for takeoff process 

   - Coordinate with takeoff software systems and input basic measurements 

   - Prepare takeoff summaries and material lists 

   - Track takeoff progress and ensure timely completion 



4. CLIENT COMMUNICATION & RELATIONSHIP MANAGEMENT 

- Weekly Client Updates 

   - Prepare and send weekly progress reports to all active clients 

   - Coordinate project photos and visual updates 

   - Manage client inquiries and route to appropriate tea
mbers 

   - Maintain client database with updated contact information and preferences 



- Customer Service 

   - Handle incoming calls and
s during overlapping business hours 

   - Take detailed messages and ensure timely follow-up 

   - Manage appointment scheduling and calendar coordination 

   - Process change orders and client requests 



5. PROJECT COORDINATION & QUALITY CONTROL 

- Quality Control Documentation 

   - Maintain and update quality control forms for each trade 

   - Create inspection checklists and documentation templates 

   - Track quality issues and coordinate resolution 

   - Generate quality reports and trend analysis 



- Vendor & Shipping Coordination 

   - Obtain shipping quotes and coordinate delivery schedules 

   - Confirm orders and delivery addresses 

   - Track shipments and manage delivery logistics 

   - Maintain vendor performance records 



Time Zone Considerations & Communication Protocols 

Working Hours Coordination 

- Overlap Hours: Establish 2-3 hours of overlapping business hours for urgent communications 

- Daily Check-ins: Morning briefing (your evening) and end-of-day summary (your morning) 

- Emergency Contact: Provide emergency contact protocol for urgent project issues 



Communication Tools & Systems 

- Primary Communication: Video conferencing for daily check-ins 

- Project Management: Shared project management software with real-time updates 

- File Sharing: Cloud-based systems for document access and collaboration 

- Instant Messaging: For quick questions and status updates during overlap hours 



Required Skills & Qualifications 

Technical Skills 

- Proficiency in Job Tread construction/project management software 

 (Essential- minimum 1 yr experience)

- Advanced Microsoft Office Suite and Google Workspace 

- Experience with CRM systems and database management 

- Basic understanding of construction processes and terminology 

- Google Sheets / Excel (Essential- 2 yrs experience) 

- Drive/Dropbox File Management 

- Clear written and verbal English 

- Strong attention to detail and accuracy 



Professional Skills 

- Excellent written and verbal English communication 

- Strong organizational and time management abilities 

- Attention to detail and quality control mindset 

- Customer service excellence 

- Financial record keeping and basic accounting principles 



Personal Attributes 

- Self-motivated and able to work independently 

- Reliable internet connection and professional home office setup 

- Flexible with time zones and urgent project needs 

- Professional demeanor for client interactions 

- Trustworthy with confidential company and client information 



Performance Metrics & Expectations 

Quality Standards 

- 99 percentage accuracy in documentation and reporting 

- 24-hour response time to non-urgent communications 

- 2-hour response time during overlapping business hours 

- Monthly insurance compliance reports with zero gaps 

- Weekly client communication completion rate of 100% 



Growth Objectives 

- Develop expertise in company-specific software and processes within 90 days 

- Establish efficient workflows that reduce executive administrative burden 

- Build strong vendor and client relationships that support business growth 

- Continuously improve processes and identify efficiency opportunities 



READY TO APPLY?

Don't just send a resume—tell us why you’re the organized "Super-star" we’re looking for!



Message your application with the subject line “Meet [First and Last Name], Your New Admin Assistant”. Include why you’re the best candidate, years using JobTread, years in construction office, and the code word “Super-Star” in the body of the message. Attach a video with you telling us all this. Can’t wait to virtually e-meet you!

title: USA SALES BOOKING AGENT FOR EST CALLING TIMES 3/9
description:
USD $400-$500 starting salary per month plus commission of 1% of the the complete closing of the sale (average sale is $2000), paid on the 1st and 15th of every month(PST). We book an average of 10-20 shows per month.

If I need to close the sale completely, then you will get .5% commission for that lead. Commisions will be paid after the event takes place during that scheduled pay period.



PLEASE REVIEW MY MALE DANCE TOURING BUSINESS, 
 and if this is of interest PLEASE ANSWER MY 4 QUESTIONS below.



You MUST ANSWER the 4 questions in order to be considered.



QUESTION 1: WHAT IS YOUR ENGLISH SPEAKING CAPABILITY?

We are looking for people that have an english speaking capability on a scale of 1-10.

YOU MUST BE BETWEEN 9-10.

AGAIN, WHAT IS YOUR ENGLISH SPEAKING CAPABILITY?



QUESTION 2: DID YOU REVIEW THE WEBSITE ABOVE? You will be asked questions about our business.



Initial training/onboarding period (first 2 weeks):

To help you ease into the role and allow us to assess how we work together, we’ll start you at half the regular hours as follows:



Tuesday to Saturday: 4:00 AM – 8:00 AM PHT

Corresponding to 3:00 PM – 7:00 PM EST (Mon–Fri)

Sunday: 7:00 AM – 10:00 AM PHT

Corresponding to 6:00 PM – 9:00 PM EST (Sat)



After the 2-week period, assuming everything goes well, you’ll transition to the full-time schedule outlined below.



Full-time schedule (after the initial period):

Tuesday to Saturday: 12:00 AM – 8:00 AM PHT

Sunday: 4:00 AM – 10:00 AM PHT



This corresponds to the following times in US Eastern Standard Time (EST):

Monday to Friday: 11:00 AM – 7:00 PM EST

Saturday: 3:00 PM – 9:00 PM EST



QUESTION 3: Are you good with these hours?



I am looking for a long term, full time booking agent that will book our shows at bars, nightclubs and casinos in different states. You will gather leads by google searching for bars and nightclubs



Our workflow relies heavily on Google Workspace tools:

Google Sheets is used daily as a shared tracker for gathering and managing leads (bars/nightclubs we’re researching/touring), including columns for names, addresses, contacts, notes, status, etc.

We also use Google Docs for contracts, Google Drive for organizing and searching files, and Google Calendar for scheduling.

No advanced expertise is required—just solid familiarity so you can jump in quickly and keep things organized.



QUESTION 4: Do you have solid familiarity with Google Workspace tools?



We will train you with our sales script.  

Must have a laptop or desktop AND preferably an IPHONE with Icloud calendar. BUT an android will do. Also MUST have a headset WITH NOISE CANCELLATION.



GOOD LUCK!

title: Customer Service Manager
description:
Department: Customer Experience

Reports To: Chief Operating Officer (COO)

Location: Remote – Philippines (HKT business hours, 9AM–5PM)

Type: Full-Time Contractor

Compensation: $1,500–$3,000 USD/month (commensurate with experience)



About SAN Sound

SAN Sound is a Hong Kong-based audio technology company specializing in premium gaming audio products. With nearly two decades of expertise and an expanding global footprint across Asia and beyond, we’re scaling from product-market fit into aggressive growth. Our products—including the Hardwire gaming earbuds and SANWEAR-GT wireless earbuds—are built for gamers who demand exceptional audio quality and comfort. We’re a lean, fast-moving team that punches well above its weight.

The Role

We’re looking for a Customer Experience Manager to take full, end-to-end ownership of customer support at SAN Sound. This is not a ticket-answering role—this is a department-building role. You will be the first dedicated hire in this function and will be responsible for architecting, executing, and scaling our entire customer experience operation from the ground up.

In the early days, you’ll be hands-on—handling all inbound customer inquiries, building AI-powered response systems, creating templates, and establishing the processes and data infrastructure that will allow us to scale. As the business grows, you’ll hire and manage a team beneath you. You’ll work closely with our AI system developers and communications team (copywriting and product tech) to build intelligent, seamless support across
, website, and potentially voice channels.

The right person for this role has built a CS department before, thinks strategically about customer experience as a competitive advantage, and is energized by the challenge of building infrastructure that can handle 10x growth.

title: Bookkeeper with Job Tread Experience
description:
Virtual Assistant Bookkeeper Role Scope 

Type: Part-Time (Remote) 



Purpose 

To manage all daily financial transactions, ensure accurate and timely bookkeeping in QuickBooks, and maintain complete visibility of cash flow, accounts receivable (AR), and accounts payable (AP). The VA Bookkeeper is responsible for keeping the company’s financial data clean, current, and reliable for decision-making. 



----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------



Primary Objectives 

1. Keep QuickBooks 100% up-to-date with weekly reconciliation of all accounts. 

2. Ensure invoices and payments are processed accurately and on schedule. 

3. Provide clear reporting on AR, AP, and cash flow weekly. 

4. Support the owner in maintaining financial visibility, forecasting, and compliance. 



----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------



Key Responsibilities 

1. Accounts Payable (AP) 

- Receive, review, and enter all supplier/subcontractor invoices into QuickBooks under correct GL accounts and jobs. 

- Obtain approval from the Owner/Project Manager before processing payments. 

- Maintain a creditors direct credit schedule and prepare payment batches weekly. 

- Ensure all credit card payments and director personal accounts are paid and reconciled monthly. 

- File and organize digital copies of invoices and receipts in a shared drive (Google Drive/Dropbox). 

- Track and report on upcoming payables and due dates each week. 

- Flag any discrepancies, duplicates, or missing invoices for resolution. 



----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

2. Accounts Receivable (AR)

- Generate and send client invoices per contract terms (progress draws, deposits, variations). 

- Record all payments received into QuickBooks and reconcile with bank deposits. 

- Follow up on overdue invoices via
 and phone calls; document all communications. 

- Maintain and share a Weekly AR Aging Report, listing any unpaid balances and collection status. 

- Coordinate with the Owner/PM to escalate overdue accounts or set up payment plans if needed. 



----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------



3. Banking & Reconciliation 

- Reconcile all bank accounts and credit cards weekly in QuickBooks. 

- Match transactions to invoices, bills, and receipts. 

- Identify and investigate any unmatched or unclear transactions. 

- Maintain Petty Cash and Director Loan accounts accurately. 



----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------



4. Reporting & Visibility 

- Prepare and send Weekly Financial Snapshot including: ? AR Summary (total due, overdue list) 

- AP Summary (total owing, upcoming payments) 

- Bank Balances 

- Credit Card Balances 

- Assist in preparing Monthly P&L and Balance Sheet reports. 

- Flag cash flow concerns early (e.g. upcoming payables exceed expected receivables). 

- Update 12-Month Rolling P&L if provided with template (Fathom-ready). 



----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------



5. Payroll & Compliance Support (Optional if applicable) 

- Collect and verify employee/subcontractor timesheets (if using TSheets or similar). 

- Submit payroll data to CPA/payroll provider. 

- File and store T4s, 1099s, W9s, or equivalent documentation. 

- Track and remit sales tax (GST/HST) and ensure timely filing. 



----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------



6. Systems & Record-Keeping 

- Maintain organized folders for invoices, receipts, bank statements, and reports. 

- Use naming conventions and shared folders for visibility. 

- Keep QuickBooks chart of accounts aligned with TPB Financial Model (COGS vs Overheads). 

- Support setup of job costing and class tracking per project. 



----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------



7. Communication & Collaboration 

- Attend a weekly check-in call (15–30 min) with the Owner. 

- Update a shared Finance Tracker or Dashboard. 

- Communicate proactively if missing information is required (receipts, job codes, approvals). 

- Respond to messages and requests within 24 business hours. 



----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

WEEKLY RHYTHM

Day  Task 

Monday  Reconcile bank accounts, update AR/AP, send weekly financial snapshot 

Wednesday  Follow up on overdue invoices; schedule payments 

Friday  Review new bills, receipts, credit cards, and ensure QuickBooks is 100% current 



----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------



Key Performance Indicators (KPIs) 

- 100% QuickBooks accuracy (no unreconciled transactions weekly) 

- AR follow-ups completed weekly 

- All invoices entered and filed within 48 hrs of receipt 

- Weekly Financial Snapshot delivered by Monday COB 

- All credit cards and accounts reconciled monthly 



----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------



Time Zone Considerations & Communication Protocols 

Working Hours Coordination 

- Overlap Hours: Establish 2 hours of overlapping business hours for urgent communications 

- Daily Check-ins: Morning briefing (your evening) and end-of-day summary (your morning) 

- Emergency Contact: Provide emergency contact protocol for urgent project issues 



Communication Tools & Systems 

- Primary Communication: Video conferencing for daily check-ins 

- Project Management: Shared project management software with real-time updates 

- File Sharing: Cloud-based systems for document access and collaboration 

- Instant Messaging: For quick questions and status updates during overlap hours 





Performance Metrics & Expectations 

Quality Standards 

- 99% accuracy in documentation and reporting 

- 24-hour response time to non-urgent communications 

- 2-hour response time during overlapping business hours 

- Weekly client communication completion rate of 100% 



Growth Objectives 

- Develop expertise in company-specific software and processes within 90 days 

- Establish efficient workflows that reduce executive administrative burden 

- Build strong vendor and team relationships that support business growth 

- Continuously improve processes and identify efficiency opportunities 



Skills & Software 

- QuickBooks Online (Essential- 2 yrs experience) 

- Job Tread (Essential- 1 yr experience. Preferred QuickBooks Online integration)

- Google Sheets / Excel (Essential- 2 yrs experience) 

- Drive/Dropbox File Management 

- Clear written and verbal English 

- Strong attention to detail and accuracy 



READY TO APPLY?

Don't just send a resume—tell us why you’re the organized "Super-star" we’re looking for!



Message your application with the subject line “Meet [First and Last Name], Your New Bookkeeper”. Include why you’re the best candidate, years using JobTread, years in construction finance, and the code word “Super-Star” in the body of the message.

title: Performance Marketing Manager (Paid Media – Google, Bing, Meta)
description:
We are hiring a Performance Marketing Manager to own and optimize paid media performance across multiple brands and verticals. This role is designed for someone who enjoys being deep in the data, moving fast, and solving problems before they impact revenue.



You’ll be responsible for campaign execution, performance monitoring, troubleshooting, and continuous optimization—working closely with leadership to scale what’s working and fix what isn’t.



Key Responsibilities



• Build and manage paid media campaigns across Google Ads, Bing, and

• Monitor daily performance metrics including spend, pacing, ROI, and efficiency

• Optimize bids, budgets, targeting, and campaign structure

• Analyze search terms to maintain intent alignment

• Own tracking accuracy, conversion flow, and landing page QA

• Identify and escalate issues related to promos, tracking, or data integrity

title: AI Automation & Workflow Specialist (Vapi.ai + n8n, others)
description:
I am the owner of a last-mile delivery business in Canada and am launching an AI Automation Agency (AAA). I am looking for a technically proficient Automation Specialist to build and manage AI-driven communication and lead generation systems. Your primary focus will be integrating Vapi.ai (Voice AI) with 
 (Workflows) and various APIs to automate customer interactions.



You will start by setting up an AI Dispatcher for my delivery business. The goal is to allow patients to call in, provide their phone number or address, and have the AI retrieve real-time delivery status from our Wodely software via API.



Key Responsibilities:



Configure and optimize Vapi.ai assistants (System prompts, voice selection, and latency tuning).



Build complex automation workflows in 
 (using Webhooks, HTTP Requests, and JSON transformations).



Connect AI assistants to third-party APIs (CRMs, scheduling software, and delivery platforms).



Troubleshoot and refine "Tool Calling" to ensure the AI provides accurate, real-time data to callers.



Document workflows so they can be replicated for future clients (e.g., dental offices, clinics).



Required Technical Skills:



Proven experience with n8n or 
.



Experience setting up Vapi.ai or Retell AI.



Strong understanding of REST APIs, Webhooks, and JSON.



Ability to write basic JavaScript for data manipulation within n8n.



Familiarity with Twilio or similar VoIP providers.



Qualifications:



Direct & Practical: You focus on building things that work reliably.



Problem Solver: You don't wait for instructions when an API returns an error; you find the fix.



Communicator: You can explain technical setups clearly and concisely.



How to Apply:

Please send a brief message outlining:



A specific example of an automation you built using n8n or 
.



Your experience (if any) with Vapi.ai or other Voice AI tools.



Confirm you are comfortable working with API documentation (like Wodely, or pharmacy and dental CRMs).

title: 3D Printing File Prep Specialist — Splash N Color
description:
What You'll Do



You'll be responsible for preparing production-ready 3D print files at high volume for our team.



Daily work (80%):

• Open STL/3MF files from our product queue

• Set up proper print settings in Bambu Studio (orientation, supports, infill, walls)

• Export production-ready 3MF files

• Mark items complete in our system

• Target: 50-75 files per day



File hunting (20%):

• Find matching STL files on Thingiverse, Printables, Makerworld, Thangs, and MyMiniFactory when a product needs an exact file match

• Search by keyword, image, or product type

• Verify files are open-source licensed and printable

• Flag items that need custom design vs. existing files



Requirements



Must have:

• Experience with FDM 3D printing (personal or professional)

• Proficiency in Bambu Studio (required)

• Understanding of print orientation and why it matters (layer lines, strength, aesthetics)

• Understanding of support material — when it's needed, how to minimize it

• Knowledge of common materials (PLA, ABS, PETG, TPU)

• Reliable internet + computer that can run Bambu Studio

• Available full-time (40 hrs/week)



Nice to have:

• Own 3D printer for test prints on complex items

• Experience browsing and downloading from Thingiverse, Printables, Makerworld, and Thangs

• Familiarity with wall thickness, infill patterns, and bridging

• Experience with multi-piece assemblies or hardware inserts



What We Offer:

• Steady, consistent work with a high-performance team

• Clear daily targets and a straightforward workflow

• Growth opportunity as we scale



How to Apply:

Send a 2-minute video explaining why you're the perfect candidate for this position.

 to:

title: Full-Time Video Editor and Thumbnail Designer / VA
description:
We are seeking a skilled and proactive Virtual Assistant who excels in video editing, social media management, and graphic design. The ideal candidate will help transform our daily one-hour video sessions into concise and engaging 5-8 minute highlight reels, while also managing end-of-day updates on
 and Instagram. Additionally, this role requires proficiency in creating visually appealing content using Canva and Photoshop, with an eye for trending audio, descriptions, and thumbnails for Instagram Reels.



PLEASE SEND YOUR PAST VIDEO EDITIS and YOUTUBE THUMBNAILS in your portfolio



Key Responsibilities:



YOUTUBE THUMBNAIL CREATION

title: Senior Residential Appraisal Report Writer/Manager
description:
I run a residential appraisal firm located in the Bay Area, California, and am looking for an experienced residential appraisal writer to join the team. The team includes 3 Bay Area appraisers and 6 employees in the Philippines. We are rapidly growing and are looking for an experienced and senior level residential report writer/manager to join our team.



Your role will be to do the following:

1. Complete the entire residential appraisal report after the appraiser has provided you with the inspection information and comparables. This includes all the commentary, adjustments, and all other parts of the report. We will provide training on how we specifically expect the commentary and adjustments based on our own personal preferences, however you are expected to already have this type of experience working for other appraisers.

2. Review the work of other report writers on our team, provide feedback, and help train newer report writers on our team. You are expected to act as the "last line of defense" of the report before it is sent to the appraiser for their final review before submission. As such, we expect you to be able to review the report, find any issues, correct these issues, and then send to the appraiser a near perfect report.



To be considered for this role, you must meet the following criteria:

1. You have worked for a US residential appraiser

2. You have experience performing data entry for residential properties in the US

3. You have experience creating the 1004MC, selecting comparables, drawing the sketch, labeling photos, making adjustments to the sales grid, and making commentary for the addendum.

4. Ideally, you have experience managing other appraisal report writers.



We are flexible with your work hours and offer Philippine daytime shift hours for your convenience. We would like to start part time but then transition to full time, so ideally you are open to working full time exclusively with us if its a mutual fit.



To be considered for this position, you must do the following in your application message (failure to do all of the following will result in your application being ignored):

1. How many years have you worked for a US residential appraiser? What tasks did you perform for them?

2. How many hours does it take you to complete one report? What parts of the report do you complete?

3. Do you have experience writing commentary for the addendum, drawing the sketch, labeling photos, and creating the 1004MC? Please indicate which ones you have experience with, and how many years for each.

4. Please provide a sample of at least one appraisal report you have fully completed. You can redact any private information from the report. Please let me know what parts exactly you completed on this report(s).

5. Provide a publicly accessible link to your resume.

6. Are you open to starting part time and then transitioning to full time? Once working full time with us, will you be working exclusively with us without any other jobs? When is the earliest you can begin working with us?

7. What are your preferred working hours?

8. Do you have experience managing other residential appraisal report writers? If so, please discuss in detail your job responsibilities.



Thank you, and I look forward to the opportunity to work together.

- Install the app (Google Play Store)

- Keep it running in the background

- Phone stays connected to the internet (20-24h/day)

- Occasionally complete short check-in/testing steps (to confirm stability + uptime)



Why it’s a good fit:

- No calls, no meetings

- Works alongside any VA/freelance job

- Setup once ? keep running long-term

- Great for anyone who wants a low-effort side gig



Requirements:

- Android device (phone or tablet)

- Stable internet

- Phone online most of the day (target: 20–24h/day uptime)

- Reliable/consistent (uptime matters)



? Please do NOT apply if:

- Your phone is only online a few hours/day

- You use airplane mode at night / regularly disconnect

- You only use iPhone/iPad



? If you can keep your phone online 20–24h/day consistently, you’ll do well here.



How to apply:

One application per person. If you’ve applied before, no need to submit again.





Fill out this short form (takes 2 minutes):

https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSeEZwrQ5fN6QeelzTM5OGsiJ26ALtXwZZKX1HFPc0HtQwkxvw/viewform?usp=header



If you qualify, I’ll send setup instructions and your access code.

title: Podcast Content Editor & Social Media Assistant (Part Time / Remote)
description:
Hello!



I run a growing podcast and live events platform called How You Find Your Voice (HYFYV).



The project explores creativity, identity, books, culture and women’s voices through thoughtful podcast conversations and live salon-style events.



I’m looking for a reliable, creative part-time assistant to help repurpose podcast content and support social media growth.



This is a part-time remote role (around 5–8 hours per week) and would suit someone who enjoys podcasts, storytelling and social media content creation.



The goal of the role is to help grow the podcast audience and social media following by turning long conversations into engaging short-form content.



Main Responsibilities

1. Podcast Content Repurposing



From each podcast episode you will:



• identify strong 
nts from the conversation

• create 5–10 short clips for social media

• add subtitles to clips

• format clips for Instagram Reels, TikTok and YouTube Shorts



2. Social Media Posting



You will:



• upload clips across platforms

• write clear captions based on the conversation

• schedule posts

• help maintain consistent posting across platforms



Platforms include:



• Instagram

• TikTok

• YouTube Shorts

• Pinterest (occasionally)



3. YouTube Podcast Uploads



You will help manage the YouTube channel by:



• uploading full podcast episodes

• writing simple titles and descriptions

• uploading thumbnails (created in Canva)



4. Website Support (Squarespace)



You will also help keep the website updated by:



• uploading podcast episodes to Squarespace

• formatting episode pages

• uploading transcripts

• adding event listings for live talks and salons

• occasionally updating basic website content



No coding required — just comfort using Squarespace.



Design & Templates



You will mainly be working with existing brand templates in Canva for social posts, thumbnails and graphics.



Your role will be to:



• use existing templates to create posts and graphics

• adapt templates for different platforms

• occasionally create simple new designs where needed



Maintaining a consistent visual style is important.



Tools



Experience with the following tools is strongly preferred:



• CapCut (for editing short video clips)

• Canva (for thumbnails and social graphics)

• Social media platforms (Instagram, TikTok, YouTube)

• Squarespace (helpful but not essential)



Hours



Approx 5–8 hours per week initially Flexible schedule.



Salary



$5–$7 per hour depending on experience



To Apply



Please include:



• a short introduction about yourself

• links to 2–3 short-form videos you have edited

• any experience with podcasts or social media content



Please also answer this question in your application:



What makes a good short clip from a long podcast conversation?



This helps me understand your editing instincts.



Please include the word VOICE in your application so I know you have read the full description.



Business / Contact Name



How You Find Your Voice

Jessie

title: Full-Time Video Editor — Direct Response Ads for Premium Skincare Brand (DTC/Ecommerce)
description:
About Us:



VEAUTY is a fast-growing premium skincare technology brand selling direct-to-consumer through our Shopify store. Our hero product, the VEAUTY Dot, is the world's only true home fractional RF device — used by 56,000+ customers and trusted by 150+ professional clinics worldwide. We're scaling aggressively through paid advertising on Meta, TikTok, Google/YouTube and need a dedicated video editor who lives and breathes performance creative.





The Role:



We're looking for a full-time, dedicated video editor who doesn't just edit — they understand WHY an ad converts. You'll be responsible for producing high-volume, high-converting video ad content for our direct-to-consumer skincare brand across Meta 
 & Instagram), TikTok, and Google/YouTube.

This is not a "make it look pretty" role. This is a performance marketing role where every frame, every cut, and every text overlay exists to stop the scroll, build belief, and drive purchases. You'll work closely with our marketing manager and UGC manager to turn raw footage, scripts, and creative briefs into ads that sell.



What You'll Do:



You'll produce 5 new video ad concepts per week, each with 4 variations (different hooks, CTAs, pacing, or formats) — totaling 20 deliverables per week. You'll edit UGC footage, product demos, testimonials, and screen recordings into direct-response video ads optimized for Meta, TikTok, and YouTube. You'll create scroll-stopping hooks in the first 1–3 seconds of every ad using proven direct-response patterns. You'll add motion graphics, text overlays, captions, transitions, and visual proof elements (before/afters, data callouts, review screenshots). You'll iterate on winning ads week over week — analyzing performance data (CTR, hook rate, hold rate, CPA, ROAS) and producing improved versions based on what the data tells you. You'll adapt content for different platforms and placements (9:16, 1:1, 16:9) and stay current with trending formats, styles, and hooks across TikTok and Instagram.



What We Need From You:



You must have 2+ years of experience editing direct-response / performance video ads for ecommerce or DTC brands, specifically for Meta, TikTok, and/or Google. You need strong proficiency in professional editing software — Adobe Premiere Pro, After Effects, DaVinci Resolve, or Final Cut Pro. Experience with CapCut for TikTok-native edits is a plus.

You must understand the psychology of a converting video ad — hooks, pattern interrupts, social proof stacking, urgency, and CTAs. You should know what a hook rate is, what thumbstop ratio means, and how to read basic ad metrics to inform your next round of creative. You need to be fast and efficient — producing polished 30–60 second ads in 2–4 hours, not 8.

Experience using AI tools in your workflow is highly valued — tools like ChatGPT/Claude for scripting, ElevenLabs for voiceovers, Runway or Kling for AI video, Midjourney for visuals, or Descript for captions and text-based editing.

Experience in the skincare, beauty, or health/wellness niche is a strong advantage but not required if your DTC ad portfolio is strong.



What Success Looks Like:

title: Full-Time UGC Manager — Creator Acquisition & Management for Premium Skincare Brand (DTC/Ecommerce)
description:
About Us:



VEAUTY is a fast-growing premium skincare technology brand selling direct-to-consumer through our Shopify store. Our hero product, the VEAUTY Dot, is the world's only true home fractional RF device — used by 56,000+ customers and trusted by 150+ professional clinics worldwide. We're scaling our content engine aggressively and need a dedicated UGC Manager to build and manage a constant pipeline of creators producing authentic, high-converting content for our brand.



The Role:



We're looking for a full-time, dedicated UGC Manager who can find, recruit, negotiate with, and manage UGC creators at scale. Your job is to keep a steady stream of fresh, authentic video and photo content flowing into our creative team — content that our video editors will then turn into high-performing ads across Meta, TikTok, and YouTube.

This isn't a "post on social media" role. This is a sourcing, outreach, negotiation, and project management role. You'll be the bridge between creators and our brand — ensuring we always have new faces, new angles, and new content to fuel our advertising. You'll work closely with our marketing manager on scripts, creative direction, hooks, and content style to ensure every piece of UGC aligns with what's working in our ads.



What You'll Do:



You'll source and recruit new UGC creators on an ongoing basis — our preferred model is gifted partnerships (sending free product in exchange for content), though you'll also manage paid creators when needed. You'll build and maintain a pipeline of active creators so we never run dry on fresh content. You'll handle all communication with creators — outreach, onboarding, briefing, follow-ups, and feedback. You'll write and send detailed creator briefs that include scripts, hooks, visual direction, dos and don'ts, and example videos so creators know exactly what we need. You'll coordinate with our marketing manager to align all briefs with current ad strategy, winning hooks, and performance data. You'll manage delivery timelines and hold creators accountable — ensuring content arrives on time and meets our quality standards. You'll provide constructive feedback when content doesn't match the brief, and manage revision requests without burning creator relationships. You'll negotiate fair rates with paid creators, always balancing quality with budget efficiency. You'll track everything — creator contacts, outreach status, delivery dates, content received, and performance — in an organized system.



What We Need From You:



You must have 1+ years of experience sourcing and managing UGC creators or influencer partnerships for ecommerce or DTC brands. You need proven experience with gifted/seeding campaigns — convincing creators to produce content in exchange for free product is a core skill for this role. You should be comfortable with cold outreach via DM and
, with a track record of getting responses and building creator relationships.



You must be highly organized — managing 10–30+ active creators simultaneously requires tight systems, follow-up discipline, and attention to detail. You need strong written communication skills — your outreach messages, briefs, and follow-ups need to be clear, professional, and persuasive.



You should understand what makes great UGC for direct-response advertising — this isn't about pretty content, it's about authentic content that converts. You need to know the difference between content that looks good on a feed and content that stops the scroll in a paid ad. Familiarity with TikTok, Instagram, and the broader creator landscape is essential. Experience using platforms like Billo, Insense, JoinBrands, or similar UGC marketplaces is a plus. Experience in the skincare, beauty, or health/wellness niche is a strong advantage.



What Success Looks Like:



In your first month, you'll have sourced and onboarded your first batch of creators, established your outreach and tracking systems, and delivered your first round of UGC content to our editing team. By month two, you'll have a steady pipeline producing new content weekly, with a mix of gifted and paid creators. By month three, you'll be proactively identifying creator styles and content angles that align with our best-performing ads — bringing ideas to the table, not just filling orders.

Our best UGC managers don't just find creators — they build relationships, understand what content drives results, and become the engine that keeps our creative team fed with fresh material.



The Terms:



This is a full-time, exclusive role at $1,000 USD/month. You will not be permitted to work for any other brands or clients while employed with us — we need your full focus and commitment. This is a long-term position with room for growth, increased responsibility, and additional compensation as the brand scales.

Working hours: 8 hours/day, Monday–Friday (flexible on timezone, but consistent availability is required).

You must have a reliable computer and stable internet connection for full-time remote work.

3 Key Skills Required



Creator Sourcing & Outreach — ability to find, approach, and recruit UGC creators through DMs,
, platforms, and communities, with a focus on gifted/seeding partnerships.

Project Management & Organization — managing multiple creators simultaneously with tight deadlines, tracking systems, and consistent follow-through to ensure content is delivered on time and to standard.

Creative Briefing & Communication — writing clear, detailed briefs that translate marketing strategy into creator-friendly direction, and providing constructive feedback that improves content quality without damaging relationships.



How to Apply:



Complete our application form here: 



Your application must include a link to your portfolio, LinkedIn, or any proof of previous UGC management work (case studies, campaign results, creator databases). Applications without proof of experience will not be considered.



We will review all applications and only contact shortlisted candidates. Please do not follow up — if you're selected, you'll hear from us.

title: Full-Time Operations Manager — Supply Chain, Fulfillment & Logistics for Premium Skincare Brand (DTC/Ecommerce)
description:
About Us:



VEAUTY is a fast-growing premium skincare technology brand selling direct-to-consumer through our Shopify store. Our hero product, the VEAUTY Dot, is the world's only true home fractional RF device — used by 56,000+ customers and trusted by 150+ professional clinics worldwide. We ship globally and are scaling rapidly. We need a dedicated Operations Manager to own our entire operational backbone — from supplier to customer's doorstep.



The Role:



We're looking for a full-time, dedicated Operations Manager who will be the single point of ownership for everything that happens behind the scenes at VEAUTY. You'll manage our supplier relationship, oversee inventory levels, coordinate fulfillment through our 3PL, resolve delivery issues, handle returns and chargebacks, and ensure every customer receives their order quickly, correctly, and cost-effectively.



This is not an assistant role. This is an ownership role. You'll be the person who ensures the operational engine of a scaling ecommerce brand runs without disruption. When a production batch is delayed, you solve it. When fulfillment costs creep up, you investigate and fix it. When we're planning a major sale, you prepare operations to handle 5x volume. You'll report directly to the founder and be trusted to manage operations independently.



What You'll Do:



You'll be the primary point of contact between VEAUTY and our supplier/manufacturer — managing communication, production timelines, quality control, reorders, and resolving any issues that arise. You'll monitor and maintain optimal inventory levels, forecasting demand based on sales data, marketing activity, and seasonal trends to prevent both stockouts and overstocking. You'll manage our 3PL relationship — ensuring orders are fulfilled accurately, shipped on time, and delivered to customers globally with duties and customs handled correctly. You'll oversee the full order lifecycle daily — from order placement through to delivery confirmation — monitoring for issues and resolving them proactively. You'll handle delivery issues including lost packages, delayed shipments, incorrect addresses, and damaged goods — resolving them efficiently while keeping customers satisfied and costs controlled. You'll manage our returns, refunds, and exchange processes, ensuring they run smoothly and that patterns in returns are flagged and addressed at the root cause. You'll handle chargebacks and payment disputes from a fulfillment perspective — gathering proof of delivery, coordinating with payment processors, and implementing preventative measures. You'll track and report on operational KPIs weekly — fulfillment rate, shipping speed, inventory turnover, stockout rate, return rate, cost per order, and customer satisfaction metrics. You'll prepare operations for high-volume periods (product launches, flash sales, Black Friday) — ensuring inventory, fulfillment capacity, and shipping logistics are ready to handle surges. You'll continuously identify opportunities to reduce costs, improve speed, and optimize the operational workflow.



What We Need From You:



You must have 2+ years of experience in ecommerce operations, ideally for a physical product DTC brand. Experience with Shopify from an operations perspective is strongly preferred — order management, inventory tracking, fulfillment settings, and apps. You need proven experience managing supplier or manufacturer relationships, including international suppliers if applicable. Experience working with 3PL providers (ShipBob, ShipStation, Deliverr, or similar) is essential.



You must be highly organized and detail-oriented — operations management requires daily monitoring, tight systems, and zero tolerance for things falling through the cracks. You need strong communication skills — you'll be coordinating with suppliers (potentially across timezones and language barriers), our 3PL, and our internal team. You should be proficient with spreadsheets (Google Sheets or Excel) for tracking, reporting, and forecasting — formulas, pivot tables, and basic dashboards are expected.



You must be a problem solver by nature. Operations is about anticipating issues before they become crises and resolving them calmly when they do. You should understand international shipping, customs, and duties — VEAUTY ships globally and our customers expect a smooth experience regardless of location.



Experience in skincare, beauty, health/wellness, or consumer electronics operations is a strong advantage. Experience with customer service platforms (Gorgias, Zendesk, Freshdesk) is a plus. Familiarity with project management tools (Notion, Trello, Asana, 
) is a plus.



What Success Looks Like:



In your first month, you'll have fully mapped our operational workflow — from supplier to customer — and taken ownership of daily order monitoring, inventory tracking, and fulfillment oversight. By month two, you'll have established a weekly KPI reporting cadence, identified at least 2–3 operational improvements, and built a reliable system for supplier communication and reorder management. By month three, you'll be running operations independently — proactively managing inventory forecasts, optimizing fulfillment costs, resolving issues before they reach the founder, and preparing operational plans for upcoming sales and launches.



Our best operations managers don't wait for problems to be reported — they build systems that catch issues early, communicate clearly, and treat every operational detail as if it directly affects the customer experience, because it does.



The Terms:



This is a full-time, exclusive role at $1,000 USD/month. You will not be permitted to work for any other brands or clients while employed with us — we need your full focus and commitment. This is a long-term position with room for growth, increased responsibility, and additional compensation as the brand scales.



Working hours: 8 hours/day, Monday–Friday (flexible on timezone, but consistent availability is required).

You must have a reliable computer and stable internet connection for full-time remote work.



How to Apply:



Complete our application form here: 



Your application must include a link to your LinkedIn profile or CV/resume. Applications without proof of relevant experience will not be considered.



We will review all applications and only contact shortlisted candidates. Please do not follow up — if you're selected, you'll hear from us.

title: Short Form Video Editor for Paid Ads
description:
Job Description



We are seeking a highly skilled and detail-oriented Short-Form Video Editor to join our marketing team. The successful candidate will be responsible for editing short-form video content for our paid advertising campaigns. This role requires a meticulous editor who can replicate our established video templates with precision and consistency. The ideal candidate has a proven track record of editing high-performing paid ads and understands the nuances of creating content that converts.



Responsibilities



•

Edit short-form video content for various social media platforms, including but not limited to TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts.



•

Strictly adhere to our established video editing templates, ensuring that the pacing, transitions, captions, and overall style are identical to the provided examples.



•

Collaborate with the marketing team to understand campaign goals and target audience.



•

Manage and organize a high volume of video assets.



•

Deliver high-quality edited videos within tight deadlines.



Requirements



•

Proven experience as a video editor, with a strong portfolio of short-form video content.



•

Demonstrable experience in editing paid ads for social media platforms.



•

Proficient in video editing software (e.g., Adobe Premiere Pro, Final Cut Pro, or similar).



•

Exceptional attention to detail and the ability to follow instructions precisely.



•

Excellent time management and organizational skills.



•

Ability to work independently and as part of a team.



Standard Operating Procedure (SOP) for Video Editing



Objective: To ensure all video ads are consistent in style, pacing, and quality, adhering strictly to our proven templates.



Core Principle: Replication, not creation. Your primary role is to replicate the provided video examples with new footage and assets. No creative deviation is permitted.



Step-by-Step Editing Process



1.

Asset Review: Before starting any edit, thoroughly review the provided video example and all new assets (raw footage, images, music, etc.).



2.

Pacing and Cuts: Match the timing of each cut and scene transition exactly to the example video. The rhythm and flow of the video must be identical.



3.

Transitions: Use the same transitions as demonstrated in the example. Do not introduce new or different transition effects.



4.

Captions and Text Overlays: Replicate the caption style, font, size, color, and placement precisely. All text on screen must match the template's typography and animation.



5.

Color Grading and Effects: Apply the same color correction, filters, and effects as the example video to maintain a consistent brand aesthetic.



6.

Audio: Use the provided audio tracks and ensure the audio levels and mixing are consistent with the example.



7.

Quality Control: Before submitting your work, conduct a side-by-side comparison of your edited video and the example to ensure they are indistinguishable in style and execution.



Note: We value precision and consistency above all else. Your ability to follow these instructions without deviation is the most critical aspect of this role. We are looking for an editor who can execute a proven formula, not an artist who wants to experiment.









Important Note: Urgency and Long-Term Opportunity



This first batch is time-sensitive. We need all edited videos from the initial batch completed and ready to launch within 2 to 3 days of starting — sooner is strongly preferred. Please only apply if you are available immediately and can commit to this turnaround. We will not be able to accommodate candidates who cannot meet this deadline.



If you deliver high-quality work on the first batch and demonstrate that you can follow our SOP to the standard outlined above, there is a strong opportunity to continue working with us on an ongoing, long-term basis. We are looking to build a reliable relationship with the right editor, and this first project is your chance to prove you are that person.

nt.



Your Mission

You will be the digital face of our brand. Your goal is to build a community of homeowners, design enthusiasts, and local partners by creating content that is as polished as our finished projects.



Key Responsibilities

Content Creation: Capture high-quality photo and video (Reels/TikToks) on-site. You aren't afraid to put on a hard hat and boots to get the perfect shot of a tile installation or a demolition day.



Storytelling: Turn a blueprint into a narrative. Highlight our team’s expertise, our clients' excitement, and the "why" behind our design choices.



Platform Management: Manage and grow our presence on Instagram,
, Pinterest, and LinkedIn.



Community Engagement: Respond to comments/DMs, engage with local realtors and interior designers, and keep the conversation going.



Paid Social: (Optional/Bonus) Manage small-scale ad budgets to target local homeowners looking to renovate.



What You Bring to the Job site

An Eye for Design: You know how to frame a shot to make a small bathroom look like a spa.



Platform Expertise: You stay ahead of trends and know which audio is about to go viral.



Independence: You can navigate an active construction site safely and professionally.



Communication: You write captions that are professional yet approachable—avoiding jargon while highlighting quality.



Requirements

2+ years of experience in social media management (Home Services, Real Estate, or Interior Design experience is a massive plus).



A strong portfolio of short-form video content (Reels/TikTok).



How to Apply: Send us your resume and a link to your portfolio or a social account you’ve managed

title: Growth Specialist
description:
We’re hiring a Growth Specialist who can write, plan, and execute marketing tasks for multiple clients.



This is not a strategy-only role. You will be involved across the full scope of each campaign. That includes writing content, designing landing pages (we teach you how), improving ad and SEO performance, and keeping everything on track.



You will work directly with clients, manage their work in the Staff app, and help deliver clear outcomes each week. We also invest heavily in training. You will get access to world-class marketing education, regular coaching, and hands-on support so you can keep getting better.



If you like fast-moving work, solving real problems, and staying organised across multiple accounts, this might suit you.

title: Cold Caller/Lead Generator
description:
Hello,



Cold Calling &
 Outreach Lead Generator – Calieluxe Cleaners



Calieluxe Cleaners is seeking a motivated Cold Calling &
 Outreach Lead Generator to help grow our commercial cleaning client base. In this role, you will contact businesses through phone calls and
 outreach to introduce our services and generate qualified leads for our sales team.



Responsibilities:

* Send targeted
 outreach to potential commercial clients

s, and leads

 when needed

s
