title: AMAZON OPERATION/ACCOUNT MANAGER
description:
AMAZON OPERATION MANAGER



Position: Amazon Operations Manager / Amazon Expert

Type: Full-Time, Hybrid (Philippines / Preferably Metro Manila or nearby)

Salary: PHP 45,000 – 75,000 / month

Schedule: Flexible Hybrid daytime PH hours



About our Company



We are a Canadian corporation specialized in international trade and e-commerce. We are operating in the global market, and we want to utilize global ecommerce platforms such as Amazon to develop new brands and products and reach out to customers across globe. Our company values professionalism, data-driven decision-making, and long-term partnerships. We are establishing a strong, world-class team in the Philippines.

We're seeking an Amazon Operation Manager who will implement effective growth strategies, help managing day-to-day operations, hiring staff and ensure optimal ROAS (Return on Ad Spend) and profitability.



Role Summary



As the Amazon Operation Manager, you will oversee one or more Amazon seller/vendor accounts, be responsible for strategic planning, day-to-day operations, campaign management, listing optimization, inventory & health monitoring, performance reporting and delivering growth targets. You’ll assist in hiring a Manila based team (PPC specialists, graphic designers, copy/content, operations, data analysts) as contractors or part-time staff.



Key Responsibilities



- Own the Amazon account(s): day-to-day operations, growth roadmap, strategic planning.

- Develop and execute account growth strategy: new product launches, listing optimization (titles, bullets, A+ content), SEO/organic traffic, sponsored ads (Sponsored Products/Brands/Display), DSP where applicable.

- Assist in hiring new tea
mbers in coordination with the owners: you will be the point of contact for the company for the Manila team and will assist in hiring part-time or full-time staff/contractors, freelancers to complete the tasks based on demand.

- Manage other tea
mbers and monitor KPIs: manage and monitor other tea
mbers and coordinate their efforts to achieve the desired outcomes. creative team for imagery/video, buyer for product research, procurement, and inventory planning, PPC specialist for running and optimizing variety of ads campaigns.

- Plan, run, and optimize PPC campaigns in coordination with the PPC specialist: structure, keyword research, match types, negative keyword strategy, bid optimization, budget allocation, ROI/ROAS modelling.

- Monitor and optimize key performance metrics: ACoS (Advertising Cost of Sales), TACoS (Total Advertising Cost of Sales), ROAS, ad conversion rate, organic sales lift, margin impact.

- Provide detailed reports and insights to: weekly/monthly performance review, actionable recommendations, forecast next period.

- Stay up to date with Amazon policy changes, ad product updates, algorithm changes, marketplace shifts and emerging best practices.

- Identify scaling opportunities while ensuring profitability: when to scale spend, when to pull back, how to optimize conversion vs traffic.

- Serve as an account leader for the company: manage expectations, communicate clearly, act proactively on issues (listing suppressions, account health, negative reviews).

- Work with automation/data tools and dashboards: pull/clean data, identify waste/spend inefficiencies, drive process improvement (e.g., by leveraging no-code automations, data pipelines).



Qualifications



- 2+ years of experience managing Amazon seller or vendor accounts (or equivalent e-commerce marketplace experience).

- Strong understanding of Amazon advertising ecosystem: Sponsored Products/Brands/Display, DSP, auto vs manual campaigns, bidding strategies, search term reports.

- Proven ability to improve ROAS/ACoS and profitability for Amazon accounts.

- Excellent analytical skills: ability to interpret data, create actionable insights, optimize campaigns based on performance.

- Experience with Amazon listing optimization: keyword research, SEO, copywriting (titles/bullets/A+), conversion-rate focus.

- Familiarity with Amazon account health, operations, inventory forecasting, and marketplace best practices.

- Comfortable being company-facing: strong communication, presentation skills, managing expectations, building trust. You will be communicating directly with the owners of the company.

- Self-starter, organized, able to manage multiple brands, accounts and projects concurrently.

- Advanced Excel / Google Sheets skills; experience with dashboards / BI tools a plus.

- Bonus: experience with automation tools, no-code platforms, AI-driven optimization (a growing focus).



KPIs / Success Measures



- Achieving or exceeding client ROAS/ACoS targets.

- Improvement in organic sales and overall account profitability.

- Reduction in wasted ad spending (negative keywords, inefficient campaigns).

- Client satisfaction and retention (renewals, upsells).

- Timely reporting and proactive account strategy updates.

- Efficient cross-team collaboration and issue resolution (listing suppressions, inventory, reviews, etc.).



What We Offer



- Working directly for a Canadian company with global opportunities

- Collaborative, high-performance environment.

- Competitive salary + performance bonus (tied to KPIs).

- Professional growth path: potentially moving into higher roles and moving to other countries.

- Hybrid opportunity (Mandaluyong City and remotely)

title: People Manager
description:
Chilli Pilates is one of the UK’s fastest-growing reformer Pilates studio groups. With 13 studios today and the 14th opening in March 2026, we are now hiring a People Manager to help lead and support our instructor team as we scale.



This is a fully remote role and we welcome applicants based outside the UK, provided you can maintain regular overlap with UK working hours (20hrs minimum per week overlap).



The Role:



The People Manager will play a key role in supporting and developing our instructor team. You will work closely with the Chief People Officer to ensure instructors feel supported, performance standards remain high, and the culture that has made Chilli Pilates successful continues to thrive as the business grows.



You will be the first point of contact for line management for the instuctor team. You will lead regular 1-1 meetings via Google Meet with instructors, help resolve issues early, support career development, and ensure our people processes run consistently across the organisation. You will refer to an Instructor dashboard in order to prep for the meeting and produce notes and follow up any actions after the meeting.



This role is ideal for someone who enjoys coaching people, building structure, and helping teams perform at their best.



What You’ll Do

- People Leadership

- Manage and support a group of Pilates instructors across multiple studios

- Run regular 1:1 meetings focused on wellbeing, performance and development

- Be the first point of line manager contact for instructors

- Provide coaching and support to help instructors succeed



Performance & Quality

- Monitor instructor performance and identify areas for improvement

- Address issues early and support constructive improvement plans

- Help maintain high standards of teaching and professionalism across the network



Team Engagement

- Build strong relationships with instructors across the organisation

- Support initiatives that strengthen culture and collaboration

- Ensure instructors feel heard, supported, and connected to the business



People Processes

- Maintain clear records of meetings and development plans

- Support onboarding and integration of new instructors as the business grows

- Help improve systems and processes that support a growing team



What We’re Looking For:



Essential

- Experience managing or supervising teams

- Strong coaching and people-development skills

- Excellent communication and relationship-building ability, strong written and spoken English

- Highly organised with strong attention to detail

- Comfortable working remotely and managing relationships through video calls



Desirable

- Experience in fitness, wellness, hospitality or customer-facing service industries

- Experience supporting distributed or remote teams

- Experience working in fast-growing businesses



Why Join Chilli Pilates?

- Join a business entering a major growth phase

- Play a key role in shaping the company’s people leadership structure

- Work with a supportive senior leadership team

- Fully remote role with flexible location

- Opportunity to grow as the company expands



Location: Remote (international candidates welcome)

Working pattern: Remote with regular overlap with UK working hours

title: Patient Care Coordinator
description:
We are an innovative health tech company specializing in the development of a cutting-edge nutrition app. Our app leverages personalized data, including physical conditions, genetic components, and more to create tailored diets, nutritional plans, and recipes. Designed to support patients at the highest level of care, our platform empowers users to achieve optimal health outcomes through science-backed personalization.



We’re seeking a proactive and motivated Patient Care Coordinator to join our team urgently. In this key position, you’ll play a vital role in ensuring the success of our users and patients by coordinating their journey through our app. If you’re someone who takes initiative, thrives in a fast-paced environment, and is passionate about health and technology, this is your opportunity to make a real impact.



Key Responsibilities:



-Manage the onboarding process for new users and patients, guiding them through setup and initial use of the app.

-Monitor and document user experiences, including any challenges, troubleshooting issues, and feedback.

-Relay critical insights and data to the leadership and development team to drive continuous app improvements and enhancements.

-Coordinate communication between users, patients, and internal stakeholders to ensure smooth operations and high satisfaction.

-Proactively identify opportunities to optimize user success and contribute ideas for app features based on real-world interactions.



Qualifications and Skills:



-Excellent command of English, both written and verbal – clear communication is essential.

-Strong organizational skills with a keen eye for detail and the ability to keep accurate notes and records.

-Self-motivated and initiative-driven; we need someone who isn’t afraid to roll up their sleeves and get things done.

-Experience in customer service, patient coordination, or a similar role in health/tech is a plus, but enthusiasm and a quick learning curve are key.

-Familiarity with nutrition, wellness apps, or digital health tools is advantageous but not required.

-Ability to work independently while being a collaborative team player.



How to Apply:

Change the Subject Line to: "Patient Care Coordinator – [Your Name] "

Send your resume and any relevant portfolio samples to:

d a t . v a 1 1 4 8 at g`m`a`i`l . c o m (remove spaces)



We look forward to reviewing your application and exploring how your skills can contribute to our team!



Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.

title: Head of Growth (SaaS Company)
description:
Job Title: Head of Growth (SaaS)



Company: Vertex360 Software

Location: Remote (Australia-based company)



PLEASE READ THE INFORMATION BELOW THOROUGHLY. 



Role Overview



The Head of Growth will be responsible for driving revenue growth, improving sales performance, and strengthening the end-to-end client journey across the sales and after-sales functions at Vertex360. This role focuses on analysing performance data, optimising sales processes, coaching tea
mbers, and improving conversion outcomes to support the continued expansion of Vertex360 Software.



Working closely with Sales, Account Managers, and leadership, the Head of Growth will ensure that new clients experience a seamless onboarding and transition process while building scalable frameworks that support long-term client success and retention.



Key Responsibilities



Key Responsibilities



1. Sales Performance Analysis and Optimisation

Monitor and analyse overall sales performance across the team, identifying trends, bottlenecks, and opportunities to improve pipeline efficiency, conversion rates, and revenue outcomes.



2. Market Research and Opportunity Identification

Conduct ongoing market research to understand industry trends, customer behaviour, and competitor positioning. Identify client pain points, market gaps, and areas for improvement to strengthen the company’s market positioning.



3. Revenue Growth Strategy

Develop and implement strategic initiatives aimed at driving sustainable revenue growth, improving client acquisition, and maximising sales opportunities.



4. Team Performance Coaching

Lead twice-weekly performance optimisation sessions (Wednesdays and Fridays), providing structured coaching, feedback, and strategic guidance to sales tea
mbers to strengthen individual performance and overall team results.



5. Sales and After-Sales Capability Development

Facilitate a weekly 30-minute capability-building session designed to strengthen both sales and after-sales functions for the Sales Team and Account Managers, sharing best practices, sales strategies, and customer success insights.



6. Account Manager Onboarding Oversight

Oversee Account Manager onboarding sessions to ensure attendance and preparedness, confirming presence at least five minutes prior to each session. Serve as a reliable backup facilitator when necessary to ensure a consistent and professional client experience.



7. Pipeline and Conversion Improvement

Develop and implement strategies to reduce No-Show and Reschedule rates, improving engagement, protecting the sales pipeline, and maximising conversion opportunities.



8. Sales to Account Management Transition

Monitor and optimise the transition from Sales to Account Managers to ensure smooth handovers, clear client expectations, and a high standard of customer experience throughout the onboarding process.



9. Process and Framework Development

Strengthen sales and after-sales frameworks through continuous training, process improvements, and structured playbooks that support scalable growth and long-term client relationships.



10. Cross-Team Collaboration

Work closely with leadership, sales, marketing, and customer success teams to identify operational improvements and implement growth strategies aligned with Vertex360’s business objectives.



Qualifications and Experience



Minimum of 7+ years of experience in Business Management, Growth, Sales Leadership, or related roles



Experience working in a SaaS environment is highly preferred



NDIS industry experience is an advantage



Proven experience in leading and mentoring high-performing teams



Demonstrated ability to drive business growth and significantly contribute to company expansion



Strong analytical, leadership, and strategic thinking skills



Excellent communication, coaching, and stakeholder management abilities



Compensation and Benefits



Monthly Salary: PHP 60,000 – 80,000, depending on qualifications and interview outcomes



Performance-Based Commission tied to growth and performance metrics



Opportunity to work with a fast-growing SaaS company supporting the NDIS sector in Australia

title: Social Media and Content Coordinator
description:
Role Summary

This is a social media execution and digital content support role. The coordinator is responsible for managing the social media presence of two healthcare brands — handling content scheduling, Canva graphic and infographic creation, content repurposing, community engagement, podcast support, monthly content calendaring, competitor monitoring, digital asset building, RSS feed monitoring, webinar promotion, Google My Business maintenance, and Google Ads reporting. Creative direction and vision come from the CEO. Excellence in this role means consistent execution, a growing digital asset library, and a social media presence that runs without the CEO needing to follow up.

 

Core Responsibilities

1. Social Media Content Execution

• Upload, format, and schedule social media posts in Publer for both AFCN Wellness Centre and AFCN Learning Institute

• Maintain the evergreen recurring content library — all posts set to annual reoccurrence cycles (not monthly — this is non-negotiable)

• Audit and organize content library labels, categories, and scheduling gaps as directed

• Format and resize graphics in Canva using provided brand templates

• Prepare and publish student certificate posts using the Clinical Partner Educator page as the verified source for name and location; share graduate posts to the AFCN Wellness Centre page

• Write or lightly adapt post captions when directed, following brand voice guidelines provided

• After posts are published, click through users who liked posts and invite them to like the page or group

• While switched to the AFCN Learning Institute page profile, like similar and relevant pages to grow follower visibility and draw attention to the Education page

• Share clinical partner posts and wins to the 
 Learning Institute
 page and the Foot Masters VIP group

• Create clinical partner location-specific posts in the content calendar, tagging the clinical partner location; share strong clinical partner content to the AFCN Learning Institute page

• Track and report basic engagement metrics monthly — including likes, reach, follower growth, and post performance — for both companies

• Monitor RSS feed automations for both company websites — the RSS feeds connected to Publer must automatically post any new blog content; confirm each new blog post triggers correctly and flag any automation failures immediately

• Post directly into monthly webinar
 events to generate interest and engagement; share webinar event posts to similar and related
 groups to expand reach

• Monitor and verify that webinar dates are consistent and accurate across both the Thinkific platform and all social media platforms — flag and correct any discrepancies immediately

 

2. Canva Graphic & Infographic Creation

• Design branded infographics for the AFCN Learning Institute to be used in courses, webinars, and social media posts — educating students and foot care professionals on clinical topics, tools, and best practices

• Create new social media graphics for both companies using provided Canva brand templates — quote cards, promotional posts, event graphics, and educational visuals

• Repurpose and upgrade existing content by replacing outdated images, improving visual quality, and refreshing older posts with updated branded visuals

• Convert blog posts and webinar content into social media graphic sets and infographic formats ready for scheduling in Publer

 

3. Content Repurposing & Upgrades

• Review existing blog posts and webinar content and break them down into social media captions, graphic sets, or short educational content pieces

• Identify evergreen content that can be reformatted or visually upgraded and action with CEO approval

• Ensure all repurposed content is properly labeled, organized, and added to the digital asset library for future reuse

 

4.
 Group Monitoring — Foot Masters VIP

• Monitor the Foot Masters VIP
 group daily for new posts, comments, and member activity

• Respond to straightforward engagement — welcoming new members, liking posts, acknowledging comments — using the brand voice guidelines provided

• Flag anything requiring the CEO attention, a clinical response, or escalation — do not respond independently to sensitive or clinical questions

 

5. Podcast Support

• Format and upload podcast show notes as directed

• Schedule and publish episode graphics across social media platforms

• Ensure episode release dates and descriptions are consistent across all platforms

 

6. Monthly Content Calendar

• Build a draft monthly content calendar in Publer for CEO review — organizing scheduled evergreen posts, specialty posts, webinar promotions, and any upcoming campaigns

• Submit the draft calendar to the CEO by the last week of each month for the following month

• Incorporate CEO feedback and finalize the schedule before the month begins

 

7. Competitor & Industry Monitoring

• Monitor similar foot care, nursing, and health education social media accounts weekly — tracking what they are posting, new content trends, and any notable campaigns

• Deliver a simple weekly summary report to the CEO and Operations Manager flagging anything worth noting — new trends, competitor activity, content ideas, or industry news

• This is a monitoring and reporting role only — strategy decisions based on findings remain with the CEO and Operations Manager

 

8. Google My Business

• Maintain and update Google My Business profiles for all clinic locations

• Ensure business hours, services, photos, and contact information remain accurate

• Monitor for flagged content or required updates and action promptly

 

9. Google Ads Monitoring & Reporting

• Monitor active Google Ads campaigns for both companies and flag performance issues to the CEO

• Assist with basic Google Ads setup when directed by the CEO

• Pull and organize monthly Google Ads performance reports for CEO review

 

10. Digital Asset Management

• Organize, label, and archive all digital assets including graphics, photos, videos, and branded documents

• Build and maintain a growing library of reusable social media assets — templates, branded images, student celebration graphics, and clinical partner visuals

• Ensure all assets are clearly named, categorized, and easy to locate

• Format and assemble marketing packages for local health professionals and referral partners using provided brand templates and direction

 

What This Role Is Not

To be clear about scope and expectations:

 

• This role does not involve social media strategy or strategic decision-making based on competitor findings — that remains with the CEO and Operations Manager

• This role does not involve original content ideation or campaign creation — creative direction comes from the CEO

• This role does not involve client or student communications — that is handled by the office and operations team

• This role does not involve website maintenance or coding — that is handled separately

• This role does not require independent judgment on brand decisions — when in doubt, ask before acting

• This role does not involve community outreach, partnership development, or local market research — that is handled by the Operations Manager

 

Accountability & Communication Standards

• Log every work session in the assigned Google Calendar with a clear task description and time — this is non-negotiable and must be completed daily

• Send a Friday weekly summary every week without being asked — a brief 5-bullet recap of what was completed that week, sent directly to the CEO

• Payment is processed biweekly by Jewel — Jewel will cross-reference Google Calendar logs before each payment is released

• Communicate proactively if a task is unclear before starting — do not guess and correct after

• Respond to messages within one business day

• Flag errors immediately and correct without being asked twice

• Complete all assigned Loom onboarding training before beginning independent tasks

 

Compensation & Growth

• Starting rate is $5.00 USD per hour at 20 hours per week

• A formal performance review will be conducted at 120 days

• Strong performers who demonstrate reliability, quality execution, and proactive communication will advance following the review

• This is a long-term role — we invest in people who invest in us

 

What Success Looks Like

• The CEO does not have to follow up on scheduled tasks

• The recurring content library runs without gaps or errors

• RSS feed automations are functioning correctly and every new blog post publishes to social media without manual intervention

• Webinar dates are accurate and consistent across Thinkific and all social media platforms at all times

• A growing infographic and visual asset library supports both the Institute courses and social media content

• The monthly draft content calendar is delivered to the CEO before the start of each month

• A weekly competitor and industry monitoring report is delivered consistently without prompting

• Foot Masters VIP group is actively monitored and engagement is handled promptly within brand voice guidelines

• A growing, well-organized digital asset library that makes future content creation faster

• Google My Business profiles are current and accurate at all times

• Google Ads reports are delivered on time and without prompting

• Every invoice is backed by a matching, detailed calendar log

• Errors are caught early, communicated honestly, and corrected immediately

• The CEO gains back time — not spends more of it managing this role

This role focuses on creating strategic marketing plans, overseeing digital campaigns, content creation, SEO/SEM, social media, and building scalable marketing frameworks to support long-term growth.



Working closely with Sales, Product, and leadership teams, the Head of Marketing will ensure consistent messaging, strong brand positioning, and measurable impact across all marketing initiatives.

Marketing Strategy & Planning

Align marketing initiatives with business objectives and revenue goals.



Digital Campaign & Content Oversight



Oversee digital campaigns, including SEO/SEM, social media,
, and content marketing.



Ensure campaigns are optimised for engagement, lead generation, and ROI.

Conduct regular coaching and feedback sessions to strengthen team capabilities.

Strengthen brand perception and maintain high-quality marketing collateral.

Marketing Performance & Analytics



Monitor KPIs across campaigns and channels.



Analyse campaign performance and provide actionable, data-driven insights.



Budget & Resource Management



Manage marketing budgets across brands, optimising spend for maximum impact.



Process & Framework Development



Establish scalable marketing frameworks, workflows, and playbooks for efficient and consistent execution.



Qualifications and Experience



Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Business, or a related field



At least 5 years of marketing experience, including 3+ years in a managerial role



Minimum of 7+ years of experience in Marketing, Brand Management, or Growth Marketing is preferred



Experience leading marketing initiatives across multiple brands or business units



Proven track record of developing and executing successful campaigns that drive growth and brand recognition



Experience in SaaS, tech, or NDIS-related industries is highly preferred



Highly proficient in English (written and verbal)



Strong leadership, analytical, communication, and critical thinking skills



Highly organized, detail-oriented, and capable of managing multiple projects simultaneously



Skilled in different marketing and analytics software tools

Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Marketing, Business Administration/Management, Communications, Digital Marketing, Public Relations, Economics, IT/Computer Science

Compensation



Monthly Salary: PHP 60,000 – 80,000 monthly (depending on qualifications and interview outcomes)

Opportunity to lead marketing across multiple fast-growing brands supporting the NDIS and SaaS sectors in Australia

title: URGENT | Senior Full Stack Developer
description:
IMPORTANT: If you are interested and qualified, please submit a link to your resume AND your voice recording to 
 will only process applications of those who will send both. Applications sent through OLJ will be automatically discarded. DO NOT apply if you do not have the experience.



Senior Full Stack Developer (Distributed Systems &

Computational Modeling)



Role Overview: We are looking for a Senior Full Stack Developer to join our core

engineering team building a proprietary platform for high-stakes industrial simulations and

capital project optimization. You will be responsible for developing the underlying

framework that manages complex, multi-stage computational pipelines. Your work will

focus on the seamless integration of heavy backend processing with a responsive, datarich

user experience, ensuring the reliable execution of sophisticated resource and design

optimizations.



Technical Requirements

1. Backend & Distributed Systems (Python Core):

• High-Performance Python: Advanced proficiency in Python, specifically utilizing

numerical and scientific libraries for large-scale data manipulation and algorithmic

optimization.

• Asynchronous Architecture: Extensive experience with distributed task queues

(e.g., Celery) to manage long-running, interdependent background processes and

complex workflow signatures.

• Algorithmic Implementation: Strong background in applied mathematics,

including spatial geometry, graph theory, and network flow optimization.

• Data Lifecycle Management: Expertise in managing state across distributed

systems using high-performance caching layers and persistent databases.



2. API & Real-Time Infrastructure:

• Framework Mastery: Deep experience with Python-based web frameworks (e.g.,

Django) for building robust, secure, and scalable API architectures.

• Real-Time Data Streaming: Proficiency in implementing WebSockets or similar

protocols to provide live telemetry and status updates from background engines to

the end-user.

• System Integrity: Experience designing systems that maintain strict data

consistency across multi-step, automated computational workflows.



3. Frontend & Visualization:

• Data-Intensive UIs: Ability to build sophisticated interfaces for managing complex

input parameters and visualizing multi-variable simulation outputs.

• Spatial Visualization: Experience rendering and manipulating 3D geometric entities

(vertices, faces, and polylines) within the browser to provide visual validation of

backend calculations.





Key Responsibilities:

• Bridge the gap between high-level logical planning and low-level computational

execution.

• Optimize the performance of proprietary spatial and geometric algorithms.

• Build the infrastructure that allows users to audit and interact with complex,

automated engineering decisions in real-time.

• Maintain and scale a distributed environment where background tasks must operate

with high reliability and low latency.





Preferred Qualifications:

title: Gimbal Design Engineer
description:
T-Bird Drones is a stealth startup company that is pursuing the development of drone technologies.



An engineer is needed to support the design of a 3-Axis gimbal for the stabilization of a 50g drone payload.  The stabilization system will be comprised of three Brushless DC (BLDC) motors with encoders, an Inertial Measurement Unit (IMU) on the payload mount, a control system processor, and the mechanical gimbal structure.  The mechanical design of the 3-Axis Gimbal needs to place the center of gravity of the 50g payload into the center of three gimbal motor axes.  Stabilization control will be provided through the use of a proportional, integral and derivative (PID) controller.  A balanced gimbal design is critical to the proper operation of the payload stabilization system.



The objective of gimbal design is to create a fixed unmoving point that is not affected by the position of the gimbal’s arms. The gimbal construction should be very stiff, and the only motion that is acceptable is the rotation of the motor's shaft.  Flexible arms or shaft bearing end play may seriously impact the quality of stabilization.



Required Qualifications:

• Bachelor’s degree in engineering or related field

• Exceptional problem-solving skills

• System level analysis, requirements, and design development

• Experience in control systems

• Experience with Inertial Measurement Units (IMU) 

• Experience with rotary position sensors (encoders)

• BLDC motors

• Experience with CAD (e.g. FreeCAD, Autodesk Fusion)

• Good verbal and written communication skills in English



Preferred Qualifications:

• Advanced degree in engineering or related field

• Gimbal design and gimbal stabilization

• BLDC gimbal motor system design

• PID controllers

• 3D Printing / Additive Manufacturing

• Modeling and simulation

• MATLAB Simulink



This position is an hourly job with deliverables every month.  Successful execution of milestone objectives in monthly deliverables will determine if continued work will be required from the job candidate.   The duration of this job can be long term with successful execution of milestones.  



This position is fully remote with flexible work times.  Occasional meetings in the Central Time Zone will be required.



Pay rate will be based on education, skills, and experience.

• “Apartment hunting tips” content  

• Funny or relatable renter content



Our goal is to build one of the largest apartment locating social media pages in Austin.



---



Requirements



• Experience managing or growing social media accounts  

• Strong short-form video editing skills (CapCut, Premiere, or similar)  

• Understanding of viral hooks and content structure  

• Good English communication  

• Organized and proactive  

• Comfortable taking initiative and suggesting new ideas



Bonus if you have experience with:  

• Real estate content  

• Lead generation content  

• Viral TikTok / Instagram growth



---



Application Instructions (READ CAREFULLY)



To be considered, please include the following:



1. Write “RentHaus Growth” at the top of your application so we know you read everything.  

2. Send 3 social media accounts you have managed or helped grow.  

3. Send 3 videos you have edited.  

4. Tell us what editing software you use.  

5. Explain how you would grow an apartment-tour page on TikTok or Instagram.  

6. Tell us your weekly availability.  

7. Submit a 2–3 minute Loom or video introduction explaining why you should be hired.  

8. In your video, give one content idea you would create for the RentHaus page.



Applications that do not follow these instructions will not be considered.



---



Goal of This Role



We want to grow our pages so they:



• Gain followers consistently  

• Generate apartment leads  

• Produce viral real estate content  

• Become the go-to page for people moving to Austin



You will work directly with the founder to help turn raw footage from apartment tours into high-performing social media content.



---



Growth Opportunity



If you perform well, this role can grow into:



• Managing multiple social media pages  

• Higher pay and bonuses tied to page growth  

• Long-term role helping build the RentHaus brand

title: Klaviyo VA (Flows, Campaign Setup, QA & reporting)
description:
We are a growing eCommerce
 marketing agency looking for a reliable Klaviyo VA to help support multiple client accounts.



This role is focused on implementation and accuracy inside Klaviyo.



Strategy, copywriting, and
 design are handled separately. We already have a copywriter and a designer.



Your responsibility is to make sure everything is built correctly inside Klaviyo and running smoothly.



This role is ideal for someone who enjoys working with systems, building flows, and making sure setups are accurate.



What You Will Be Doing



• Building Klaviyo flows using existing examples and templates

• Setting up campaigns using provided copy and designs

• Performing QA checks before campaigns are scheduled

• Creating A/B tests when needed

• Duplicating flows across client accounts and adjusting them correctly

• Identifying and fixing setup mistakes in flows or campaigns

• Creating simple SOPs for recurring processes (AI tools can be used)

• Adding performance data to prebuilt spreadsheets for monthly reporting



Important: What This Role Is NOT



This is not a strategy or content creation role.



You will not be responsible for:



• Writing
 copy

• Designing
s

• Marketing strategy

• Client communication



Your focus is accurate implementation and account maintenance.



Requirements



• Solid experience working inside Klaviyo

• Comfortable building flows and setting up campaigns

• Strong attention to detail

• Ability to follow examples and replicate setups correctly

• Able to work independently when instructions are clear

• Good written communication



Important



You do not need to be an advanced
 marketing strategist.



However, you should already be comfortable navigating Klaviyo and building flows without needing step-by-step training for every task.



Accuracy is extremely important in this role. Small mistakes in segmentation or flow setup can impact revenue.



Work Structure



• Hourly contract to start

• Work assigned based on client workload

• Opportunity to grow into a long-term part-time or full-time role as the agency grows



Application Instructions



To apply, please start your application with the word "Automation" so I know you read the full description.



Also answer the following questions:



1. How many Klaviyo accounts have you worked in?

2. What flows have you built or managed?

3. What are three common mistakes you see in Klaviyo flow setups?

4. If you were building an abandoned checkout flow, what trigger and filters would you use?

5. What city in the Philippines are you based in?

title: Online Math/Science Teacher(Near-Native Accent)
description:
About Pomelo Academy

Pomelo Academy is an innovative online international school dedicated to delivering high-quality education to students worldwide. We provide a dynamic and engaging learning environment, catering to individualized instruction that transcends geographical boundaries.



Job Description

We are seeking passionate and experienced Near-Native English-speaking Online K-12 Math and/or Science Teachers with verifiable teaching certifications. The ideal candidates will have strong academic backgrounds in Mathematics and/or Science, experience teaching young learners (ages 5–18), and a commitment to creating a supportive, inquiry-based, and engaging online learning environment.



Responsibilities



Deliver interactive and engaging Math and/or Science lessons to individuals and small groups of 2–6 students aged 5–18.

Teach using internationally recognized curricula such as A Closer Look, Glencoe Science, Pearson Interactive Science, NGSS-aligned resources, Singapore Math, or IB/AP/A Level Math programs.

Create age-appropriate lesson plans focused on conceptual understanding, inquiry, problem-solving, and real-world applications.

Incorporate visuals, multimedia, and hands-on virtual activities to make abstract concepts accessible and engaging.

Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback to students and parents.

Foster curiosity, discussion, and active learning in a safe and supportive space.



Qualifications



Professional teacher with at least 2 years of teaching experience (Kindergarten–Grade 12).

Must hold a valid teaching license/certification (e.g., Teaching License, State Certification). TESOL/TEFL is a plus.

Near-native English accent with excellent spoken and written communication skills.

Strong academic background in Mathematics and/or Science (Biology, Physics, Chemistry, General Science).

Experience teaching in public/international schools or reputable online platforms.

Familiarity with inquiry-based and/or interdisciplinary approaches (e.g., STEM/STEAM).

Comfortable working between 07:00–22:00 (Weekdays) and 9:00–22:00 (Weekends), GMT+8.

Proficiency with digital platforms such as ClassIn, Microsoft Office, and other educational technologies.

Must have a stable and fast internet connection and a PC/laptop with at least Windows 10 or Mac OS Catalina.



Benefits



Flexible working hours.

Opportunity to teach using globally respected Math and Science curricula.

Be part of an international, passionate team of educators.

Access to training and professional development.

Regular enrollment model (not a booking system), ensuring schedule stability and consistency

title: Camera Control Software Engineer
description:
T-Bird Drones is a stealth startup company that is pursuing the development of drone technologies.

A software engineer is needed to develop the software control of a camera.  Software will be developed in C/C++ utilizing a camera Software Development Kit (SDK) to control camera functionality.  Desired camera control functionality to be developed and demonstrated includes Camera On/Off, Manual Trigger, Video Recording, and Zoom.  All software will be hosted on a Raspberry Pi single board computer.

title: Virtual Administrative & Billing Coordinator (Canadian Rehab Clinic | JaneApp | Direct Billing)
description:
Senior Accounting & Billing Coordinator (Remote) – Healthcare Operations



Evergreen Rehab & Wellness | Greater Vancouver, BC, Canada



About Evergreen Rehab & Wellness



Evergreen Rehab & Wellness is a leading multidisciplinary healthcare organization serving the Greater Vancouver area, with clinics located in Coquitlam, Surrey, Langley, and Burnaby (Brentwood).



With a 4.9/5.0 patient satisfaction rating and a growing team of 70+ healthcare practitioners, we provide integrated healthcare services including physiotherapy, chiropractic care, registered massage therapy, naturopathic medicine, kinesiology, and rehabilitation services.



As our organization continues to grow, we are expanding our finance and operations team to support the increasing complexity of our clinic network.



Position Overview



We are seeking a Senior Accounting & Billing Coordinator to support the financial and operational functions of our healthcare clinics.



This role focuses on billing oversight, financial reporting, insurance payment reconciliation, and contractor payment processing. The successful candidate will work closely with management to ensure financial accuracy, efficient billing operations, and proper documentation of clinic financial activities.



This position requires strong accounting knowledge, attention to detail, and the ability to manage multiple financial workflows in a fast-paced healthcare environment.



* Role Responsibilities *



- Monitor claim submissions for private insurance providers, ensuring claims are submitted accurately and in a timely manner



- Track unsubmitted claims and outstanding accounts receivable and follow up when necessary



- Reconcile insurance payments received with billing records and identify discrepancies



- Monitor and track authorized claims



- Prepare and submit invoices and reports, including Initial and Extension Reports



- Maintain accurate billing documentation and ensure compliance with healthcare billing requirements



- Prepare monthly operational and financial reports, including EBITDA analysis and revenue tracking



- Prepare and process semi-monthly Independent Contractor payments and maintain practitioner payment records



- Reconcile practitioner revenue with billing and payment records



- Compile quarterly GST summaries and maintain organized financial documentation for accounting purposes



- Monitor payments from private insurance providers and track delayed or missing reimbursements



- Monitor unscheduled patients who have not booked recommended follow-up visits, coordinating with reception teams to assist with patient follow-up scheduling



* Compensation & Benefits *



- Full-time position (40 hours per week)



- Competitive monthly salary



- 13th-month bonus after 12 months of successful employment



- Fully remote work environment



- Professional training and development opportunities



- Opportunity to grow within a fast-expanding healthcare organization



* Required Qualifications *



- 5+ years of accounting, billing, or financial operations experience



- Strong proficiency in Microsoft Excel and financial reporting



- Excellent attention to detail and strong analytical skills



- Strong English communication skills (written and verbal)



- Ability to manage financial workflows independently in a remote work environment



- Experience managing accounts receivable and financial reconciliation



* Preferred Qualifications *



- Experience in healthcare accounting or clinic billing



- Familiarity with Jane App or similar practice management systems



- Knowledge of various insurance billing procedures



- Experience working with independent contractor compensation structures



- Multilingual abilities (Korean, Mandarin/Chinese, French, or Farsi) are considered an asset



* Work Environment *



- 100% remote position



- Structured onboarding and training



- Support and guidance from the VA Manager and clinic leadership team



- Collaborative and supportive team culture



- Opportunities for professional growth within a rapidly expanding healthcare organization

title: URGENT HIRING | Data Engineer
description:
IMPORTANT: If you are interested and qualified, please submit a link to your resume AND your voice recording to 
 will only process applications of those who will send both. Applications sent through OLJ will be automatically discarded. DO NOT apply if you do not have the experience.



About the Role

We are seeking a highly skilled Data Engineer to design, build, and maintain our data infrastructure, with a strong emphasis on data integration, architecture, and pipeline development. The ideal candidate will have expert-level SQL and Python skills and a deep understanding of data modeling, ETL processes, and system integrations.

This role requires a strong technical foundation, problem-solving skills, and the ability to work across teams to enable data-driven decision-making. You will play a crucial role in optimizing data flows and ensuring efficient data storage, access, and processing.

This is a full-time remote position, and the candidate should be comfortable working in either the Pacific Standard Time (PST) or Eastern Standard Time (EST) timezone

Key Responsibilities

Data Integration & Pipeline Development: Design and implement scalable ETL/ELT pipelines to integrate data from multiple sources into a centralized data platform.

Data Architecture: Develop and maintain robust data models, schemas, and warehouse structures to support analytics and business intelligence needs.

SQL & Database Management: Write and optimize complex SQL queries for data transformation, extraction, and performance tuning.

Python Development: Build and maintain automation scripts, data transformation processes, and API integrations using Python.

Scalability & Performance Optimization: Ensure data systems are optimized for performance, reliability, and scalability.

Collaboration: Work closely with data analysts, data scientists, and software engineers to support data needs across the organization.

Monitoring & Debugging: Implement logging, monitoring, and alerting solutions to ensure data integrity and pipeline health.





Qualifications & Experience

5+ years of experience in data engineering, software development, or a related field.

Expert proficiency in SQL, including performance tuning, query optimization, and database management.

Expert-level Python skills, including experience with data processing libraries (e.g., Pandas, PySpark, SQLAlchemy).

Strong experience with data integration across APIs, third-party services, and internal systems.





Deep understanding of data architecture principles, including data modeling, warehouse design, and distributed systems.

Experience working with cloud-based data platforms (e.g., AWS, GCP, Azure, Snowflake, BigQuery, Redshift).

Familiarity with workflow orchestration tools (e.g., Apache Airflow, Prefect, Dagster).

Experience with version control (Git), CI/CD pipelines, and containerization (Docker, Kubernetes) is a plus.

Hands on working with ELT/ETL tools along with API based ingestion using code.





Preferred Skills

Knowledge of streaming data technologies (e.g., Kafka, Kinesis, Pub/Sub).

Familiarity with data governance, security, and compliance best practices.



IMPORTANT: If you are interested and qualified, please submit a link to your resume AND your voice recording to 
 will only process applications of those who will send both. Applications sent through OLJ will be automatically discarded. DO NOT apply if you do not have the experience.

title: Remote Sales Representative – Shopify Stores (High Volume Leads / Commission Based)
description:
We are looking for motivated and confident remote sales representatives to join our team and help convert high-intent customers into completed purchases.



Our company operates multiple successful Shopify e-commerce brands, and every day we receive a large number of customers who begin checkout but do not complete their order. Your role will be to reach out to these customers by phone and help them finalize their purchase.



This is a high-opportunity, performance-based role with consistent daily leads and strong earning potential.



What You’ll Be Doing



• Calling customers who previously began checkout but did not complete their order

• Answering questions about the products and helping customers complete their purchase

• Providing a friendly, professional customer experience over the phone

• Following a simple call framework and sales process

• Updating notes after each call and tagging outcomes appropriately



How Calls Are Handled



All calls are made through our Aircall dialing platform.



Each day, you will be provided with a queue of customers who recently began checkout but did not complete their order. These leads are already warm and have shown strong interest in purchasing.



Your workflow will include:



• Logging into Aircall at the start of your shift

• Accessing the daily call queue of abandoned checkout leads

• Calling customers directly through the Aircall dialer

• Reviewing basic customer information (name, cart items, order value) before the call

• Assisting the customer in completing their order during the call

• Tagging the outcome of each call (sale completed, follow-up needed, no answer, etc.)



You will not need to generate your own leads — our system provides a continuous flow of new opportunities daily.



Compensation



• 10% commission on every order you successfully close

• No cap on earnings

• High volume of daily leads provided



Depending on performance and hours worked, representatives have the potential to earn hundreds of dollars per day.



Why This Is a Great Opportunity



• Endless daily leads from multiple e-commerce stores

• Customers have already shown purchase intent (they started checkout)

• Simple and proven sales process

• Fully remote work

• Strong earning potential for motivated sales reps



Requirements



• Strong spoken English

• Comfortable speaking with customers on the phone

• Confident and persuasive communication style

• Reliable internet connection and quiet work environment

• Self-motivated and organized



Sales experience is a plus but not required if you are a strong communicator and comfortable speaking with customers.



Nice to Have



• Experience in phone sales, e-commerce, or customer support

• Familiarity with Shopify or online shopping environments

• Experience using call software such as Aircall or similar dialers

title: AI Character Generation Specialist / LoRA Model Specialist
description:
Generative AI Character Specialist (AI Models & Influencers)



Job Description

title: Personnal Stylist
description:
Personal Stylist – Trend-Focused & Budget-Conscious

Position Title:

Personal Stylist (Trending Fashion & Affordable Luxury Looks)

Position Summary:

We are seeking a fashion-forward Personal Stylist who specializes in curating trendy, polished looks while maintaining a smart budget. This stylist will source stylish, affordable outfits for vacations, special events, professional appearances, and everyday elevated wear.

The ideal candidate understands current fashion trends, body types, color theory, and how to create high-end aesthetics at affordable price points.

 

Key Responsibilities

• Curate complete outfits for:

o Vacation looks (resort, cruise, tropical, city trips)

o Formal events (weddings, galas, birthdays)

o Business and networking events

o Casual-chic everyday wear

• Shop both online and in-store for budget-friendly fashion

• Stay updated on current fashion trends and seasonal collections

• Source affordable alternatives to luxury designer pieces

• Create look books and mood boards for clients

• Coordinate accessories, shoes, handbags, and statement pieces

• Assist with wardrobe edits and closet organization

• Provide body-type and color-based styling recommendations

• Work within client budgets without sacrificing style

• Track sales, discount codes, and fashion deals

 

Required Skills & Qualifications

• Strong knowledge of current fashion trends

• Ability to style high-end looks on a realistic budget

• Excellent eye for color coordination and fit

• Experience with online retailers (Zara, H&M, Mango, ASOS, Amazon fashion, etc.)

• Familiarity with resale platforms (Poshmark, Shein alternatives, Fashion Nova, etc.)

• Knowledge of tailoring basics

• Strong communication skills

• Experience creating digital look books (Canva, Pinterest, etc.)

• Social media savvy (Instagram/TikTok fashion trends preferred)

 

Preferred Experience

• 1–3 years styling experience

• Portfolio of styled looks

• Experience styling for:

o Vacation wardrobes

o Professional women

o Special events

• Understanding of body positivity and inclusive sizing

 

Budget-Smart Shopping Expertise Should Include:

• Finding designer-inspired pieces under $100

• Mixing high and low fashion

• Identifying quality fabrics at affordable retailers

• Using discount codes, flash sales, and clearance sourcing

• Thrift + boutique sourcing when appropriate

 

If You Want a Shorter Version for Posting:

We are seeking a trend-savvy Personal Stylist who can curate fashionable, vacation-ready and event-ready looks on a smart budget. Must have a strong eye for detail, knowledge of trending styles, and ability to source affordable yet elevated outfits. Experience creating look books and styling complete outfits required.

 

If you’d like, I can also create:

• A contract template for hiring a stylist

• A personal stylist service description for your own business

• A budget-friendly vacation capsule wardrobe guide

• A checklist for event styling

• Or a luxury-looking but affordable vacation packing list ?

Just tell me which direction you want to go.

A resume

title: e-commerce Inventory Planner (Full Time)
description:
APPLY AT THIS LINK:



We are a fast-growing e-commerce fashion bag brand based in Singapore.



We are looking for a highly analytical, systems-driven Supply Chain & Inventory Planning Manager to take full ownership of our inventory planning engine and supply chain performance. This role is for experienced candidates only.



If you enjoy building forecasting systems, optimizing inventory turns, preventing stockouts, and turning messy data into structured decision-making - this role is for you. This is a decision-making role - not a coordination role.



[Role Overview]

You will own our end-to-end inventory planning and supply chain optimization process.



Your primary responsibility is to ensure:

- We do not run out of stock and over-order

- Cash is not trapped in aging inventory

- Inventory is allocated correctly across markets

- Lead times are tracked and optimized

- You will build, refine, and manage the systems that determine when and how much we reorder.



[Key Responsibilities]

1. Demand Forecasting & Replenishment Planning

- Maintain and improve SKU-level forecasting models (Google Sheets-based)

- Track daily/weekly sales velocity by SKU

- Build reorder logic based on lead time, safety stock, and MOQ

- Recommend purchase quantities and reorder timing

- Identify potential stockout risks at least 60 days in advance



2. Inventory Optimization

- Monitor inventory levels across SG and US warehouses

- Allocate inventory strategically between markets

- Track inventory turnover rate

- Identify slow-moving and aging SKUs

- Recommend action plans (bundling, promotions, discontinuation)



3. Supplier & Lead Time Management

- Track production timelines

- Monitor actual vs expected lead times

- Flag delays and risk areas early

- Optimize MOQ decisions and production batching



4. Freight & Logistics Optimization

- Recommend shipping mode (air vs sea) based on margin and urgency

- Coordinate inbound shipments with Ops team



5. Reporting & Performance Tracking

- Maintain weekly supply chain dashboard

Report on:

- Stock cover (days of inventory)

- OOS risk

- Inventory aging

- Inventory turns

- Open PO pipeline

- Conduct monthly supply chain review with founders



[Success Metrics]

You will be evaluated on:

- Stockout rate

- Inventory turnover improvement

- Reduction in aged inventory

- Forecast accuracy

- On-time PO execution



[Who This Role Is For]

- Highly analytical and comfortable working with data

- Strong Excel / Google Sheets skills (required)

- Experience in inventory planning or supply chain management

- Process-driven and systems-oriented

- Comfortable making recommendations based on numbers

- Proactive in identifying risks early



[Who This Role Is NOT For]

- Someone who only wants to coordinate shipments

- Someone uncomfortable with numbers and forecasting

- Someone who prefers reactive execution instead of proactive planning

- Someone who needs constant supervision



[Requirements]

- 3+ years experience in supply chain, inventory planning, or operations

- Experience in e-commerce or DTC brand preferred

- Strong understanding of MOQs, lead times, safety stock, reorder points

- Advanced proficiency in Google Sheets or Excel

- Strong communication skills (written and verbal)

- Comfortable working remotely and independently



[What We Offer]

- Fully remote role

- High ownership and autonomy

- Opportunity to build a supply chain system from the ground up

- Direct collaboration with founders

- Performance-based growth opportunities

title: Property Operations and finance for Property Mgmt (short and long term)
description:
ABOUT THE ROLE & VISION



We are a growing property management company managing luxury short-term rentals in the Tennessee Smoky Mountains and a long-term portfolio in Minnesota. We are moving from a "startup" phase into a professionalized "Operations" phase.

We aren't looking for a task-taker; we are looking for a Controller—someone who thinks like an owner, protects our time and operations and ensures our attention to detail and excellence remain air tight as we grow.



POSITION OVERVIEW

Salary Range: ($5.00 – $8.00/hr for 20 hours/week, with the potential to go to 40 hrs)

Hours: 20 hours per week (Target: 9:00 AM – 1:00 PM US Eastern Time).



WHY JOIN DREAM CABIN GETAWAYS?

Growth-Minded & Solutions-Focused: We don’t dwell on problems; we find solutions. We want people who are hungry to learn, grow, and improve our systems every day.



Positive Energy: Property management sometimes involves surprise challenges. Pipes burst, tenants stop paying. It is critical that we approach our work with a positive attitude. We value collaboration, open communication, and a "can-do" spirit.

A Relationship, Not a Transaction: We want a years-long partnership where you feel supported, trusted, and empowered to make decisions.



Impact Over Activity: We value outcomes. You won't be micromanaged; you will be given clear goals and the freedom to execute, along with the support to be able to succeed.







YOUR WEEKLY FOCUS

10% Accounting and bookkeeping: You handle deposit reconciliations between OwnerRez/Airbnb/Vrbo and REIhub and generate professional Monthly Owner Statements for our PM clients.



60% Operations & Loop-Closing: You own operations from "Reported" to "completed and guest/tenant is happy". You enforce the 24-Hour No-Update Rule, providing proactive status updates on all open projects in 
 without being prompted.



20% Financial Administration: You audit and pay contractor invoices, ensuring billed hours match agreements. You manage purchasing for cabin supplies to keep our "jewel properties" guest-ready.



10% Guest and Tenant Support: You handle external comms with warmth, professionalism, and excellence. You have the people skills to make people feel heard, understood and taken care of. 



Required Experience & Technical Skills



3+ Years in US-Based PM: You understand the rhythm of STRs and LTRs.

The "Loop-Closer" DNA: You live by the 24-hour no-update rule. If a project is open, you provide an update before we have to ask.

Financial Rigor: Proven experience with Accounting or bookkeeping, ideally for long or short term rentals. 

Highly Detail-Oriented and Organized: Able to track tasks across multiple properties and follow up on outstanding issues. Skilled at prioritizing tasks based on urgency and importance.

You have a positive growth mindset. 

Strong communication skills: you are a proactive communicator who doesn’t wait to be asked for updates. You’re eager to participate in ongoing discussions about improving communication protocols and systems, and receptive to feedback.

Assertiveness: You are comfortable "chasing" contractors and tenants with a smile, and holding vendors accountable to their bids.



The Tech Stack: While we use OwnerRez, REIhub, and 
, we value your PM and Accounting Experience over your specific software experience. If you are an expert in the industry, and familiar with competitor tools, we can train you on our specific stack.

MUST HAVE Reliable internet connection with backup

Proficiency with Google Drive, WhatsApp, and ability to quickly learn 









HOW TO APPLY

To verify your attention to detail and financial expertise, please follow these steps exactly:



Subject Line: Include the name of the original bass player for the Grateful Dead.



Cover Letter (Paragraph 3): Include the phrase "closing the loop."



The Initiative Test: Describe a specific time you solved a contractor or tenant problem without waiting for direction.



The Financial Filter: Briefly describe your past accounting/bookkeeping work. Specifically:



Which software have you used (REIhub, QBO, Xero)?

Have you ever managed Trust Accounting or Owner Statements?

In 2-3 sentences, how do you handle a situation where an Airbnb payout doesn't match the expected booking amount in your PMS (like OwnerRez)?



Please include a resume or summary to showcase your background. If you have professional recommendations from previous US-based employers, we encourage you to include those.

title: Senior US Financial Negotiator (Mortgage / Debt Settlement / Retention Experience)
description:
Position Overview

***************

We are seeking a senior-level voice professional with experience handling U.S. homeowners in financial distress.



This role is similar to mortgage loss mitigation or debt settlement negotiation. It requires emotional composure, financial conversation skills, and disciplined communication.



This is NOT cold calling. This is structured negotiation with pre-qualified property owners.



We are looking for someone who is calm, analytical, and comfortable discussing hardship situations.



Who This Role Is NOT For

********************

• Script-based sales agents



• High-energy cold callers



• Commission-only closers



• Multi-job freelancers







We are looking for a stable professional.



Core Responsibilities

*****************

• Conduct scheduled calls with distressed U.S. property owners



• Assess financial and emotional resistance



• Navigate objections without pressure



• Guide conversations toward structured agreements



• Document clear call analysis







Required Background

******************

• 3+ years U.S. mortgage servicing, loss mitigation, or debt settlement



• Experience handling emotionally resistant U.S. customers



• Ability to discuss financial hardship professionally



• Clear, neutral American-facing accent



• Quiet home setup and professional environment







Strongly Preferred

***************

• Experience in major BPO firms handling U.S. mortgage accounts



• Team lead or senior CSR background



• Experience de-escalating distressed callers







Compensation

************

$18/hour



4 hours per day



Bonus: $400 per closed contract (No Limit)







High performers may transition to full-time.



Mandatory Application Step



Submit an unscripted voice recording answering:



1) “A homeowner says: ‘You investors are trying to steal my house.’ How do you respond?”

2) "I owe $10,000 in back taxes. I'll just pay it off next month"

3) "You're just trying to take advantage of me because I'm behind. I'm not desperate. I'll just let it go to auction."



Applications without recording will not be reviewed.

title: Account Manager/Sales/CSR  ( MUST SPEAK PERFECT ENGLISH ) with Printing & Sublimation Knowledge
description:
We have been a commercial printing company for almost 22 years. Over the years we have grown into various other Now a Sign Shop, a Wrap Shop, a Screen-Printing Shop and a Sublimation Manufacturing Company, we are in need of more tea
mbers. Looking for people who speak FLUENT ENGLISH AND if possible SPANISH too.



This position if for people WITH PRINTING, SUBLIMATION knowledge. We are a multi-million-dollar printing company, that specializes in providing high end printed materials and super high end sublimated apparel to companies across the US and several countries.



As an Account Manager (CSR), you will assist with managing and building existing client relationships, as well as grow new business. We provide cold and warm leads to our Account Managers who must manage a book of business and prospect for new clients daily.



Phones never stop ringing so most of the job is to help answer calls and facilitate current clients and take orders but outbound calls are still a requirement.



We are only looking for motivated and ambitious people with great people skills. If you are looking for a stable company where you can both make a great living and grow professionally, we are the company for you.



Duties Include:

Answer sales line and take orders. ( MUST SPEAK PERFECT ENGLISH AND better if SPANISH too )

Consult with customers on printing and sublimation needs for their business. ( KNOWLEDGE OF PRINT IS A MUST )

Contact existing customers regarding re-orders and checking progress of there growth since switching to Sublimated Apparel.

Make outbound calls to existing customer database.

Initiate contact and nurture relationships with new customer leads.

Follow up with customers on order satisfaction post sale.



Required Skills:

Minimum of 2 years prior inside or outside sales experience selling in a business-to-business environment or have heavy customer service experience.

Must be comfortable working in an inside sale only role, talking on the phone daily to customers and prospects and have the ability to close sales over the phone with the warm leads provided.

Excellent communication skills both verbal and written.

Proven track record of achieving goals and quotas.

Proven ability to thrive in a fast-paced team environment that requires multi-tasking and the ability to gain trust with customers very quickly.

Advanced proficiency with internet concepts and terminology, as well as MS Word & Excel.

Must be we extremely organized, detailed oriented and creative minded.

Desired Skills

Knowledgeable in printing concepts and terminology.

Experience with Salesforce or comparable sales tools.



Additional Info:

Our benefits include Paid time off. Be prepared to work hard, but also be prepared to have fun. When applying please let us know why you think you would be a good candidate for this position.

title: Sublimation Apparel Graphic Designer with 5 or more Years of Experience Needed FULL TIME
description:
*** MUST READ ENTIRE POST *** OR YOUR APPLICATION WILL BE DELETED ***



Looking for several Creative Graphic Designers with years of experience in Sublimation Apparel.



Experience Is not just a word, its a lifestyle. We're Hiring Elite Graphic Designers for a High-Powered Print & Apparel Team, People who are Second to None in their Creative Abilities.



If you’re an experienced designer who thrives in a fast-paced, high-output creative environment—read on.



We’re not your average print shop. With over 21 years in the Commercial Printing Industry, we’ve Evolved into a Powerhouse:

A Sign Shop. A Wrap Shop. A Screen Printing Studio. A Full-Scale Dye Sublimation Manufacturing Company. And we’re just getting started, yep... after 21 years, we are ready to kill it.



We’re an International, Multi-million-Dollar Pperation, Producing Top-tier Printed Materials and Ultra-premium sublimated apparel for clients across the World. Now, with massive growth in our Dye Sublimation Cut & Sew Division, we’re expanding our team and looking for the best of the best.



What We’re Looking For:



We need a few highly skilled, multi-talented graphic designers. Not just t-shirt artists—true creatives who can switch gears between dye sublimated apparel, business cards and other marketing collateral, as well as banners, flyers and other items without missing a beat. YES YOU MUST KNOW IT ALL and be the BEST in your field.



YOU ARE REQUIRED TO BE:



    Exceptionally fluent in Adobe Illustrator (Level 10, shortcuts second nature)



    Highly capable with Photoshop and InDesign



    Experienced in designing custom t-shirts, sublimation apparel, and print assets like car wraps, signs, business cards,  brochures, and flyers



    Able to turn out fast, clean, creative work under pressure



    Collaborative, detail-focused, and used to production-level design and grading of Sublimation Apparel



This Is a Full-Time Role—No Exceptions ( not looking for people to fill a void, looking for people to take on a challenge, head first ) and be a part of our growing team for the long term.



    40 hours per week



    Monday–Friday work days



    Remote, permanent position



    We're overloaded and growing fast—you’ll hit the ground running



What You’ll Be Doing



    Designing sublimated shirts, print graphics, and branded materials



    Working closely with our production and creative teams ( Most located right there where you are )



    Taking ownership of projects from concept to final output



    Staying sharp with trends and tools—our standards are high, and we expect yours to be too



If you have 5+ years of professional design experience, thrive under deadlines, and want to be part of something exciting and fast-moving—we want to talk to you.



Apply now and let’s build something bold, together.



Reply to post. Include a short video of you speaking english.

include link to portfolio and resume.



Must have 5 years of experience or do not reply

Must have 10 or more examples of sublimation design in portfolio or do not reply

title: Cold caller for Digital Agency needed ASAP
description:
We’re a growing digital agency that helps home remodeling companies generate consistent, high-quality leads through paid ads and automated sales funnels.



We’re looking for a reliable, friendly cold caller to reach out to remodeling companies and book qualified appointments for the founder.



This is NOT calling homeowners.

This is B2B outreach to remodeling business owners.



What You’ll Be Doing:



> Making at lleast 200 outbound calls per day (approx. 2.5 hours of focused dialing)

> Using our power dialer in Go High Level

> Following a proven script (while sounding natural and confident)

> Booking qualified appointments on the founder’s calendar

> Logging call outcomes accurately.



Schedule:



> Must be available between 9am–6pm Eastern Time

> Daily calling required (Monday–Friday)

> Must be consistent and dependable



Compensation:



Weekly pay

Performance-based structure

5% commission on every deal closed from your booked appointments

(Typical commission per closed deal: $65–$240)

Paid training (approximately 1–2 hours)

Potential for long-term role as we scale



If you're interested, please answer the following:

1. Have you done cold calling/appointment setting before (not required).

2. Are you available during the 9-6 eastern time window?

3. Are you able to make 200 dials a day (around two hours)?

4. To keep you successful we will have daily 30 minute "huddles" to check performance and review calls. are you able to commit to this?

5. What makes you feel like you're a good fit for this role?



** Please send over a voice recording of you doing the intro of the script.



"Hi is this the owner of bathrooms deluxe? Hey this is Al over at 7Doors um, I know i'm interupting you do you have maybe 10 seconds i'll let you know why i called and you can tell me if it's relevant?"



You want to be casual, warm, and upbeat. Also be sure to include the "um" after 7Doors so you sound human and not scripted. Here is a recording of me doing it--please try to mimic my own as closely as possible.



My recording: 
at/s/fJncTWmYABrZ5fdwI8mX

title: Operations Manager
description:
About Us:

At Premier TC Services, we are dedicated to transforming the real estate industry with our innovative transaction management solutions. As we continue to expand, we are seeking a dynamic Sales Specialist to join our team and drive our business growth.



Job Description:



We are seeking a highly capable and proactive Operations Assistant to the CEO to support the Office of the CEO. This is a strategic, operations-focused role ideal for someone with a strong background in managing projects, people, and cross-functional workflows. You will work directly with the CEO and EA to align priorities, drive execution across departments, and ensure operational efficiency throughout the organization.





Key Responsibilities:



-Oversee and manage company-wide projects and tasks assigned by or to the CEO

-Complete various tasks and projects on behalf of the CEO

-Communicate professionally with staff, contractors, clients, and partners on behalf of the CEO

-Help streamline and optimize daily operations alongside the CEO

-Proactively identifies issues and strategically crafts solutions

-Keep operations running smoothly and efficiently across all departments

-Manage the CEO’s communication lines

-Conduct operational audits as directed by the CEO

-Prepare and deliver detailed reports, updates, and summaries for the CEO

-Follow up on tasks, ensure completion, and support the CEO in executing his goals

-Act as the point person for internal and external coordination involving the CEO

- Hiring & Training 

-Support the company and leadership in any way 





Key Traits & Skills:



-Excellent project and task management skills

-Clear, confident communication (written and verbal)

-Strong attention to detail and high accuracy in execution

-People management experience and ability to work across teams

-High initiative, self-starter, and problem-solver mindset

-Trustworthy, dependable, and capable of managing sensitive information

-Able to prioritize, stay organized, and meet deadlines in a fast-paced environment





Technical Requirements:

-Stable Internet and power backup

-Proficient in tools like Google Workspace, 
, CRMs, and reporting dashboards

-Familiarity with project/task tracking and reporting tools







Qualifications:



-Prior experience supporting a CEO or executive

-Familiarity with U.S. business culture and expectations

-Minimum of 3 years of experience in operations, project management, or business management

-Strong leadership and communication skills; experience working with executive teams

-Highly organized, detail-oriented, and able to drive execution across multiple departments

-Strategic thinker who can connect the big picture with tactical execution

-Self-motivated, dependable, and able to work independently.

-Comfortable working during U.S. business hours (Eastern Time)

-Familiarity with startup or high-growth environments

-Background in systems building, performance tracking, or cross-team operations

-Excellent Communication Skills: Professional verbal and written communication skills.



What We Offer:

Competitive salary and growth opportunities.

A dynamic and collaborative work environment.

The chance to contribute to the success and expansion of a forward-thinking company.

Paid Time OFF

Holidays Paid OFF





To Apply:

If you are passionate about sales and eager to make a significant impact in a growing company, we would love to hear from you. Please send your resume in PDF format and most updated video introduction via onlinejobs.ph
