title: Digital Marketing Virtual Assistant – Proposals, Email Follow-ups, Reports & Inbox Management
description:
I am looking for a reliable and highly organised Virtual Assistant to support the day-to-day operations of two digital marketing related businesses that I run.



This is not a basic VA role. The position requires someone organised, proactive and comfortable working in a digital marketing environment.



This is a long-term role starting part-time with the potential to grow into a full-time position as the businesses expand.



The role focuses on organisation, follow-ups, proposal preparation, inbox monitoring and operational support rather than performing SEO or advertising work directly.



The objective of the role is to ensure that meetings, calls,
s and follow-up tasks are organised properly so that nothing is missed and communication with clients remains efficient.



Working hours are Monday to Friday from 12:00 PM to 5:00 PM UK time. This is 5 hours per day and 25 hours per week.



These hours are important because most meetings take place earlier in the day and the role focuses on managing follow-ups and operational tasks afterwards.



Salary is $400 USD per month with the opportunity for increases as the role grows.



During the day there are regular Zoom calls with agencies and clients, sales calls, consultations and discussions related to websites, SEO, advertising campaigns, analytics and general digital marketing strategy.



These conversations usually result in follow-up actions such as preparing proposals, sending follow-up
s, onboarding new clients, preparing reports and coordinating work with freelancers.



The purpose of the role is to ensure these conversations are converted into organised actions and follow-ups.



One of the key responsibilities will involve reviewing meeting and phone call transcripts.



Tools used include Zoom with Fathom for meeting transcription and Dialpad for phone call transcription.



You will review transcripts, summarise key points from conversations, draft follow-up
s for approval and organise tasks so that agreed actions are completed.



Another responsibility will be preparing proposals.



A proposal system with templates is already in place. Your role will involve preparing proposals based on call summaries, completing client information, including the services discussed and estimating pricing based on an existing pricing structure. All proposals are reviewed before being sent.



You will also assist with client onboarding.



When a new customer signs up there is a short onboarding process within the system which includes entering company information, setting up the account and organising the initial setup.



 management is also an important part of the role.



You will have delegate access to a Gmail inbox. Responsibilities include drafting follow-up
s, preparing
 responses for review and reminding when follow-ups are due.



For example, if a meeting concludes with actions such as sending access details or confirming next steps, you will prepare the
 draft ready for approval.



Inbox monitoring is also required during working hours.



Responsibilities include monitoring incoming
s for requests, identifying tasks that need to be completed, flagging important messages and helping organise tasks so that requests are not overlooked.



For example, if a client
s requesting a website update or campaign change, the request would be flagged and a quick message sent to confirm whether the work should be scheduled, completed internally or assigned to a freelancer.



Reporting support is required on a monthly basis.



Reports are generated through AgencyAnalytics. Your role will involve downloading reports, summarising key points and preparing a short written overview.



You will also assist with coordinating freelancers.



Freelancers are engaged through Upwork. This may involve posting tasks, coordinating requests and following up on progress.



Communication is mainly through Gmail, WhatsApp and occasionally Zoom.



Voice notes are sometimes used for instructions, so it is important to be comfortable working with both written and spoken communication.



Essential requirements include excellent written and spoken English with a strong understanding of UK English spelling and grammar.



Because this role involves drafting professional
s, proposals and summaries, written communication quality will be an important part of the selection process.



Applicants should also demonstrate strong organisational skills, attention to detail, reliability and the ability to follow instructions carefully.



Comfort with online tools and remote working systems is also important.



Experience or familiarity with digital marketing environments such as websites, SEO, advertising campaigns or analytics platforms is beneficial but not essential.



This role requires strong organisational skills and attention to detail. The position involves managing follow-ups fro
etings,
s and client requests, so the ability to structure information clearly and communicate professionally is essential. Applicants who rely on generic responses, copy-and-paste applications or automated tools will not be considered. Please take a 
nt to read the description carefully and follow the application instructions below.



To confirm that you have read this job description properly, please follow these instructions when applying.



The first word of your application must be INTERNATIONAL.



Applications that do not include this word will not be considered.



Please also include the word ORGANISE somewhere in your application so it is clear the job description has been read carefully.



Please also include a short one-minute video introduction answering the following question.



If a business owner finishes a 40-minute call with a potential client about website design, SEO and advertising, how would you organise the follow-up actions?



Explain how you would summarise the conversation, prepare the proposal and organise the follow-up
.



This role is intended to be a long-term working relationship and may grow into additional hours or a full-time role as the business expands.



If the position sounds suitable, I look forward to reviewing your application.

title: Customer Care
description:
Why You’ll Love Working With Us



At Coast & Host, we provide a professional and supportive work environment where tea
mbers are valued and encouraged to grow.



We have developed strong systems and processes that help streamline tasks and improve operational efficiency, allowing you to focus on delivering great customer experiences.



From day one, we will support you through a structured onboarding process and help you integrate smoothly into our team.



We believe in building long-term relationships with our tea
mbers and actively support their growth and success within the company.



In this role, you won’t just be completing tasks—you’ll play an important part in the continued growth and success of Coast & Host.

Coast & Host specializes in high-end vacation rentals with a strong focus on delivering outstanding customer experiences.



We value strong work ethics and appreciate every tea
mber for the unique skills they bring to the company. To help you succeed, we provide detailed training, clear systems, and a structured onboarding process.



We foster a culture of growth, accountability, and teamwork. Our leadership team leads by example and is always ready to support tea
mbers when they need it.

title: Senior B2B Sales Executive
description:
Full-Time | Performance-Based | International Growth



About Us

We are a European manufacturer of professional mobile hand hygiene systems used in commercial vehicles. Over 50,000 professionals already use our systems. We sell strictly B2B. Our customers are fleet operators and national distributors.



We are expanding into the UK, Europe, and selected international markets including the US and Japan.

This role is about building new markets — not maintaining existing accounts.



The Role

You will drive outbound sales into:

- UK fleet operators

- European fleet customers

- International distributors and importers

So 75% of your time have to align with EU/UK business hours - but we are flexible in planning.



This is a hunting role.

You will open doors, create pipeline, and move prospects toward structured commercial evaluations.

You will work directly with the founder. Your performance will directly impact international expansion.



What You Will Be Measured On:

Qualified fleet trials generated

Qualified distributor evaluation meetings

Structured pipeline growth

Consistent outbound activity

Clean CRM documentation



This is KPI-driven and performance-based.



What You Will Do

Cold call fleet managers, operations directors and HSE leaders

Identify current hygiene setup in commercial vehicles

Create interest and secure structured evaluation meetings

Identify and approach national distributors

Qualify commercial capability and market coverage

Move conversations forward with clear next steps



High outbound volume is expected.



Who This Is For?

3+ years outbound B2B experience

Comfortable calling UK or US decision-makers

Strong objection handling

Commercial mindset

Confident, structured communicator

Fluent, professional English



This is not a script-reading call center role.



This is for a commercially driven outbound professional who wants ownership and growth.



Compensation

$2,600/month base

Commission per qualified fleet trial

Commission per qualified distributor evaluation

% of first-year revenue share on sourced accounts



Total earnings are strongly performance-driven. There is NO CEILING for high performers.



Please include a 1-2 minute Loom or voice recording explaining why you're a hunter and message your video in my whatsapp:

This is a full time role requiring 40 hours per week. The salary is 1,400 AUD per month.

title: Video Editor
description:

title: CAD/BIM Technitian
description:
*THIS ROLE REQUIRES PREVIOUSLY PAID PROFESSIONAL AUTOCAD WORK*



*THIS JOB IS ONLY ELIGIBLE FOR AMBITIOUS WORKERS LOOKING TO START IMMEDIATELY WITHOUT OTHER WORK OBLIGATIONS*



Looking for a technician to help with creating 2D and 3D drawings. This job directly fast tracks you into a managerial position, where you will have the ability to manage a team full of other Draftsmen. The work involves straightforward tasks where you copy and paste building blocks onto each other. The salary is uncapped. You will have easy access to support at all times and additional help for your development.



Key Responsibilities:



Locate and design elements for specific locations on a master CAD file.



Maintain alignment, spacing, and labeling consistency.



Save and organize files properly.



Requirements:



Have access to CAD Software Civil 3D (Version is irrelevant)



Not currently employed by someone else and able to start work immediately.



Strong attention to detail



Ability to follow clear instructions



Reliable communication and timely delivery



Proficient in all aspects of English but specifically strong reading and comprehension skills.



Familiar with how to read location data and be able to easily communicate it to others.



Experience with mapping, drafting, or architectural layouts. (Submit application with Dropbox examples if possible)



Project Type: Ongoing work available

Estimated Time: 30+ hours a week but flexible

Level: Intermediate to Advanced



This job requires experience but should be a pivotal step forward in anyone's career, so If you’re looking for easy, repeatable CAD work with clear expectations, we’d love to hear from you!

description:
About the Organization



They Were Here is a nonprofit dedicated to preserving the legacies of people who have passed away by sharing their stories and life lessons with the world.



Through interviews, storytelling, and media, we help families honor loved ones while inspiring others to live meaningful lives.

Export full video episodes



Short Form Content

Add simple music and transitions



Content Formatting

Export files optimized for social media

Canva

LONG-TIME OPPORTUNITY.



We are looking for someone who wants to grow with the nonprofit long term as the podcast and storytelling platform expand.

title: TRANSACTION COORDINATOR VA — Wholesale Real Estate
description:
TRANSACTION COORDINATOR VA — Wholesale Real Estate

Remote | Full-Time | Mon–Fri, 9:30AM–6:30PM EST

$1,050–$1,500/month + $75 per closed deal (avg 4–10 deals/month)

- Estimated total: $1,350–$2,250/month for strong performers

- Setup: 100% remote, direct hire

- Pay: Weekly



THIS IS NOT A GENERAL VA ROLE.



If you haven't cleared title, handled liens, coordinated with U.S. title companies, or managed novation deals — please do not apply. This role is for experienced wholesale real estate TCs only. Minimum 1 year of wholesale TC experience required.



General VAs, property management TCs, and listing/buyer's agent coordinators — this is not the role for you.



--



ABOUT THE ROLE



We're a wholesale and novation real estate operation looking for 2–3 sharp Transaction Coordinator VAs to own deals from contract to close.



This isn't a role where you wait to be told what to do. You'll be the person keeping everything moving — chasing title, coordinating with attorneys, following up on documents, and making sure nothing falls through the cracks.



If you're the type who thrives on juggling multiple live files, solving title problems before they become closing delays, and working independently without hand-holding — you'll fit right in.



Long-term position. Direct hire. No agencies.



--



WHY YOU'LL WANT THIS ROLE



- Stable, long-term income with a real performance upside ($75 every time a deal closes)

- TCs average 4–10 closed deals/month — that's an extra $300–$750 on top of your base

- Work directly with the decision-makers — no layers of management

- Consistent deal flow — this isn't a slow operation

- 100% remote, no commute, no office politics

- A team that knows the business and respects the people who do the work





WHAT YOU'LL DO



- Manage transactions end-to-end for both cash and novation deals

- Coordinate with U.S. title companies, attorneys, buyers, and sellers

- Clear title issues — liens, missing documents, outstanding conditions

- Follow up on all parties proactively to meet deadlines

- Handle multiple active files simultaneously with accuracy and urgency



--



REQUIREMENTS (NON-NEGOTIABLE)



- 1+ year of TC experience specifically in U.S. wholesale real estate

- Hands-on experience with novation deals

- Experience independently managing files A–Z — both cash and novation

- Experience clearing hard title issues and working directly with U.S. title companies

- Strong English — written and spoken (daily communication with U.S. clients)

- Self-managed, detail-driven, and dependable — you follow up without being asked

- Able to perform in a fast-paced, high-pressure environment with multiple live files



--



WHAT GREAT LOOKS LIKE



The ideal candidate has seen the messy stuff — deceased parties on title, last-minute liens, missing heirs, stalled probate — and knows how to navigate it without panicking or stalling the deal. You communicate clearly, you document everything, and you take ownership of your files.





HOW TO APPLY



: 

Subject Line: TCVA JOB POSITION



Your application must include:

- A short voice recording (2–3 minutes) about your TC experience

- Written answers to all 4 screening questions below



SCREENING QUESTIONS (answer all 4 — no exceptions)



1. Have you worked as a Transaction Coordinator specifically for a U.S. wholesale real estate company — not a listing agent, buyer's agent, or property management company? If yes, how many years?



2. Have you independently managed both cash AND novation wholesale deals from contract to close — handling all coordination, documentation, and follow-up on your own without a supervisor walking you through each step? Please describe.



3. Have you personally resolved hard title issues such as liens, deceased parties on title, missing heirs, or missing documents — working directly with U.S. title companies to clear them? Give a specific example.



4. This role involves managing multiple live files under tight deadlines in a high-pressure environment. Give a specific example of a time you had to push hard to get a deal closed on time — what was the situation and what did you do?



Applications without complete answers and a voice recording will not be reviewed.

title: CUSTOMER RELATIONS VA — Real Estate Wholesaling
description:
CUSTOMER RELATIONS VA — Real Estate Wholesaling

Remote | Full-Time | 5 Days/Week, 10:00AM to 7:00PM EST 

Weekend Availability Highly Preferred

Base: $1,000–$1,400/month + $50 PER CLOSED DEAL | OTE up to $1,900/month

Direct Hire | No Agencies | Long-Term Role





WHO THIS IS BUILT FOR



The people who thrive here came from acquisitions, dispositions, or seller-facing real estate work. They know how to talk to motivated sellers, stay organized without being reminded, and catch problems before they become deal killers. If that's you, you'll fit right in — and earn more than most VA roles will ever offer.



ABOUT THE ROLE



You are the face of our company to sellers from contract signing to closing day. Every update, every scheduled appointment, every document — yours to own. This is a relationship management role in a fast-moving wholesale operation, not a general admin job.



Long-term. Direct hire. No agencies.



WHAT YOU'LL DO



Seller Communication & Relationships

- Primary point of contact for sellers from contract to close

- Timely, professional updates at every stage — keep sellers informed and confident

- Handle questions with clarity and calm, even when complications arise



Scheduling & Coordination

- Book notaries for signings and closings

- Schedule photos, walkthroughs, inspections, and showings



Pipeline & CRM

- Manage multiple active files — daily CRM and spreadsheet updates

- Proactive follow-up with all parties to keep files moving

- Flag red flags and missing steps to the team immediately





REQUIREMENTS (NON-NEGOTIABLE)



- Minimum 1 year of real estate experience — required

- Acquisitions, dispositions, or seller/customer relations background strongly preferred

- Strong English — written and spoken

- Organized, detail-oriented, and tech-savvy

- Able to manage multiple files independently

- Weekend availability highly preferred

- Stable internet, headset, quiet workspace





HOW TO APPLY



: 

Subject Line: Customer Relations VA



Include:

- A short voice recording (2–3 mins) — intro + your real estate experience

- Written answers to all 3 screening questions



SCREENING QUESTIONS (answer all 3 — no exceptions)



1. Do you have experience in real estate wholesaling — specifically acquisitions, dispositions, or seller/customer relations? If yes, describe your role and years.



2. Have you independently managed seller or client relationships end-to-end — updates, follow-ups, scheduling, problem-solving — without close supervision? Describe it.



3. This role moves fast with daily targets and no slow days. Are you someone who thrives under pressure and works hard even when the pace is relentless — give a specific example that proves it.



Applications without a voice recording and complete answers will not be reviewed.

Services and products

Business description

Images and videos

Attributes

FAQs

Regular posts and updates

Required Skills and Experience

Deep understanding of Local SEO ranking factors.



Proven experience creating and managing local citations.

SEMrush

Ahrefs

or similar local SEO tools.

What We Are Looking For

title: Short-Form Video Editor (Cinematic & TikTok)
description:
JOB TITLE: Short-Form Video Editor (Cinematic & TikTok) — Luxury Brand

SALARY: $800–1,000 USD/month (based on portfolio)

TYPE: Full-time (40 hours/week)

LOCATION: Remote (Philippines)

SCHEDULE: Async, with Vancouver overlap (PST) for feedback



---



THE MISSION



Prismiera is a luxury jewelry brand built on ancient mythology, goddess archetypes, and Dark Academia aesthetics.



We need someone to own how the brand looks and feels on Instagram and TikTok.



You'll produce short-form content that makes a woman feel powerful in under 30 seconds. Cinematic pacing, dark femininity, sometimes music-driven editing — designed for how Instagram and TikTok audiences actually consume. You'll also work with our AI-generated personas, integrating them into edits and cinematic storytelling as the visual anchor of the brand.



We're hiring for Taste first. Your edits/videos make people feel something before they understand what they're looking at.



---



THE STYLE



YES: Aspirational. Cinematic Storytelling. Lethal elegance. Fashion-edit energy. Dark femininity. Music-driven impact. High-production value.



NO: CapCut presets. Generic motivational quote reels. Low-effort vlog-style acting. Anything that cheapens a demi-luxury product.



You instinctively know the difference between "luxury" and "cheap." Between aspirational and try-hard. Between powerful and loud. That instinct is what we're hiring for.



---



WHAT YOU'LL DO



Edit & Create: Produce original Instagram Reels and TikToks — cinematic, atmospheric visuals, mythology, history, modern. Some pieces you'll build from scratch. Others you'll adapt from assets in our YouTube production pipeline. Either way, you're crafting content shaped for how each platform rewards engagement.



Music-Sync Editing: Sometimes, your cuts, transitions, and visual reveals are married to the beat. Swells, drops, silence, impact — all intentional. Music is a storytelling weapon, not background noise.



AI Persona Integration: Composite and stylize our AI-generated goddess characters into edits/videos. She's the visual anchor — the face the eye locks onto while mythology and editing layers move around her. You'll make her feel like she belongs in the scene, not pasted on top of it.



AI Content Generation: You won't just receive AI assets — you'll learn to create them. We provide paid accounts for frontier AI tools (Seedance 2.0, Seedream5, and whatever launches next). You'll generate AI influencer visuals, atmospheric environments, and character footage that feed directly into your edits/videos. Prior AI experience is a plus, not a requirement — we train the right editor.



Platform Instinct: You understand what gets saved on Instagram. What gets looped on TikTok. You design for those behaviors, not just for visual quality.



Volume at Speed: Once your templates and aesthetic are locked, we expect high output. You'll ramp up from 3-5 pieces per week to 10-15 at steady state.



---



CORE REQUIREMENTS



The Aesthetic Eye. This is non-negotiable. Your portfolio should make us stop scrolling. If your work already lives in the neighborhood of cinematic, aspirational — we want to talk.



Creative Instinct. You don't wait to be told what to make. Given a goddess/character, a mood, and a piece of music, you see the edit before you open the timeline. You pitch ideas, not just execute briefs. Storytelling comes naturally — you think in narrative beats, not just cuts.



Music & Rhythm. You've made edits where the music drives the visuals — AMVs, fashion reels, phonk edits, fan edits, whatever the genre. You understand pacing as a weapon.



Premiere Pro. Your primary editing tool. You're fast, clean, and comfortable working in shared project structures.



Loop Thinking. You design edits/videos that reward rewatching. The cut that lands on beat, the detail you only catch the second time, the seamless loop point. You think in circles, not lines.



Strong English. Daily async communication — clear, direct, professional. This matters as much as your editing. Responsiveness and clarity are non-negotiable.



Reliable & Coachable. You hit deadlines or warn early. You take direct feedback and iterate fast. You flag problems with options, not excuses.



---



BONUS SKILLS (Not Required, But We'll Notice — And They Affect Your Rate)



- After Effects — compositing, layering, motion graphics, light/shadow matching. This is how AI-generated visuals get integrated into polished edits. Strong AE skills will place you at the higher end of our compensation range.

- AI generation experience — Kling3.0, Veo3.1, Comfyui, Seedance2.0, Seedream5.0 or similar. If you already know these tools, your rate reflects it. If not, we provide paid accounts and training.

- Color grading — pushing mixed footage into a consistent luxury palette

- Typography sense — text overlays that feel intentional and premium

- Sound design — SFX layering beyond just music (risers, hits, atmospheric texture)

- Understanding of Instagram analytics — saves, shares, completion rates

- Experience building visual identities for brands or personas on social media



---



HOW THIS ROLE FITS



Other editors handle cinematic YouTube production — you own social media (sometimes YouTube as well). Same mythology, same brand, different platform behavior. Each editor has a distinct lane, and yours is how Prismiera looks and feels on Instagram and TikTok.



---



SYSTEM REQUIREMENTS



RAM: 16GB minimum (32GB preferred) + SSD

Reliable high-speed internet (upload speed matters)

Must run Premiere Pro and browser-based AI tools simultaneously



---



PAID TRIAL (Shortlisted Candidates)



Before any full-time commitment, we run a paid trial. We provide real assets, style references, and the AI persona visuals. You deliver content.



Trial is compensated at $150 USD at the end of each week. For select candidates, we may run a shorter 2-day trial at $100 USD for a single deliverable.



If it's a mutual fit after 30 days, you transition to confirmed status with bi-weekly payments at your assessed rate — paid before work. Prepayment is earned through the trial, not given on day one.



This protects both sides — you see whether the work fits your strengths, we see whether the output fits our brand.



---



WHAT WE OFFER



- Paid accounts for all frontier AI tools — we provide the tools, you bring the talent

- AI training — you'll learn to generate content with cutting-edge tools as part of your workflow, even if you've never touched them before

- Creative ownership — you're defining how a luxury brand looks and feels on Instagram and TikTok from day one

- Clear briefs — asset libraries, mood references, and specific direction for every batch

- Direct feedback — specific, constructive notes on every edit

- Rate growth — your compensation grows as your capabilities do. We invest in editors who invest in the work.

- A brand worth building — you're not joining a finished machine, you're helping build one. We're looking for long-term commitment.



---



COMPENSATION



$800–1,000 USD/month based on experience. Editors with stronger technical skills (After Effects, AI generation) start at the higher end. We assess your rate based on your portfolio, not your résumé.



After confirmed hire: bi-weekly payments, paid before work.



---



OWNERSHIP & CONFIDENTIALITY



All outputs (edits, project files, prompts, generated assets, persona visuals) are Prismiera property and must remain confidential.



---



HOW TO APPLY



Do not send a generic cover letter.

Use 7 apply points or more when applying.



Subject line: PRISMIERA EDITOR — [Your Name]



Send the following (in this order):



1. Your Best Work. Link to ONE video that showcases your creativity, editing execution, and aesthetic taste. This should be the piece you're most proud of — the one that makes people stop scrolling.



2. The Rhythm Test. Link to ONE edit where the music drives the visuals. Show us your beat-sync instinct. (Can overlap with #1 if one video demonstrates both.)



3. The Luxury Test. In 3-5 bullets, how do you make an edit feel "expensive" instead of "cheap"?



4. The Creative Instinct Test (3-5 sentences). You're given a 45-second cinematic video about a queen who poisoned her entire court, a folder of our AI Goddess visuals, and a dark atmospheric beat. Pitch a 15-second Instagram Reel designed to get saved — tell us your audio choice, pacing, and what the first 2 seconds look like.



5. Hardware. Your PC specs: CPU / GPU / RAM. Plus your internet upload speed.



6. Turnaround Estimate. Given existing footage, a music track, and an established editing template — how long would a 15-20 second piece take you? How long would a 45 second Cinematic AI video take you?



7. The Rewrite. Rewrite this sentence to sound dark, powerful, and aspirational: "She is really cool and strong and she wins."



Looking forward to meeting and working with you!

Warming prospects and booking intro calls



Managing follow-ups and light nurture

You understand professional conversations, not copy-paste scripts



You’re confident messaging brokers, accountants, and business owners

Absolute MUST-HAVES (Non-Negotiable)



? Proven experience with LinkedIn outreach or appointment setting

? Partial overlap with Australian business hours

? Detail-oriented and organised



Strongly Preferred



Experience in Australian real estate, mortgage, or finance



Clear understanding of:



What a buyers agent does



What a mortgage broker does



Prior experience booking B2B intro calls (not consumer leads)



What You Will NOT Be Doing



No cold calling



No selling on calls



No mass spam



No fake personalisation



You warm ? qualify ? book. Nothing else.

LinkedIn (Sales Navigator experience is a plus)



Google Sheets / CRM



Clear SOPs and frameworks (provided)



Pay & Growth

title: Property Deal Sourcer/Researcher (Australian Real Estate)
description:
I run an Australian property investment business that helps clients purchase investment properties across Australia.



I am looking for a highly detail-oriented researcher who can help identify property opportunities within specific suburbs and price ranges.



Your role is to research and shortlist potential property deals based on clear criteria. (It may involve engaging real estate agents to find off-market opportunities)



You will:

• Search property listings on Australian websites (
, Domain etc.) that meet our criteria

• Filter properties based on suburb, price range and land size etc

• Review comparable sales to estimate value

• Submit deals in a structured format



Example of a Property Submission



Address: 12 Smith St, Midvale WA

Price: $640,000

Land Size: 512sqm

Type: Brick house

Estimated Rent: $620/week



Comparable Sales

10 Brown St – sold $675k (Feb 2026)

4 Lee St – sold $665k (Jan 2026)



Reason for submission:

• Large land size

• Brick construction

• Slightly under comparable sales



Requirements:

• Have strong English including spoken

• Be extremely detail oriented



Preferred:

• Experience in real estate



Basic training will be provided.



Work Hours

Flexible.



Pay

Starting pay: $5–$8 AUD per hour depending on experience.

Potential to increase if performance is strong.

Long-term opportunity available for the right person.



Important – How to Apply



To make sure you read this job post properly, please include the word “PVBA” at the start of your application.

If your application sounds AI to me, I will not read it.



Also answer these questions:

Have you ever researched real estate or property listings before?

How would you determine if a property might be under market value?

Looking for Higher Apply Points

title: Video Editor for Social Media Ads
description:
Performance Ad Video Editor (Meta / Paid Social)

Remote | Full-Time | Long-Term



MeiMEDIA is a performance-creative agency focused on building paid ad creatives that convert. We produce high-volume short-form ads for Meta 
 & Instagram) and work with fast-growing brands.

We’re hiring a high-level video editor who understands how to edit for paid social performance, not just organic content.



What You’ll Be Editing

- Short-form performance ads for Meta

- UGC-style talking head videos

- Founder-led ads, testimonials, screen recordings, and product demos

- Multi-clip edits where footage is combined to tell a clear, cohesive story (with occasional light sourcing when needed)

 

This role prioritizes clarity, pacing, and conversion, not cinematic or long-form YouTube edits.



Pace & Output

- 10–12 short-form videos per week

- Fast turnaround with consistent quality

- Clear creative direction and structured feedback



What We’re Looking For

You’re likely a strong fit if you:

- Have hands-on experience editing ads for paid social

- Understand how paid ads differ from organic content

- Can interpret direction quickly and apply feedback efficiently

- Work independently and take ownership of your output

- Are comfortable with both talking-head footage and multi-clip edits

- Can select or source supporting footage when needed to strengthen the story

- Are comfortable working in a fast-paced environment with overlapping deadlines

- Care about pacing, hooks, captions, and clarity

- Are looking for a long-term role, not a short-term gig

 

Bonus if you:

- Have experience with Meta ad best practices

- Think in terms of scroll-stopping 
nts

- Can articulate why an edit works, not just how to execute it



Growth & Opportunity

- This is a long-term role with room to grow. As you prove consistency, speed, and judgment, you’ll:

- Take on more complex edits and higher-impact projects

- Gain deeper exposure to performance strategy and creative testing

- Have opportunities for increased responsibility and compensation over time

 

We value editors who want to level up, and grow with one of the fastest-growing agencies in paid. 

 

Small detail: Include the word “PINEAPPLE” in your application. This helps us filter for applicants who read thoroughly.



About the Environment

- Performance-focused and execution-driven

- Clear standards and direct feedback

- High trust, high accountability

- Work that directly impacts real business results



Compensation

- $1,800–$2,400 USD/month (based on speed, quality, and consistency)



How to Apply

- Complete the application form linked below.

- We review applications based on paid-ad experience, editing capacity, and performance-focused thinking.

- Applications without relevant paid-ad samples will not be considered.
